description: Toggle auto delivering of items.

Ringmaster shines 3 spotlights that sweep over an area. Enemies in the light have a chance to miss their attacks and are revealed if invisible. Illusions hit by the beam fade away, losing a percentage of their maximum health each second. These effects linger for 0.3 seconds after leaving the light.
language.lore: Are you ready for your fifteen seconds? The limelight draws no distinction between infamy and fame.

description:
Use: Saddle Up

Summons a speedy unicycle to ride around on for 10.0 seconds. 1.5s after mounting the unicycle, taking damage from enemy hero sources greater than 20 dismounts the rider. Crashing into trees destroys them and slows the unicycle. Attacking, using channeled abilities, or crashing into units and other obstacles also dismounts the rider.

Use: Toss Pie

Knocks enemies back, slows them by 45% and reduces their vision to 50 recovering over 3.0 seconds, and prevents them from receiving vision from their allies for the duration. Instantly kills any non-ancient creep.

Use: Clairvoyance

Scans a targeted 450 area with global range for 5 seconds. Indicates whether there are enemy heroes in that area for the duration. Reveals invisible units and wards in the scanned area, but does not provide vision. The reveal effect lingers for 1 second.

Heroes that get in Roshan's way while he's moving between pits will be violently thrown away. Upon landing, heroes take damage and become stunned for 1.0 second. Deals additional damage for each throw he's done within one cycle of moving between pits.
notes: Heroes will be thrown away from Roshan based on their relative position to Roshan.

description: Enemies that attack Tiny receive a stacking debuff that lowers their attack damage with each stack.
notes: Break disables the application of new stacks.
Break does not disable the effects of existing stacks.

description: Leaps backward, dodges incoming projectiles, and launches an Impetus attack on the 2 furthest enemy units within Enchantress' attack range + 100.
language.lore: Sproink is as Sproink does.

description: Supercharges Clockwerks abilities: Battery Assault affects all enemies in its range; Clockwerk's attack speed in Power Cogs is increased; Rocket Flares have a reduced cooldown and fire additional rockets to either side of the target; Hookshot stun radius and duration is increased; Jetpack moves faster. Clockwerk's movement and attack speed becomes slowed to a crawl after the duration runs out.
language.lore: Rattletrap understands the limitations of his armor. Just as he understands the risks of pushing past them in times of need.

description: Ejects the swallowed allied hero inside of you.
language.lore: Allies emerge forever changed.

description: In MegaMeepo form, Meepo flings the topmost meepo towards a target within a %AbilityCastRange% range, dealing damage and slowing their movement speed.
language.lore: You go first!
notes: Does not trigger spell reflect.

description: Lycan bites an allied hero or creep-hero, granting them Shapeshift properties. Lycan and the bitten target gain 40% Lifesteal and share the healing effect of Lifesteal with each other as long as they are within 1200 range of each other.
language.lore: Does this bite look infected?
notes: Wolf Bite cooldown matches the cooldown of the current level of Shapeshift.

description: Creates vines towards the target location. Vines slow down and deal damage to enemies that walk through. Vines deal 50% more damage if they touch a tree. Does half damage to creeps.
language.lore: The tendrils of Rooftrellen's influence stretch to all corners of the forest.

description: CHANNELED - Drow releases a flurry of arrows in continuous salvos, hitting enemies for extra damage and applying Frost Arrows. Lasts up to 1.75 seconds.
language.lore: In the ranger's youth, learning to fire multiple arrows at once was considered a distracting frivolity. In the war of the Ancients, such technique has become strange necessity.
notes: Arrow base damage pierces magic immunity.
Frost Arrows' damage and slow do not pierce magic immunity.

description: CHANNELED - Ringmaster twirls his whip for up to 1.0 second then cracks it. Whipped enemies are damaged and flee in fear from Ringmaster. Channel time exponentially increases damage and extends the fear duration, but reduces the radius.
language.lore: From unhappy crowds to unruly acts, nothing persuades a pack of animals quite like the crack of the Ringmaster's whip.

description: *CRACK*

Ringmaster packs himself or an allied hero into a mobile, extradimensional box. Boxed units gain phased movement, slow resistance, bonus magic resistance, and bonus movement speed. They are also untargetable, muted, silenced, and disarmed. The box will pop open after the effect expires or it moves more than 500 units away.
language.lore: An adept assistant has nothing to fear within the confines of The Box. An amateur has...much darker prospects indeed.
language.aghanimDescription: Escape Act has  charges. When the box pops open, Impalement Art daggers are thrown in all directions, and all enemies in an  radius take  damage.

description:
Ringmaster rolls the Wheel of Wonder to the targeted location, knocking aside enemies along the way. After it reaches its target, enemies in range of the wheel take damage over time and are slowed by -50%.

Enemy heroes who face the wheel for more than 0.5 seconds are mesmerized and drawn towards it. The first enemy to be mesmerized triggers a timer for the wheel to explode. If the timer is not triggered, it will automatically explode after 4 seconds.
language.lore: No, brave friends, illusions are for charlatans and card sharks. What you witness today is the power of true magic. But only if you dare set your gaze upon...the mesmerizing wheel.

description: Ringmaster throws one of his daggers to a precise point of his choosing. If he strikes an enemy, the dagger deals impact damage, briefly slows the unit hit, and causes them to bleed. The bleeding deals a percentage of the victim's maximum health in damage every second to heroes and flat damage per second to creeps.
language.lore: Passed down through generations, it simply wouldn't be a Kettle Circus without the Great Cogliostro's signature trick.

description: Gather souvenirs from kills and assists.

Ringmaster receives a random single-use Dark Carnival Souvenir whenever an enemy hero dies within 925 units of him. Additional Souvenirs are held as charges.

If Ringmaster does not have a Souvenir when he dies he will be granted one.

Use: Proportion Distortion

Creates 1 imperfect image of your hero that lasts 18 seconds. Your illusion deals 28 and takes 300 damage.
notes: Has a 0.2 second cast time during which you are invulnerable.

description:
Use: Whoopsie

Propels your hero forward 400 units. Leaves a 200 radius stink cloud behind for 3.0 seconds that slows enemies by -30.0.
Deals 60 damage to all units within 1000 range every second.

Use: Forcefully Imbibe

Temporarily increases an allied hero's Strength by 5.0 plus 1.0 per Ringmaster's level for 8.0 seconds. The effect holds for 4.0 seconds and then deteriorates over the duration.

language.displayName: Escape Act Grants Strong Dispel and Flying

description: Performs a short Omnislash for 1 seconds.
language.lore: A briefer onslaught for those less deserving of the honor.

description: Causes a wave to travel outwards in all directions forcing enemy heroes to become Feared upon impact and dealing damage, and grants Terrorblade Metamorphosis for a short time.
language.lore: A shockwave of power strong enough to break the walls of Foulfell itself.

description: Enemy units in range of Sand Storm have their movement speed slowed by 45% and miss 45% of their attacks.

language.displayName: +{s:bonus_bonus_movement_speed_pct_night}% Hunter In The Night Movement Speed
+20 Movespeed Aura to Beastmaster and his units
description: The Movespeed Aura is global, persists through death, and affects Beastmaster and all units under his control.

language.displayName: +125 Frost Blast Radius and Area Damage

description: Weakens an enemy's magical resistance, and applies a slow that increases in strength the more the target moves.
language.lore: Even a glimpse of the First Light is enough to rob enemies of their senses.
language.shardDescription: Grants %AbilityCharges% charges.

description: Cancel the Primal Split.

Causes Leshrac and all nearby enemies to turn ethereal, preventing them from attacking, slowing them, and making them take more magic damage. Increases Leshrac's speed rather than reducing it. Does not cause Leshrac to take amplified damage.
language.lore: When it serves his purpose, Leshrac briefly reduces his presence in the Terrene Plane.

language.displayName: +20 Finger of Death Damage Per Kill

description:
Digs into the ground for a short duration, dispelling Meepo and causing him to become invulnerable and untargetable for 3s. Restores 25% of his max health over that duration.

DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
language.lore: I'm diggin' here!

description: Jakiro chill his enemies with ice added to his attack, slowing movement for %duration% seconds and increasing damage taken from Jakiro's attacks and abilities. This effect does not apply to buildings. Shares a cooldown with Liquid Fire.
language.lore: The right maw of Jakiro opens, punishing all with bitter frost.
language.shardDescription: Jakiro's Liquid Frost no longer shares a cooldown with Liquid Fire.

description: End your Focus Fire early.
Releases a Tidal Wave that spawns behind Kunkka. Deals damage and drags enemies along it for the duration. Enemies cannot attack while being dragged.
language.lore: A good sailor knows the timing of the tides like the back of his hand.

language.displayName: +250 Max Health Aura to Beastmaster and his units
description: The Max Health Aura is global, persists through death, and affects Beastmaster and all units under his control.
Also provides 50% magic resistance while Debuff Immune.
Allows Ice Wall to be cast as a Vector Target ability with {s:bonus_vector_cast_range} cast range.

language.displayName: +{s:bonus_stun_duration}s Solar Bind Stun when target is fully slowed

description: Bouncing attacks deal {s:bonus_overload_damage_pct}% damage.

Clockwerk activates a jetpack, gaining flying movement, flying vision, and bonus movement speed. Clockwerk has a severely-limited turn rate during this time and cannot attack. Jetpack is cancelled upon casting Hookshot.
language.lore: Sure it's blown up over fourteen testing dummies, but at least they all flew!

description: Passively grants Lifestealer Movement and Attack Speed.
language.lore: Distant memories of the Vile Council fuel one mind to plotting and the other to more immediate dark ends.

description: Turns Witch Doctor into a Death Ward briefly with reduced attack speed. He is hidden during this time.

Zeus performs a Heavenly Jump, leaping forward and shocking the closest visible nearby enemy (prioritizing heroes), dealing damage as well as reducing their movement and attack speed. Zeus gets 900 unobstructed vision around him for 3 seconds.
language.lore: Though temporarily barred from the heavens, Zeus can still manage a measure of godly flight.

description:
Alchemist throws a potion at an ally, applying a basic dispel and giving them attack speed, movement speed and HP regen.

DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
language.lore: After Razzil's great grandfather tested an early version of this potion on himself, a surviving family member immediately saw the profit potential.

description: Coughs a quill-packed hairball towards the target location. Erupts at the location, hitting enemies with Viscous Nasal Goo stacks and Quill Spray.
language.lore: Every part of Bristleback's body is a weapon -- even the parts he accidentally swallowed.

description: Chooses the location you will land when Telekinesis finishes.

Creates a shield around the target ally, absorbing a percentage of the damage of next 3 attacks from enemy heroes. When damage is absorbed, a fireball is launched at the attacker. Can be cast on towers.
language.lore: There is immense luck involved in Aggron not just setting friends on fire.
notes: When multicast, nearby allies will be selected randomly in an 1000 area of effect to receive Fire Shield.

description: Magnus tosses any enemies in front of him, launching them to his rear. Enemies take damage, spend 0.6 seconds in the air, and are stunned while in the air and an additional amount of time after landing.
language.lore: Survivors of Joerlak will never forget the sight of Magnus tossing countless enemies into rivers of fire and clouds of ash.

description: Targets an allied unit, applying an all damage barrier to them that also provides Status Resistance.
language.lore: A gifted mind unconstrained by moral or ethical boundaries tends to attract an adversary or two.
notes: Translocator will not blink Tinker forward if he is Rooted or Leashed after the Basic Dispel.

description: Releases a flame in the direction Timbersaw is facing. Applies a debuff that deals damage per second and slows enemy movement speed. Affects buildings for reduced damage.
language.lore: A single saw can only cut so much. A single spark can burn forever.

description: Vector Targeted. Summons a strong wind that pushes all enemies in the target area towards the target direction.
language.lore: At last Lyralei has learned to call upon the might of her true birthright.

description: Omniknight imbues his hammer with holy power, causing his attack to have increased range, deal pure damage based on a percentage of his base damage and slow his target for a short duration.
language.lore: The knight is merely a means to move the hammer.

description: Ignites an area, dealing damage over time that lingers on enemies in it. Has reduced cast range when melee.
language.lore: Most Dragon Knights name no greater horror than the scourge of dragon's fire.

description: Necrophos turns into a large Death Pulse towards the target unit's position. Once it arrives to the location, the Death Pulse spreads towards nearby enemies and allies.
language.lore: The Rumusque Faithful consider Necrophos to be more plague than person.
notes: Does not trigger spell reflect.

description: Phantom Assassin releases sharp blades around her, dealing a percentage of each victim's max health on impact and applying Break.
language.lore: A sister is generally given a single name, but powerful names often have plentiful allies.

language.displayName: Brain Sap Pure and Pierces Immunity

description: Grants Storm Spirit and allied heroes within 750 AoE of him 3 Overload charges. Provides 40 Attack Speed. Lasts up to 12 seconds or until the charges are depleted.

Turns Visage and familiars invisible, granting Visage bonus movement speed and upgrading its movement type to flying. When Visage or its familiars leave invisibility they deal more damage for a short duration. Lasts 30 seconds. Invisibility ends when attacking or casting.
language.lore: Those on the mortal plane are blind to the stirrings of the agents of the afterlife.

description: Passive ability. Causes Dark Seer's next attack on a hero to have True Strike, knock a replica out of the victim, damaging and stunning them based on how far Dark Seer has moved in the past 3.0 seconds. Max power is reached after 1100 distance moved.
language.lore: As a young soldier, long before he became a leader of his people, Ish'Kafel was known amongst his fellow recruits as quite the pugilist.

description: Launches a grenade at the target area, dealing damage to enemies and knocking them and Sniper himself back. Enemies affected are disarmed and have their movement slowed after the knockback.
language.lore: ATTN: IN CASE OF DANGER PULL PIN

description: Costs part of Terrorblade's current HP to cast, providing Terrorblade and nearby illusions bonus movement, HP Regen and attack speed. Reflection illusions gain 50% of the bonuses. Can't be cast while in Metamorphosis and Metamorphosis will remove Demon Zeal
language.lore: Fear is fueled by confusion when Terrorblade's enemies see that the first cut he makes is one to embolden himself.

description: Flies towards the target enemy, dealing damage and rooting it.
When Medusa is targeted with a spell, a single-target Mystic Snake is sent back towards the enemy that turns them into stone for 1s.
language.lore: Point your gaze at her if you dare.

description: Evasion works at all times during the buff

language.displayName: Debuff Immunity While Channeling Tame the Beasts
description: Also grants 50% magic resistance.
Enemies damaged by Sonic Wave are forced to run away from Queen of Pain for {s:value} seconds.
Creates a cloud at the target location. All allies inside the radius are hidden and affected by Shadow Dance.
language.lore: Nothing worse than a job going bad thanks to some clompy-footed friend.

language.displayName: +{s:bonus_frost_breath_effect_bonus}% Wyrm's Wrath effect during Elder Dragon Form
+{s:bonus_ally_ms}% X Marks the Spot Move Speed
description: Affects Allies positively and Enemies negatively

language.displayName: Earth Spike affects a 30 degree cone
+15% To Hell And Back Debuff/Spell Amp

description: Also reduces cooldown of Unrefined Fireblast

language.displayName: Fiend's Gates deals 100 DPS in a 700 radius
Song of the Siren heals allies {s:value}% Max HP/s
+1 Agility gain/stolen per Essence Shift Stack

description: Max Fear duration increased by +{s:bonus_requiem_slow_duration_max}s
Every time Skywrath Mage deals magic damage to an enemy hero with an ability, he gains a magic damage barrier equal to 10 + 1 per his hero level. Each buff stacks independently.
language.lore: The court mages of Skywrath may only deploy their magic in defense of the kingdom and the throne.

language.displayName: +10 Upheaval Attack Speed per second on Allies
description: Maximum of +70 Attack Speed

language.displayName: 2 Moon Glaives fired on Lucent Beam
description: Does not fire Glaives on Beams from Eclipse
Harpy Scout gains flying movement at the cost of movement speed. Consumes mana while active.
Kobolds are adept at finding gold, increasing nearby allied heroes' GPM.
When Hellbear dies, all nearby allies go into a frenzy gaining attack speed for a short amount of time.
When Hellbear Smasher dies, all nearby allies go into a rampage gaining bonus attack damage for a short amount of time.
Provides bonus Heal Amplification to all nearby allies.

Opens 2 portals, one next to Underlord and one in the target location. Heroes can channel a portal for 3.5 seconds to teleport to the other side. Portals have to be at least 1500 away from each other.

Double-click to teleport to your team's base, in front of your fountain.
language.lore: They come without warning, leaving fire and blood where kingdoms once flourished.
language.aghanimDescription: Summons a Pit of Malice around each of the portals. Reduces cooldown.

description: The Wildwing Ripper calls on the spirit of the wind, creating a hurricane that can push a unit in the direction of Wildwing Ripper's choice.

Broodmother may create up to 5 invisible web lines touching any existing web. Enemy Heroes that cross the web line will spring the trap, becoming rooted, revealed in fog, and take damage over time. Multiple Heroes can trip on the same line until it's destroyed after being initially triggered. Broodmother's team is alerted via the minimap when an enemy has triggered the snare.
language.lore: The slightest tremor of her web is all Arachnia needs to find her prey.

description: Every third attack Kobold Soldier will disarm its target temporarily. Attack counter doesn't increase while ability is on cooldown.

language.displayName: Half Track Bonus Speed to Allies

description: Lobs a Sticky Bomb towards the target area. If it lands next to an enemy hero, the bomb will stick to it, slowing its movement speed. After a few seconds the bomb will explode, dealing damage in an area around the detonation and applying a secondary slow for 3 seconds.
language.lore: Such revolutionary brilliance was meant to be shared.

description: Ogre slowly charges a big attack stunning for 2.4 seconds and dealing 200 / 250 / 300 / 400 + 8% of their current HP as damage to all units in front of him.

Techies trigger an electric charge giving them bonus movement speed for a short period of time. Enemies attacking Techies are temporarily disarmed and get a Basic Dispel. At the end of the effect, the charge explodes, disarming all enemies within the radius.
language.lore: A steady bomb hand prefers an abundance of personal space.
language.shardDescription: Reactive Tazer can be cast on allies and deals damage on detonation. Also deals damage to any enemy that attacks the affected ally.

description: Silences target unit.
Whenever Hill Troll Berserker attacks a unit it applies break to it.
Skeleton's allies gain bonus attack damage. This Aura stacks.
The Giant Wolf's ferocious roar reduces all nearby enemies total attack damage.
Grants Debuff Immunity with 60% magic resistance to the target, as well as bonus Strength and HP Regen based on the amount of Debuffs on them.
language.lore: The All Seeing One casts down his protection over those that Purist calls friend.

language.displayName: +1.5% Spider's Milk Hero Health as heal
+2% Wild Axes Damage Amp Per Stack

description:
Bloodseeker sprays his blood continuously in the area around him, losing health to damage and slow his enemies. While active, Sanguivore's healing is increased. Cannot be turned off while on cooldown.

Additionally, passively turns all your overheal from your own abilities into an all damage barrier up to 50% of Bloodseeker's Max Health. Barrier amount decays by 0.5% per second.
notes: Damage dealt to Bloodseeker is non-lethal and can never kill a hero.

description: Damage is changed to Pure

Throws a flare towards an enemy, dealing damage, teleporting them away, rooting them and reducing their Cast and Attack Range for 2 seconds.

The teleport location is always the ability's current cast range + 100 from Tinker's position when he threw the flare.
language.lore: Tinker's deadliest weapon instantly turns an enemy into space dust. Research to resolve the annoying 'perfect copy' side effect... is ongoing.
notes: Will not teleport enemies if the distance is over 2000 units away.

description: Reinforced Units and Buildings Deal Bonus Damage to other Reinforced Units and Buildings and take less attack damage from other units.
Piercing Units Deal Bonus Damage to non-hero, non-heavy units and reduced damage to heroes and heavy units.
Runty Units Deal reduced damage to hero units.

Cleanses the target allied unit, removing negative buffs for the duration. At the end of the duration, the unit is healed. Units under the effect of Disruption can still be affected by Demonic Cleanse.

DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
language.lore: The only one permitted to harm his more useful followers is Shadow Demon himself.
notes: Can be cast on invulnerable units.
Negative buffs are continously removed from the target for the duration of the Cleanse.

language.displayName: +2% Astral Spirit Move Speed Per Hero

description: The Rock Golem's imposing figure makes enemies more susceptible to Physical Damage.
The Black Drakes' gaze make enemies more susceptible to Spell Damage.

language.displayName: Press the Attack grants 1.5s Debuff Immunity
description: Also increases magic resistance by 50%%
Brings forth rain to the target area. Enemies standing in the area receive damage and have reduced Heal Amplification. Allies in the area heal and have increased incoming Heal Amplification.
language.lore: Through mixture of the astral and the atmospheric, Nerif bends a single reality into paradoxical alignment.

description: Hucks a seed at a target, slowing and damaging it. The seed can bounce multiple times to nearby targets.
Coming from a different era, the Frostbitten Golem has an innate control of time, speeding up the cooldowns of all nearby allies.
The Ice Shaman chucks a blue flame towards an enemy unit or building, dealing damage over time.

Creates a Brewling based on Brewmaster's current Drunken Brawler Stance.

A new Brewling cannot be resummoned for 3s if the current one takes damage from enemy Heroes or hero-controlled units. If the Brewling dies, the ability goes on cooldown for 70 seconds.

Only one Brewling can exist at a time. If Brewmaster uses Primal Split, the existing Brewling disappears.
language.lore: Mangix doesn't hold to it by rule, but he vaguely recalls an old master musing that, if one could manage, scaring up a companion was always preferable to drinking alone.

description: Provides the Brewling with phased movement and bonus Status Resistance.
Grants Lina unobstructed movement and increases her spell damage and magic resistance. Grants max fiery soul stacks on activation.
language.lore: A natural defense equally suited to keeping anything from unwanted sisters to snarling hellbeasts at bay.

description: Sacrifice the life of this unit to instantly heal an ally for 30.0% of this unit's current health.

language.displayName: Hand of God applies a Strong Dispel

description: Slides in a direction, creating a crystal clone of herself in her place and disjointing incoming projectiles. If the clone takes enough damage or times out, it shatters, Frostbiting enemies in a 450 AoE around its place. The Clone can also be destroyed by Crystal Maiden's own spells.
language.lore: So convincing that some allies have spent minutes talking to the clone before they realized she wasn't speaking back.

language.displayName: +1x Brewed Up multiplier for Drunken Brawler
Spells deal {s:bonus_bonus_spell_damage} more damage for each Fiery Soul Charge.

description: Centaur tosses an ally into a cart hitched behind him. While in the cart, the ally is invulnerable and can still cast and attack normally, but cannot move independently or be targeted by opponents. Increases the attack range of melee heroes by 200.
language.lore: The needs of Bradwarden's ample pride pale greatly in the face of his demand for victory.

description: Enchantress roots an enemy unit. All creeps, ally, enemy and neutral within a radius will gain bonus movement and attack speed and attack the chosen target for 6 seconds.
language.lore: The laws of the forest may be oblique, but punishment for breaking them is swift and smiling.

description: Viper slams into the ground, releasing a Nethertoxin and splattering each enemy in a 500 AoE for 4 seconds with the effect of Corrosive Skin.
language.lore: It was thought that Netherdrake wings touch ground only in death, but some surmise that those who've witnessed more intentional landings merely haven't survived to tell the tale.

description: Barathrum gains magic resistance and distorts reality around the selected hero, making any unit-targeted spells cast by enemy heroes get redirected towards Spirit Breaker. Can be cast on both allied and enemy heroes, but only spells cast by enemies of Spirit Breaker will be redirected.
language.lore: Barathrum's unyielding focus forms a pocket of planar convergence from which not even the most powerful arcane energies can escape.

description: Primal Beast charges up and then runs in the chosen direction, knocking back enemies and allies alike. Enemy units are damaged and stunned on impact. The longer the charge duration, the farther Primal Beast's momentum will carry him.
Can be cancelled at any time with the Stop command.
language.lore: The Beast's single-minded focus on chosen prey leaves all other considerations scattered in his ruinous wake.

description: Begins the rush to the specified location.

Primal Beast stomps over everything. For every 140 units traveled, all enemies around the Beast receive damage. Deals base damage plus a multiplier of Primal Beast's attack damage. Primal Beast is disarmed for the duration of the ability.
language.lore: As the only member of his species to arrive on this world, locals can only speculate on the Beast's size relative to his kin. Such observation would prove easier of course if the subject didn't eat everything it sees and destroy most of what it doesn't.

description: The Beast's temper causes every instance of 50 hero damage or more to grant a stack of Uproar.
When activated, Primal Beast releases a roar that slows surrounding enemies and grants the Beast additional attack damage and armor for 7 seconds based on his current stacks of Uproar.
language.lore: Already draped in a broken patchwork of barding and chains upon appearing in the mistwoods, the Beast tolerates no further attempts at subjugation.
notes: Primal Beast cannot gain Uproar stacks from self damage.
Break disables the gaining of new stacks.
language.aghanimDescription: When Primal Beast activates Uproar, he releases  waves of  projectiles per stack of uproar each in a circle around him. Projectiles deal damage and Break enemies hit. After a short delay, each projectile splinters in two.

description: CHANNELED - Primal Beast channels his rage, grabbing the target enemy and slamming them into the ground repeatedly, damaging and mini-stunning any enemies caught in the AoE. Each consecutive hit deals bonus damage. Lasts 2.3 seconds.
language.lore: Though none are certain whether his utterances have true meaning, most concede the Beast's powerful grip and tendency to smash his enemies into naught but pulp and pieces communicates his intent well enough.

description: Applies a curse on all enemy heroes within 1200 range, displaying them in fog, slowing them, and dealing damage over time based on the number of trees within 250 radius. Treants count as trees for this purpose.
language.lore: Though powerful, Nature's Prophet's gifts do not include all-sight, and he must rely heavily upon reconnaissance and aid from a long-standing network of stalwart friends.

description: Whenever the target takes damage, all enemies, including the target itself if it is an enemy, within 675 range of the target also receive a portion of that damage. Can target enemy and allied units. Effect is paused if the target is hidden by Disruption.
language.lore: Friends and families share in the suffering when Shadow Demon finds a new victim.

description:
Attacks from Beastmaster or a nearby unit he controls will cause him bang his drum, dealing damage to nearby units and healing Beastmaster and units under his control for a portion of the damage dealt. Every attack decreases the interval between drum hits down to a minimum of 0.5s between hits after 20 attacks. If no attacks are made, the intervals gradually increase.

Using Primal Roar counts as 10 attacks.
language.lore: Nature's rage is timeless, and for those who know the secrets, it's easy to stir the echoes of ire that rejoiced in the downfall of Slom.

description: Axes still must return to Beastmaster before they can be cast again.

CHANNELED - Naga Siren channels for up to %AbilityChannelTime% seconds, pulling all units affected by Naga's Ensnare in a 1600 range towards her at a speed of 200. Channeling ends when the Ensnared unit is 100 distance away.
language.lore: Even the youngest Slithereen are well schooled in trawling for prey with nothing but their wits and nets.
language.aghanimDescription: Allows Reel In to affect Spell Immune units.

description: +{s:bonus_attack_range_bonus} Attack Range when attacking an enemy affected by Poison Touch

language.displayName: +12 All Stats per hero hit with Reverse Polarity
description: Bonus Stats last for {s:bonus_stat_buff_duration}s

language.displayName: +85% Breathe Fire Damage/Cast Range in Dragon Form
+{s:bonus_movement_slow}% Mystic Snake Turn and Movement Speed Slow
+20% Hunter in the Night Status Resistance
Refraction Can Be Cast While Disabled
Enrage provides half benefits to allies in a {s:bonus_aoe_radius} radius
Creates A Second Plasma Field Delayed By 0.8s
description: The second plasma field does {s:bonus_second_ring_reduction}% less damage
Add a partial outer ring to Dissimilate
Glaives of Wisdom Bounce to targets withing a {s:bonus_bounce_range} range.
The Flagbearer inspires all allies, granting them bonus health regeneration.
Does not reveal Wards

Deals damages to the enemy equal to a percentage of its Max Mana. Deals additional damage equal to a percentage of the damage the target has taken from Nyx Assassin in the last 15s. Resets accumulated damage before applying damage.
language.lore: Only those raised by the queen can use their minds to touch the world around them.

description: Infects an enemy with a deadly plague that does an initial burst of damage and additional damage over time based on the unit's maximum health. The plague slows the target and nearby enemies based on their distance to the target. When the target dies or the debuff expires, all nearby enemies are infected with a noncommunicable version of the plague.
language.lore: Deep in the heart of the jungles of Jidi, the seeds of extermination freely grow.

description: Primary Meepo mounts all other Meepos in a 600 radius around him on top of his shoulders. While in this form, he gains 40% of the other Meepo stats and can Fling them at enemies, dealing damage and slowing them.
When cast, Earthbind generates additional nets and Poof deals bonus damage based on the amount of Meepos riding on top.
language.lore: Hi, Meepos!

description: Zeus gains bonus attack speed and his attacks create Arc Lightnings that deal a percentage of its damage. Can be toggled off to stop this effect.
language.lore: A helping hand from Aghanim lets the fallen Lord of Heaven tap into some of his old strengths.

description: Ogre Magi's max Intelligence is 0. He receives mana and mana regeneration from Strength.
Alchemist coats his weapons and empowers his spells with an acid that applies a stacking slow and base attack damage reduction to enemies hit.
Attacks apply 2 stacks. Unstable Concoction applies 1 stack per second of brew time.
language.lore: A powerful solvent that turned out to work all too well.

description: Pulls the target and the Void Brewling in the target direction. Enemies are damaged upon arrival.

Clinkz throws a projectile filled with tar at the target enemy, dealing Magic damage on impact. After impact, the tar spills onto the ground and stays there for 5 seconds. Any enemy that walks across it gets slowed, and attacks from Clinkz or his Skeleton Archers will deal bonus physical damage.

When the Tar Bomb hits, any Skeleton Archers within attack range will attack the target. If autocast is activated, Clinkz will throw a tar bomb when attacking the target, if it is available.
language.lore: After his battle with Maraxiform, Clinkz found a useful source of ichor where his heart used to be.

description:
Clinkz gains attack speed and has bonus attack range. Any current Skeleton Archers within a 1200 radius of Clinkz also gain bonus attack range and 60% of the attack speed bonus.

Casting Strafe does not break Skeleton Walk invisibility.
language.lore: The closest Clinkz can come to peace is knowing that this was the last thing Maraxiform ever saw.

description: Drow creates a hill of ice beneath her. While standing on the hill, attackers gain bonus attack range and high ground advantage - they cannot miss and gain flying vision. Drow additionally gets bonus Multishot arrows per wave while on the hill. The front of the hill obscures vision and cannot be moved through except by Drow. Does not interrupt Multishot when cast.
language.lore: Traxex wasn't just adopted by the Drow, she was adopted by the lands they lived in.

language.displayName: +150 Health / +25 Damage  for Enchantress and her units
Cannot be slowed or rooted during Trample

description: Centaur hitches a cart behind him. While active, Centaur gains the benefit of Stampede for the current level of Stampede, and can cast Hitch a Ride on a target ally.
language.lore: It is a great honor to be offered a ride by Centaur Warrunner and a grave mistake to refuse it.

description: Applies Shadow Walk and all of its bonuses to the target ally. Allied fade time is 0.5s. Does not break Bounty Hunter's invisibility when cast.
language.lore: Useful for the rare instances when a contested bounty is actually wanted alive.

description: Every strike increases the damage of subsequent strikes until the debuff expires

Counterspell Ally may be activated to create an anti-magic shell around an allied hero that blocks and reflects any targeted spells. Any time a spell is blocked by Counterspell or Counterspell Ally, an illusion of Anti-Mage will be created next to the enemy.
language.lore: The only magic that Anti-Mage will even barely tolerate... is friendship.

description: Grabs the Target Ally, Enemy or Rune, and uncontrollably drags them towards Lone Druid for the duration. Enemies receive damage every %tick_rate%s. When dragging a unit, they are Rooted.
Lightning Storm hits a random enemy in Pulse Nova radius every {s:bonus_pulse_nova_lightning_interval}s with a single bolt. Prioritizes heroes.
Detonate Reactive Tazer immediately.
Axe gains Strength based on his armor as long as he's away from his allies.
notes: 40% of Axe's armor is gained as strength as long as there are no allied heroes within 700 distance from Axe. Lingers for an additional 3s after approaching an ally.

description: When facing the team that last killed him, Roshan will release an angry roar, heard everywhere on the map, that damages everyone in a 600 AoE and disarms them for 2 seconds. Units that have been roared take 25% increased incoming damage.

language.displayName: +{s:bonus_target_crit_multiplier}% Crit On Targets Affected By Dragon Slave
description: Only applies to Lina's attacks

language.displayName: +2/0.01 Dumb Luck Mana/Mana Regen Per Strength
Fortune's End Heals/Damages for 80 Per Effect Dispelled
+3s Culling Blade Kill Buff Bonus Duration
Wave Of Terror Steals 25% Of Reduced Damage And Armor

description: Shortly after dying, a burst of magic damage is dealt to all enemies in a small area. Does 50% less damage to non-hero targets.
Axe permanently drenches his blade every time he kills an enemy Hero, gaining 0.2 / 0.3 / 0.4 / .5 bonus armor for each stack. Killing with Culling Blade gives 3x stacks.
Bane's attribute gains are always evenly distributed across all three attributes (items that grant +3 Strength will now grant +1 Str/Agi/Int).

Bloodseeker restores some life when he kills a unit, equal to 1.5% of the units max health per Bloodseeker's Level plus a base of 25.

Restores for half values if an ally kills a nearby enemy hero.
notes: Creeps lifesteal is reduced by 40%.
language.aghanimDescription: Bloodseeker heals for 0 of the <font color=\"#d8ae53\">Pure</font> damage he deals.
language.shardDescription: Passively turns all Bloodseeker's overheal from his own abilities into an all damage barrier up to 0 of Bloodseeker's Max Health. Barrier amount decays by 0% per second

description: Crystal Maiden has 25 / 50 / 75 / 100% Mana Regeneration Amplification.
Grants Drow bonus agility based on Drow's current agility and level. Nearby ranged heroes received 50% of the bonus agility.
language.lore: Traxex' time spent alone in the forests of her Drow home has allowed her to teach other archers how to improve their bow skills.

description: Drow deals 30% more damage when attacking from high ground.
Juggernaut deals 12% more damage to targets that are facing him. Damage bonus always applies during Omnislash.
Juggernaut gains Agility and Movement Speed as long as he's not taking damage.
notes: Grants a stack of Bladeform every 2.0s that Juggernaut does not take damage. Each stack grants 2.0% base agility bonus and 1 movement speed with a max of 10 stacks. Stacks fade after 2s upon taking any damage.
Break disables the gaining of new stacks.
Break does not disable the bonuses from existing stacks.

description: Turns Mirana and all allied heroes invisible and grants bonus movement speed. Mirana gains bonus outgoing damage during the duration. If a hero is revealed, invisibility will restore after the fade delay as long as Moonlight Shadow's duration has not expired.
language.lore: Her tenure with Selemene allows Mirana to eclipse the ground, wrapping her allies in a cloak of shadows.
notes: Units affected will not auto attack enemies.

description:
Gradually increases attack speed and damage of Mirana and all allied heroes, reaching maximum power after 6s.

Allies receive 50% of the bonus.
Healing Lotuses are 50% more effective on Mirana and her allies.

Shadow Fiend gains Bonus Attack Speed and Movement Speed for 8 seconds. For the duration of the effect, Necromastery's Max Soul count is increased by 5, but he loses that amount of souls after it is done.
language.lore: For Nevermore, there's as much delight in the harvest as there is in the feast.
notes: Cannot be cast unless Shadow Fiend has enough souls to pay the cost.

language.displayName: Feast of Souls Grants +30% Cast Speed

description: Morphling's Primary Attribute is now <font color='#9acd32'>Agility</font>.
Morphling's Primary Attribute is now <font color='#ff0000'>Strength</font>. Adaptive Strike stuns based on Morphling's strength. Morphling gains 1% Spell Amp per 4 Agility.
notes: Break disables the Spell Amp per Agility.

description: Morphling receives 50.0% of stat growth bonuses every half level instead of the full bonus at level up. All Attributes bonuses from skill points in the Talent Tree provide an additional + 3 to Morphling's primary attribute.
When targeting an enemy for an attack, Phantom Lancer quickly charges into range, gaining a temporary agility boost. Phantom Lancer's illusions also have this ability.
language.lore: Azwraith knows that on the field of battle, speed can mean everything.
notes: If the attack order is cancelled, the movement speed bonus is lost.
Rush movement speed is 800.
language.aghanimDescription: Increases Range. Whenever Phantom Lancer Rushes through enemies, he creates Juxtapose illusions that attack them.

description: Whenever Puck disjoints an attack, it restores 10 + 2 of its max mana and 10 + 2 of its max health. Dodging a targeted spell projectile restores 3.5x that amount.
Pudge's skin thickens permanently every time he kills an enemy Hero, gaining 1.1 / 1.4 / 1.7 / 2.0 bonus Strength for each stack.
notes: Enemy Heroes that die within 450 of Pudge grant a stack regardless of its killer.

description: There's a chance when attacked, and always when targeted with a spell, to release a forked lightning that strikes the target and other nearby enemies, prioritizing the unit type of the attacker, dealing damage and slowing movement speed.
language.lore: Merely approaching the Lightning Revenant is rewarded with shock therapy.

description: Razor gains 1.25% spell amplification for every 20 points of attack damage.
Sand King's attacks inject a venom that causes enemy units to violently explode when they die.
language.lore: An injection from Crixalis makes one brittle and as dry as the arid wastes, subject to implosive demise.

description: Sand King strikes an area, performing an attack on all enemies in the area of effect, dealing extra damage to each. Enemies within an innermost radius of 125 take 40% extra damage. Applies Caustic Finale and a slow to all enemies hit.
language.lore: Crixalis is certainly capable of mercy, but the soul of the sand finds few foes worth sparing.

description: Storm Spirit gains a charge of 0.2 mana regeneration per kill. Loses 3 charges per death. Leveling Ball Lightning gives Storm Spirit 3 bonus charges. Additionally every time he gains a charge he also gains 0.1 Mana Regen permanently.
notes: Break disables the gaining of new stacks from kills.

description: Sven's attacks deal 20% bonus damage to stunned enemies.
Sven gains additional attack damage from Strength.
Tiny gains Status and Slow Resistance from Strength. Slow Resistance also reduces the impact of Attack Speed slows.
notes: Insurmountable does not reduce the effect of Grow's Attack Speed Reduction.

description: Vengeful Spirit's ranged attacks behave as if they were melee attacks.
Whenever an enemy hero kills Vengeful Spirit, they get a debuff until their next death, causing Vengeful Spirit to deal 20% bonus damage to them.
Windranger's movement speed cannot be lower than 240 and can reach 600.
Lina's spells deal 125 total damage. 60 is dealt on impact and 65% is dealt as burn damage over s.

Lich cannot gain passive mana regeneration, but any unit dying within 1500 / range of Lich restores 2.5% of his Max Mana (Dying heroes restore 25% of Lich's Max Mana). Instant mana restoration from items and abilities apply to Lich as normal.
Lion gains 20% debuff duration and 20 spell amplification for 90s after respawning.

When taking lethal damage, Shadow Shaman receives a strong dispel and survives as a 1 HP chicken. Incoming damage is reduced to zero for 1s.

Cooldown is reset upon respawning.
DISPEL TYPE: Strong Dispel
language.lore: Rhasta had to learn early on how to stay one step ahead of those who (rightfully or wrongfully) wished him harm.
notes: Lethal Damage from Axe's Culling Blade and Necrophos's Reaper's Scythe will not be prevented.
Incoming damage reduction buff will prevent certain sources of HP removal from killing Shadow Shaman.
language.shardDescription: Increases the amount of time incoming damage is reduced to 1 seconds. When Fowl Play is triggered, Shadow Shaman becomes invulnerable for  seconds and  additional uncontrollable chickens are created that last for  seconds. While Shadow Shaman is transformed, he can now use items.

description: Slardar gains bonus movement speed, health regeneration, attack damage, and armor while in a puddle, trail, or river.
language.aghanimDescription: Provides additional HP Regen, Armor and Status Resistance while in a puddle, trail, or river. Increases puddle/trail radius by 80 and puddle/trail duration by 5s.

description: Tidehunter begins the game much smaller and with - -60 attack range and - -60 Anchor Smash radius. Tidehunter grows larger with experience, gaining attacking range and Anchor Smash radius per level. Strength Gain increased.
Tidehunter's hide removes negative status effects if he takes more than 450 damage. Removes most debuffs, even if they are generally not purgable.
DISPEL TYPE: Strong Dispel
notes: Only damage from player owned sources is counted towards debuff removal.
The counter will reset if no player owned damage is taken for 7.0 seconds.

description:
Witch Doctor gets a Gris-Gris, an item that cannot be dropped or placed in the backpack. When the owner dies, 100% of the gold lost from death is added to the item, and will be refunded when the item is consumed. The value of the Gris-Gris is increased by 1 every 3s.

Right-click to consume and permanently remove the item.
Every time Riki strikes his enemy from behind, he deals bonus damage based on his Agility.
notes: Does not work when denying friendly units.
Illusions of Riki will play Backstab animations, but not deal any bonus damage.

description: Allies within 500 distance from Enigma have up to 9 / 11 / 13 / 15% Damage Reduction. Effect starts at 0% at max distance and increases to its maximum strength when the ally is at 200 distance. Does not affect Enigma itself.
Enigma spawns Eidolons upon receiving damage.
notes: Whenever Enigma takes more than 375 damage from any source, he spawns an Eidolon next to him. Damage counter resets to zero after 7s. Eidolons created in this fashion grant 50 experience and gold.

description: Units in a 600 radius moving away from Enigma have a 8 / 12 / 16 / 20% movespeed penalty.
Tinker gains 1 item cooldown reduction per 3 Intelligence, up to a maximum of 60%.
Lasts for {s:bonus_armor_duration}s.
Increases Sniper's attack range.

Necrophos slips into the realm that separates the living from the dead. Unable to attack or be attacked, he emits an aura that slows enemies around him. He takes additional magic damage in this form, but his restorative powers are amplified.
language.lore: Rotund'jere uses the souls of his victims as bridge from life to afterlife.

description: Deals extra damage to nearby units when attacking.
Burns the Golem's nearby enemy units, dealing damage per second.

Whenever an enemy unit dies while afflicted by one or more of Warlock's abilities, a minor imp is summoned that lasts for 15 seconds and explodes on death. Imps will automatically seek out nearby units, favoring fatally bonded heroes, and will explode when reaching their prey.
notes: Minor imps have 50 / 130 / 210 / 290 / 370 health and explode for 25 / 70 / 115 / 160 / 205 damage in a 400 radius.
Minor imps do not explode if killed by enemy heroes.
language.shardDescription: Increases the power of all imps summoned by Warlock.

description: Grants Warlock the item Black Grimoire, which can be consumed to gain experience for each kill Warlock participated in. Starts with 1 charge.
Queen of Pain has bonus Spell Amplification but a percentage of her spell damage is reflected back to her.

All sources of Spell Lifesteal also apply to Pure Damage. Queen of Pain gains Spell Lifesteal that increases with proximity to her enemies. Lifesteal is at its maximum when the enemy is 300 units or closer to her and at its minimum when the enemy is 800 units or further from her.
Whenever an enemy within 1200 range deals spell damage to Queen of Pain, she returns 20.0% of the damage dealt.

language.displayName: +35 Attack Speed against Shadow Striked units

description: Enemy Attack Projectiles within 600 radius are slowed by 35 / 40 / 45 / 50%.

Creates a blister in spacetime, altering the movement, cast, projectile, cooldown, and turn rate speed of all units inside. Allies have increased speed and cooldown acceleration. Enemies have decreased speed, and have frozen ability and item cooldowns. Time Dilation does not tick down while inside.
language.lore: For the Acolytes of Clasz, stopping time is trivial, but manipulating the minutiae of its flow requires a mastery few have attained.

description: Curses units that Wraith King attacks, dealing a flat amount of damage and a percentage of the attack damage again after a delay. Vampiric Spirit's lifesteal applies to the curse damage and a unit cannot be cursed again for a short period of time.
language.lore: The eternal spite of every soul stolen by Ostarion bleeds into reality with each strike of his murderous blade.

description: Grants Wraith King Lifesteal. When slain Wraith King turns into a free pathing Wraith with Bonus Attack and Movement Speed for a short duration, delaying his death. Wraith King cannot reincarnate after being a Wraith.
notes: Credit for allies whose death was delayed will go to whoever struck the original killing blow.
Does not affect Reincarnate deaths.
Break only disables the passive lifesteal component.
Respawn timer is reduced by Wraith duration.
language.aghanimDescription: Turns Vampiric Spirit into an aura, allowing allied heroes to turn into wraiths when slain. Extends wraith duration.

description: Hero deaths empower your next Exorcism.
notes: Whenever a hero dies, Death Prophet traps their spirit for later use. When she casts Exorcism, each trapped hero spirit will replace a standard spirit. Hero spirits deal more damage than standard spirits.
When a hero is killed while Exorcism is active a standard spirit will be replaced with a hero spirit if possible and stored for the next cast of Exorcism.
Includes Death Prophet's own death.

description: Phantom Assassin focuses inward, increasing her ability to evade enemy attacks. Evasion improves with Phantom Assassin's levels.
Stacks diminishingly with other sources of Evasion.
Pugna can cast spells and use items while channeling.
notes: Includes items which are channeled.
Can still only channel a single spell at a time.

description: The life blood of the Dragon improves Dragon Knight's health regeneration and armor. Amount for both values is increased by 0.5 per level and is multiplied when in Dragon Form.
Dazzle's abilities apply Weave to both allies and enemies they affect, increasing allied armor and reducing enemy armor. Multiple instances of this effect stack.
language.lore: His ethereal journey into the Nothl realm has allowed Dazzle to mend together the powers of light and dark, creating shifting waves of enchantments.

description: Dazzle's overhealing is converted into a barrier. Weave is stronger on allies and amplifies incoming heals from Dazzle.
notes: Whenever Dazzle overheals himself or an ally, it grants that hero a physical damage barrier equal to the amount overhealed for 12 seconds. If the overhealed target already has a larger barrier its duration will be refreshed instead.

description: Clockwerk's outgoing damage increases by 0.25% per point of armor.
Leshrac restores mana equal to 25% of damage dealt by his attacks. Only grants mana when attacking enemies that have mana. 50% mana restoration penalty when attacking creeps.
Leshrac gains AoE per intelligence.
Nature's Prophet gains 3% bonus damage for each tree within 300 / 400 / 500 / 600 and a multiplier of that same bonus for each treant within 1200 distance of him.
Descend into a violent fury, gaining increased status and magic resistance. Applies a dispel and can be cast while disabled.
DISPEL TYPE: Strong Dispel
Dark Seer also gains Attack Speed from Intelligence.
notes: Dark Seer gains 1.0 Attack Speed from each point of Intelligence.

description: Dark Seer moves faster when near other heroes.
notes: Dark Seer gains 7% of the movement speed of heroes within 1200 radius. Base movement speed reduced.

description: Dark Seer's Intelligence cannot be lower than the average of his Strength and Agility.
notes: If the average between his Strength and Agility is higher, he gains Bonus Intelligence to match them.

description:
Clinkz summons a Skeleton Archer when he dies. Skeleton Archers are immobile and die within multiple attacks from a hero. Skeleton Archers deal a percentage of Clinkz' damage, and deal less damage to buildings. Attack range is equal to Clinkz' attack range.

Some of Clinkz' other abilities can also summon Skeleton Archers.
language.aghanimDescription: Increases Skeleton Archer health.

description: Ability damage done to enemies by Omniknight heals him over time.
Huskar does not have mana. Mana costs of items are converted into health costs.
notes: Huskar's Health Costs are Magical Damage and can be reduced by Magic Resist.

description: During the night, Night Stalker's health regeneration is increased by 20%, and during the day it is decreased by 20%.
The game now starts at night instead of day. Night is longer than day. Night Stalker starts with a bonus level of Hunter in the Night.

Whenever Broodmother kills a unit, she and all units under her control in a 600 radius receive a buff that heals them for a percentage of the victims health every 0.5 seconds. Healing from creeps is reduced by 40%.

Hurls a deadly shuriken at an enemy unit, dealing damage and slowing the target's Movement Speed by 100% for 0.35s. The shuriken will bounce to any Tracked units who are within a 1200 radius of each other.
language.lore: While the shuriken may be small, Gondar's precise aim can cause critical damage.
language.aghanimDescription: Increases cast range and applies Jinada on hit.

description: Bounty Hunter steals gold when targeting enemy heroes with his abilities or items.
notes: Reapplying Track does not steal gold with Cutpurse.

description: When getting a kill or assist on an enemy that has a killing streak, Bounty Hunter receives 20% extra gold.

Jakiro chill his enemies with ice added to his attack, slowing movement for 4.0 seconds and increasing damage taken from Jakiro's attacks and abilities. This effect does not apply to buildings. Shares a cooldown with Liquid Fire.
language.lore: The right maw of Jakiro opens, punishing all with bitter frost.
language.shardDescription: Jakiro's Liquid Frost no longer shares a cooldown with Liquid Fire.

description: Jakiro's attacks launch an attack from each head, but deal less damage each.
Batrider's attacks apply a debuff that deals 20% of the attack damage every 1s for 2s.

Chen summons a convert to fight for him. The convert gains bonuses from Holy Persuasion and dies if Chen dies. Its maximum health is set to 220 + 80 per Chen Level.

The spell stays on cooldown while the convert is alive, but refreshes whenever Chen respawns. The Convert counts towards Holy Persuasion max unit count. The Convert's ability level increases with Chen's level of Holy Persuasion.
language.lore: Chen's true strength is knowing which forces to call upon in battle.

description: Spectre and her illusions are permanently phased.
Doom's attacks deal 25% bonus damage to heroes whose level is lower than Doom's level.
notes: Also applies to all attacks when Doom is at max level.

description: Doom can sell items for %bonus_item_sellback_percent%%% of their value, but his buyback costs are increased by %bonus_buyback_penalty%%%.
Ancient Apparition's abilities apply Death Rime Stacks on enemies. Death Rime slows enemies' movement speed and deals damage over time.
Ursa gains bonus damage equal to a percentage of his Current HP.
Debuffs inflicted by Ursa last longer.
The hero on your team whose level is lower than anybody else's on your team gains 50% more experience.
Gyrocopter can disassemble most items.
notes: Cannot disassemble Divine Rapier or Hand of Midas.
Gyrocopter can always sell recipes for full value.

description: Alchemist synthesizes additional gold from his enemies and bounty runes. With each kill, Alchemist earns base bonus gold and extra bonus gold. If Alchemist kills another unit which yields gold within the next 40 seconds, an additional instance of Extra Bonus Gold is added to the total. Additionally, causes bounty runes to yield more gold.
language.lore: While it is not a mountain, Razzil has mastered the conversion of smaller compounds to line his pockets.
language.aghanimDescription: Alchemist melts down Aghanim's Scepter to grant an allied hero all Aghanim's Scepter upgrades. Alchemist will gain bonus damage for each gifted Scepter.

description: When Invoker denies a lane creep, he gets 25% of the XP.
If Silencer kills an enemy hero, he permanently steals Intelligence.
notes: To permanently steal Intelligence, Silencer doesn't need to land the killing blow, as long as the enemy hero is killed within 925 range of Silencer or was debuffed by Silencer at the time of death.
language.shardDescription: Increases the Intelligence stolen per kill.

description: Outworld Destroyer gains an additional 2.5 mana per point of Intelligence.
Lycan and units he controls deal 2% extra damage to neutral creeps per hero level.
Shadow Demon creates illusions of heroes that die near him.
notes: Heroes killed by Shadow Demon spawn an illusion regardless of distance.
The illusion disappears when the enemy hero respawns or Shadow Demon dies.

description: Shadow Demon's Attacks apply a stacking 2.5% Amplify Damage debuff to the enemy for 8 seconds.
notes: Break disables the application of new stacks.
Break does not disable the effects of existing stacks.

description:
Summons a powerful Spirit Bear companion that can equip items.

If the bear moves 1100 distance away from the Lone Druid, it cannot attack. Lone Druid suffers 20.0% of his max health as backlash damage if the Spirit Bear dies.
Spirit Bear has the Return, Demolish and Entangling Claws abilities.
language.lore: Sylla's lifelong companion is symbiotic with his spirit and heart, coming to aid him in any time of need.
notes: Most spells interact with the Spirit Bear in the same way as they do with heroes.
Spirit Bear has 0 base attributes and does not gain them with level. Attributes from buffs or items fully affect the bear as they would for Universal heroes.
Spirit Bear cannot gain experience. Spirit Bear health and damage increase by 90 and 5 respectively with Lone Druid's level.
Spirit Bear has its own Aghanim's Scepter and Shard upgrades.

description: Channels for 3 seconds and then teleports the Spirit Bear back to the Lone Druid.
language.aghanimDescription: Allows Spirit Bear to attack at any range from Lone Druid, and to survive if Lone Druid dies.

description: Attacks have a chance to cause roots to burst from the ground, immobilizing the attacked enemy unit, and dealing damage per second.
notes: Entangled units can't use Blink abilities, and are revealed if they are invisible.

description: Grabs the Target Ally, Enemy or Rune, and uncontrollably drags them towards Lone Druid for the duration. Enemies receive damage every 0.5s. When dragging a unit, they are Rooted.
Increases the power of the Spirit Bear, causing it to deal more damage to buildings and have additional magic resistance.
All Chaos Knight Illusions are Strong Illusions and take less damage when near him.
notes: All illusions created by Chaos Knight or of Chaos Knight are Strong Illusions. Chaos Knight's Illusions within 1200 radius have 20% damage reduction.
Also applies to Aghanim's Scepter Phantasm Illusions.
Strong Illusions are not instantly killed by spells.
Break disables the passive Damage Reduction aura.

description: Whenever illusions of Chaos Knight are created, there is a 50% chance that an additional 1 extra illusion will spawn.
All Meepos can use the item in the neutral item slot.
notes: Most items except for Consumables, Hand of Midas, and Divine Rapier can be equipped in the neutral item slot.
Using the item on one Meepo puts it on cooldown for all other Meepos for 50% of the regular cooldown.
Certain passive abilities and effects on items have reduced or no effectiveness.

description: Has an extra choice of neutral item to select from.
When Undying dies he will instantly respawn in the fountain. Begins the game on cooldown. Cannot be refreshed.
language.lore: Only when the Dirge of the Dead God ceases will this soldier's march finally end.

description: Each 1 Spell Amplification also increases Rubick's attack damage by 0.75% and Magic Resistance by 0.75%.
After a short formation time, creates a wall out of kinetic energy that enemies cannot pass.
language.lore: For a brief moment, it's as if the wind itself had turned solid.

description: Whenever Disruptor takes more than 250 damage from any source within 400 radius, all nearby enemies within are pushed back up to a 400 unit distance.
language.lore: Safe harbor found inside the storm.
notes: After 7s, the damage counter is reset.

description: Nyx Assassin can detect heroes within 400 units of himself.
Lasts for {s:bonus_break_duration} seconds.
Naga Siren and all of her images hit nearby units with a damaging wave of water that caps their max movement speed.
language.lore: There's no use trying to run through deep water.
notes: Casting Deluge doesn't interrupt channeling.

description: Naga Siren gets 8% evasion per other Naga Siren within 900 radius.
Weakens an enemy's magical resistance, and applies a slow that increases in strength the more the target moves.
language.lore: Even a glimpse of the First Light is enough to rob enemies of their senses.
language.shardDescription: Grants 0 charges.

description: Io's Team takes 1s less to take watchers, and their watchers have 300 bonus vision.
When not visible to the enemy team, Slark gains bonus movement speed and health regeneration.
notes: If Slark is damaged by a neutral unit, the passive movement and health regeneration bonuses are lost for 2.0 seconds.

description: Centaur Warrunner gains Movement Speed based on his Strength.
notes: Centaur Warrunner gains 30% of his strength as bonus movement speed. Max movement speed for Centaur is increased to 575.
This Movement speed bonus does not stack with bonuses from boots.

description: Permanently gain 30 max health every 120.0s.
Magnus has slow resistance and suffers less knockback from enemy's abilities and items.

Launches a second independent Chakram that follows a curved path and returns to Timbersaw, damaging and slowing enemies it passes through. Enemies caught in the saw blade will move more slowly for every 5% of health missing.
language.lore: A happy little accident in the lab turned wild new weapon in the forest.

description: Whenever Timbersaw destroys a tree, he gains 4 / 6 / 8 / 10 mana.

Tusk reaches out to tag an allied unit, pulling them closer. Once tagged, both Tusk and his tagged ally gain movement speed and attack damage. Can be put on alt-cast to only pull Tusk towards his ally with 50% reduced cast range.
language.lore: The only thing better than finding a good drinking buddy is finding an equally good enemy the two of you can punch.
notes: Doesn't pull Tusk or targeted ally if they are within 250 range of each other.
Cannot be used during Snowball.

description: Passively slows the attack speed of all enemies within 350 radius.
Every time Skywrath Mage deals magic damage to an enemy hero with an ability, he reduces all his ability cooldowns by 0.1s.
language.lore: To raise the ire of Skywrath is to invite retribution that strikes like a storm.

description: Skywrath Mage has 25 / 30 / 35 / 40% Spell Lifesteal.
Units dying nearby Abaddon lower his cooldowns.
notes: Every time a unit dies within 900 range of Abaddon, reduce all of his Cooldowns by 0.2 seconds if they are a creep or 6.0 seconds if they are a hero.

description: Elder Titan sends forth his Astral Spirit, damaging any units it passes through.  When the spirit rejoins the Titan, it grants bonus damage, armor, and movement speed for each unit it passed through.
The Astral Spirit possesses the Echo Stomp, Return Spirit, and Natural Order abilities.
language.lore: Like the four fundamentals, Elder Titan exists across all planes at once and can draw other aspects of himself to assist in times of need.
language.aghanimDescription: Causes Elder Titan to become debuff immune and gain 50% magic resistance for  seconds per affected enemy Hero when the spirit returns.

description: Elder Titan's Base Attack Speed is reduced but his Movement Speed also grants Attack Speed.

Call a Stone Remnant to the target location. Stone Remnants have no vision and are invulnerable, and can be used with Earth Spirit's abilities. Calling a Stone Remnant consumes a charge, which recharge over time. Gains additional charges every 5 hero levels.
language.lore: Earth Spirit calls forth a remnant of his stone army, long buried with him in the dark embrace of the Earth.

description: Illusions under Terrorblade's control that are within range receive a damage bonus. Illusions outside of the range receive a damage penalty.
Phoenix deals 4.5% of his missing health as magic damage to all enemies in a 400 radius every second.
Phoenix ability debuffs apply a stackable 2% Miss chance per second. Lasts 4 seconds.
Spell amplification increased by 1.0% per hero level.
Heal amplification increased by 0.75% per hero level.
Oracle will predict and announce to allies, where the next power rune will spawn (top or bottom).
Techies gains 1 attack range and attack projectile speed for each point of attack speed.
Techies stack all previously selected Enchantments onto newly crafted Neutral Items.
notes: Only one Tier 5 Enchantment can be stacked after crafting your second Tier 5 Neutral Item.
Divine Regalia's Exalted loss of enchantment upon death only affects the most recently obtained Tier 5 enchantment.

description: When a Shrine of Wisdom grants experience to allies, Winter Wyvern shares the knowledge with her entire team, granting 20% of the experience to each of the 3 heroes that did not collect the initial bonus.
Winter Wyvern's heals also restore mana.
Winter Wyvern gains bonus damage when her attack range is over 400.
Upon activating any rune, gain the Regeneration Rune buff for 4.0s.
notes: Has 67% duration when activating a Bounty or Water rune.

description:
After teleporting through the Fiend's Gate, Underlord brings forth a Warrior or an Archer to aid him every 2s that last for the duration of the Fiend's Gate.

The Warrior burns mana every hit, and deals magical damage to whoever kills it. The Archer has a passive movement speed aura.
Deals damage to the unit that kills the Necronomicon Warrior.
Mana burned per hit, a portion of which is dealt as damage.
Increases movement of nearby units.
Random item and ability effects of enemies near Pangolier have a reduced chance to affect him.
notes: Applies to hero abilities and items.
Effect is a relative reduction in chance for effects to happen.

description: Whenever a skill makes Dark Willow become untargetable, she gains + 150% HP Regen and + 150% Mana Regen while in that state.
Adds an effect to Grimstroke's attacks that causes enemy heroes to leave a trail of ink behind them for 4.0s.
notes: Provides vision over affected heroes.

description: Mars gets more HP Regen the more he and his allies are outnumbered by enemy heroes in 700 radius.

After a short formation time, Mars summons an arena lined with the undead warriors of the Ash Legion, who block enemy attacks and movement. Enemy heroes near the inside edge of the arena will be attacked by spears, dealing damage and knocking them back.
language.lore: The long-dead members of the Ash Legion, assembled from the finest warriors to ever test the might of Mars, still revel in the thrill of combat, gladly beholden to the hand that fell them for as long as he so commands.

language.displayName: Arena Of Blood Grants Team +180 HP Regen

description: Void Spirit gains a physical damage barrier when dealing magic damage to enemy heroes.
Void Spirit gains 25% more HP regen from Strength, armor from Agility, and mana regen and magic resistance from Intelligence.
Snapfire deals 30% more damage with her auto attacks, but has a 25 chance of a glancing shot, dealing 60% damage.
notes: Ricochet II attacks cannot miss.

description: Tosses a boomerang in an arc. Upon contact, it returns to Hoodwink.  The boomerang will deal damage as it passes through or hits enemies, and apply a debuff that causes affected enemies to be slowed and be more vulnerable to spell damage.
language.lore: A precious last vestige of Hoodwink's childhood, converted into deadly distraction.

description: Hoodwink has a chance to redirect enemy attacks to a nearby tree.
notes: Trees that take a redirected attack are destroyed.

description: Whenever the sun comes out, Dawnbreaker gains bonus base damage and vision that decreases throughout the course of the day.
Passively grants Marci lifesteal and bonus attack damage.

Marci protects an allied hero. For 6.0s, the ally also gains 75 of lifesteal and attack damage bonus. Whenever the ally attacks or is attacked by an enemy, Marci counter-attacks that target if they are within her attack range plus 125.
language.lore: Marci learned at a young age that the best asset in a scrap is a steady companion.
notes: Marci cannot cast Bodyguard on herself.
Lifesteal effectiveness gets a 40% penalty against creeps.
Marci's counter-attack has a 0.45s cooldown.

description:
Marci whistles to instantly summon her courier to her.

Passively grants all allied couriers 3 bonus levels and 1 bonus health.
language.lore: Professional courtesy, from one courier to another.
notes: Special Delivery whistle has a cast point of 1.0 second.

language.displayName: Unleash Duration Extended By 6s On Kill

description: Primal Beast deals 40% more damage to buildings.

Muerta places a sacred altar at the targeted location that increases her attack speed when she is near it.

When respawning, Muerta will gain the benefits of Pierce The Veil's corporeal form for 50% of the duration and respawn at the Ofrenda.

Muerta can select the Ofrenda and force it to destroy itself. Only one Ofrenda can exist at a time.
Muerta can always attack when she is ethereal. Muerta can always attack ethereal targets. When attacking ethereal targets, all of her attack damage is dealt as magical damage.
Destroy this Ofrenda, ensuring that Muerta will respawn in the fountain.

language.displayName: +3.0% Max HP Regen while inside The Calling
description: Only applies to Muerta.
Affects both shots.

language.displayName: +150% Crit On Targets Affected By Spells
description: Only applies to Lina's attacks. Lasts {s:bonus_target_crit_debuff_duration}s.
Attacks slow enemies based on how much mana they are missing. Min slow at 50% mana, up to max slow at 0% mana. No effect if enemy is above 50% mana.
notes: Full effect if caused by illusions.

description: When Earthshaker dies, a 75 radius fissure is created where he died. This fissure blocks movement and allows Earthshaker to continue to gain experience around it. It remains until Earthshaker respawns.
Items, abilities, and auras that grant bonus damage instead grant base damage.

Damage from enemy heroes, buildings, or Roshan that would reduce Kunkka below a threshold causes him to douse himself with The Admiral's Rum, receiving bonus movement speed and a delayed reaction to incoming damage.
language.lore: Deleterious to landlubbers, no one holds their rum like a sailor.
notes: Stacks additively with other sources of Admiral's Rum

description: Every 175 damage Lina does to an enemy hero causes them to overheat, doing damage to their nearby allies. This effect can trigger multiple times off a single instance of damage. Overheated illusions do less damage.
Beastmaster's melee hero Damage Block Chance is increased from 50% to 100% versus non-hero units and non-building units.
Venomancer's attacks deal extra damage based on how many debuffs the attack target has. Extra damage is dealt as magical damage. Only counts debuffs from Venomancer or his Plague Wards.
notes: Break only disables the bonus damage for Venomancer's attacks.
language.aghanimDescription: Increases base damage per debuff.

description: Death Prophet delays a percentage of incoming damage, taking the damage in even intervals over a short duration.
notes: Delayed damage matches the damage type of the initial damage and bypasses armor, magic resistance, and damage block.

description: Templar Assassin and her teammates can see Roshan's respawn timer.
Viper's attacks deal an additional instance of physical damage per missing health percentage of the target hero, equal to 0.15 + 0.05 per Viper's level.
Creates 4 glaives that rotate 250 radius around Luna. Any enemy unit that collides with a glaive will take a percentage of Luna's Attack Damage.
language.lore: None may approach Selemene's chosen without favor from the goddess herself.
language.shardDescription: Increases collision damage. Glaives rotate 0 faster.

description: All neutral camps deal more damage to enemy heroes. Damage increase is 10% + 4% per Enchantress's hero level.
notes: Does not affect converted neutrals, Tormentor, or Roshan.

description: Every time Weaver casts an ability, he gains 50 attack range for 7.0s. This effect stacks independently.
notes: Break disables the gaining of new stacks.
Break does not disable the bonuses from existing stacks.

description: The wolf bites down on an enemy's hamstring, rooting them for a short duration. After the bite, the next 4 attacks from units controlled by Lycan deal bonus damage.
The wolf gains a short burst of energy, gaining phased movement, evasion, hasted movement speed, and attack speed.
Brewmaster gains 25 bonus attack damage for 15s when he comes out of Primal Split and for 45s when he respawns.
Lone Druid's Spirit Bear receives a copy of his Neutral Item that has an independent cooldown.
Lone Druid can only use the first 3 items in his inventory. These items' passive bonuses are more powerful. Other item slots do not provide any bonuses. Neutral slot is unaffected.
notes: The following attributes can be increased:
* Intelligence, Strength and Agility
* Health, Mana and Evasion
* Attack Speed and Bonus Damage
* Health and Mana Regen

description:
Visage's ability cooldown durations are accelerated as long as he's not taking damage.

Grants a stack every 2.0s that Visage does not take damage. Each stack grants 2.0% cooldown acceleration with a max of 8 stacks. Stacks fade after 2s upon taking any damage.
notes: Break disables the gaining of new stacks.
Break does not disable the bonuses from existing stacks.
Affects Visage's ability cooldown durations, including spells already on cooldown.

description: Medusa fires arrows in a line that land in 3 groups, with each grouping larger than the previous. Enemies struck by a volley of arrows take an initial burst of damage and then are rooted, cannot turn, are revealed to the enemy, and take damage per second.
language.lore: The best predators don't even need to pounce.

description: Every 6 attacks, Medusa applies poison to her arrow that briefly reduces movement speed and attack speed.
notes: Poisoned attack is considered an on-hit effect for Split Shot.

description: Troll Warlord swaps from using ranged to melee attacks. Melee attacks have decreased base attack time.
language.lore: Jah'rakal has a variety of ways to get under an enemy's skin.

description: Bristleback has 10% damage and debuff duration amp against enemy heroes that are behind him.
Damaging enemies applies the Withering Mist debuff for 5.0s. Affected enemies have their Health Restoration reduced by 35% if they are below 40.0 HP.
Allied creeps and buildings affected by Glyph of Fortification or Roshan's Banner deal 100% bonus damage.
Attacking an enemy hero that is equal or higher level than you increases your Health Restoration by 30 / 40 / 50 / 60% for 4.0s.
Ember Spirit is continuously burning, dealing damage per second to all nearby enemies at all times.
notes: Break does not disable Immolation for Fire Remnants when upgraded with Aghanim's Shard.
language.shardDescription: Grants Fire Remnants the current level of Immolation, and increases the damage and radius.

language.displayName: Flux Silences when target is alone

description: After an allied hero Teleports, they temporarily gain Damage Reduction and Movement Speed. Allies receive 2x bonuses if teleporting via Fiend's Gate.

language.displayName: +1s Impalement Arts Bleed and Slow Duration

description: Enemies killed with Enchant Totem or Earthshaker's other abilities are sent flying, dealing damage to enemies they hit.

Kez switches between his Kazurai Katana and Shodo Sai.

He gains different attack capabilities and abilities based on the weapon equipped. The abilities level up together, and when an ability is used, the associated alternate weapon ability also goes on cooldown.

Switch Discipline cooldown decreases by 0.2s per Hero level.
language.lore: As former followers of the Shodo, the leaders of the Kazurai Order can switch effortlessly between twin disciplines of martial mastery over sai and blade.
language.aghanimDescription:
Casting a weapon ability that would set its alternate weapon ability on cooldown does not do so if it's the first one used within 3 seconds after casting Switch Discipline.

Casting any weapon ability refreshes the cooldown of Switch Discipline.

description: Kez slashes forward in a line with his Katana, attacking enemies in an area and applying a brief slow. After a short delay, the area is attacked again. Heroes take bonus damage.
language.lore: Kez and his master Kraw have worked tirelessly to train the Kazurai new ways to keep the flyers off balance by improving upon ancient techniques.
notes: Destroys trees. Doesn't apply Cleave.
