description: Kez swings on a grappling hook towards the target unit or tree.  When the grappling hook collides with the target, that unit has slowed movement speed. Upon reaching the enemy target, Kez lands an attack on them.
language.lore: The Kazurai have the speed and reach to drag even the highest flyers from the skies.

description:
Katana attacks and abilities apply a stacking damage over time to enemies that deals a percentage of the original attack's damage as additional damage over time.

Kez may activate the ability to impale the target with his attack, preventing them from moving or turning. The target's Katana debuff bursts, causing some of the stacks to deal damage instantly.
language.lore: To fight back against the reach of Imperia and her Queensguard, the Kazurai had to become skilled in the ways of attrition.
language.shardDescription: Kez lifesteals 0 from the impale.  If the impale comes from behind the target, the target is stunned and the full stack amount bursts.

description:
Kez enters into an uncontrollable state for %AbilityCastPoint% second, becoming invulnerable for 0.2s and receiving a basic dispel, remaining immune to magic damage for the remainder of the cast time and the duration of the slashes.

If the cast completes successfully, Kez performs a series of deadly radial slashes around him that deal damage based on the max health of the target and heal Kez for a percentage of all damage dealt.
language.lore: Unleash the inner fury of the Flightless to feast on the essence of your foes.
notes: Slash Lifesteal is reduced to 20% when slashing a creep or an illusion.

description: Kez gains the ability to rush towards enemy targets to deliver echoing secondary attacks.  While in this state, Kez has phased collision, slow resistance, and an attack rate that is less affected by attack speed.
language.lore: An ancient Shodo technique used to hunt faster aerial foes, stealing the advantage and delivering multiple attacks within a single flap of their prey's panicking wings.

description: Kez throws a Sai at the target unit, applying a fixed damage attack and silence.
language.lore: The Shodo learned to rely upon distance and disorientation to survive against much stronger opposition.
notes: The fixed damage attack has True Strike.

description:
Kez's attacks and abilities with the Sai have a chance to Mark enemies. The next attack or ability damage from Kez will stun the enemy and deal a critical strike, consuming the buff.

Kez may activate the ability to disarm himself, lock his facing, and parry attacks and attack effects from the targeted direction for 2.0 seconds. If an attack is parried from an enemy Hero in this way, that Hero is stunned and gains a stronger Mark that stuns for longer and deals 4% * Target Hero Level bonus critical strike.

The sub-ability may be used to cancel the blocking early.
language.lore: The Shodo may have lost their way, but Kez and the Kazurai can still use Shodo knowledge for the good of the people.

description: Stop blocking physical attacks.

Kez releases a wave of smoke that applies his Mark to nearby enemies, briefly reducing their vision. Kez receives a basic dispel and gains bonus movement speed and invisibility until he attacks or casts a spell.
language.lore: Eying either threat or opportunity, Shodo masters slip instantly into shadow to reset the terms of any engagement in their own favor.

description: After death, the Tormentor leaves behind a verdant dale, increasing the regeneration of everyone nearby by 2% of their Max Health.
Whenever the Frog is in water, it increases all allied movement speed and outgoing damage.
Sends out a slew of tentacles in the target direction, stunning and damaging enemies.
Sends out a cone-shaped slew of tentacles in the target direction, stunning and damaging enemies.
Sends out a slew of tentacles in all directions, stunning and damaging enemies.
Creates a barrier bubble that protects the target from magic damage for 10s.
Creates a barrier bubble that protects the target from magic damage for 10s. After it expires, it heals the target for 50% of the absorb amount.
Creates a barrier bubble that protects the target from magic damage for 10s. After it expires, it heals the target and all allies in a 675 AoE for 50% of the absorb amount.

language.displayName: +30 Attack Speed for Enchantress and her units

description: Your next attack on an enemy hero transforms them into a chicken for 1s.
language.lore: Even a brief moment as a chicken is long enough to make most would-be aggressors rethink their mark.
notes: Talents that affect Hex also affects enemies transformed by Chicken Fingers.

description: Dazzle departs his body, traveling through the Nothl Realm as an invulnerable spirit that can cast spells, attack, and use items, leaving his body behind in the world with a visible tether. While active, Dazzle's basic abilities are empowered: Poison Touch hexes enemies, Shallow Grave heals upon expiration, and Shadow Wave has a shorter cooldown. The effect can be ended early, and Dazzle returns to the body at the end.
language.lore: The allure of the Nothl Realm is intoxicating, but Dazzle never forgets his purpose for being there.
notes: When Dazzle's spirit is further than 1600 units from the body, the tether will begin to pull him back. The strength of the pull increases with distance.
Dazzle's Soul cannot attack buildings.
language.shardDescription: Nothl Projection can be cast while Dazzle is disabled. Increases healing done while in the Nothl Realm.

description: Ends Dazzle's sojourn in the Nothl Realm and returns his spirit to his body.
When Dark Seer levels up, he restores a percentage of his max health and mana. Restore percentage is equal to 10.0% + 1.5% per hero level.
Destroy the Ice Path, dealing damage and stunning enemies.

Whenever Chaos Knight crafts a Neutral Item, 2 of his Artifact options will be from the next tier and 2 will be from the current tier. He is not guaranteed to be able to keep an Artifact between tiers. When crafting at the highest tier, all options are for that tier.
Keeper of the Light cannot go below 75 mana.
Medusa's movement speed is fixed at 310 ( 465 during Stone Gaze). Medusa is unslowable and does not benefit from movement speed increases.
notes: Medusa can still benefit from movement speed bonuses from stream currents.

language.displayName: Exposure Therapy Heals for 10 HP Per Tree Destroyed

description: Also Grants True Sight. Does Not Reveal Wards.

language.displayName: Celestial Hammer emits Solar Guardian aura
description: {s:bonus_hammer_solar_guardian_radius} AoE. Hammer stationary duration increased by {s:bonus_pause_duration}. Damaging and Healing is {s:bonus_hammer_solar_guardian_effectiveness_pct}% of Solar Guardian's.
Passively grants a regenerating All Damage Barrier. Armor can not go below 0.
Reflects damage received evenly to the attacker and all other heroes within 1200 radius
CHANNELED - Teleport to a target friendly structure. Level 2 allows teleporting to friendly units and Level 3 to friendly heroes.
language.lore: As Boush likes to say, 'There is nothing the arcane can accomplish that the curious mind cannot reproduce given time. And proper funding, of course.'

description: Damage done by direct attacks.
Improves all attributes per point spent
Burns an opponent's mana on each attack and deals damage equal to a percentage of the mana burnt.
language.lore: A modified technique of the Turstarkuri monks' peaceful ways is to turn magical energies on their owner.
notes: Mana Break has 50% effect if caused by illusions.

description: Short distance teleportation that allows Anti-Mage to move in and out of combat.
language.lore: In his encounter with the Dead Gods, Anti-Mage learned the value of being elusive.
notes: You can use Blink to dodge incoming projectiles.
language.aghanimDescription: After casting Blink, your next Mana Break within 0s burns an additional 0.0 max mana and prevents the target from regenerating or gaining mana for a short duration. This debuff is undispellable. Blink Cooldown reduced by %bonus_AbilityCooldown%s.

description: For each point of mana missing by the target unit, damage is dealt to it and surrounding enemies.  The main target is also mini-stunned.
language.lore: After bringing enemies to their knees, Anti-Mage punishes them for their use of the arcane arts.
notes: Damage is calculated based on the primary target's mana, but applied to all enemies within the area of effect.
Break disables Mana Thirst vision and attack bonuses.

description: Axe taunts nearby enemy units, forcing them to attack him while he gains bonus armor during the duration.
language.lore: Mogul Khan's warcry taunts opponents into engaging in an unconquerable battle with the Axe.
language.shardDescription: Berserker's Call applies Battle Hunger to affected units.

description: Enrages an enemy unit, causing it to take damage over time until it kills another unit or the duration ends. The damage is increased by a factor of Axe's armor. The enemy is also slowed as long as they are facing away from Axe.
language.lore: Ordinary heroes cannot withstand Mogul Khan's rage for battle, such that it injures them until it is satisfied.
notes: Destroying buildings will also remove the debuff.
language.shardDescription: Multiple instances of Battle Hunger can stack on a single target.

description: After a set number of attacks, Axe will perform a helix counter attack, dealing pure damage to all nearby enemies.
language.lore: Axe is the only reinforcement this army needs.
notes: Illusions' counters don't increase when they attack when you have a Scepter.
Counter Helix triggers when the attack hits.
language.aghanimDescription: Counter Helix now applies a stacking debuff to enemies hit by it that causes them to deal less total attack damage to Axe. Counter Helix no longer has a cooldown and its counter advances when Axe attacks.

description: Axe spots a weakness and strikes, dealing pure damage. When an enemy hero is killed with Culling Blade, its cooldown is reset, and all nearby allied units gain bonus movement speed and armor.
language.lore: Mogul Khan is the embodiment of battle and fury, launching into a gruesome fatality against those who dare engage the Axe in combat.
notes: Culling Blade death cannot be prevented with other abilities like Shallow Grave.

description: Feasts on the vital energies of an enemy unit, healing Bane and dealing damage.
language.lore: Atropos finds no greater pleasure than to harvest the fear he creates.
language.shardDescription: Reduces cooldown by %bonus_AbilityCooldown%. Causes Brain Sap to become a  AoE spell. Secondary targets only heal for .

description: Deals damage every second and lowers the enemy's total attack damage and cast range.
language.lore: Each tendril of fear that Atropos weaves increases the vulnerability of his victims to arcane and unknown arts.

description: CHANNELED - Grips an enemy unit, disabling it and causing heavy damage over time, while stealing mana every 0.5 seconds based on the unit's maximum mana.
language.lore: Victims of Atropos are frequently torn apart by vivid conjurations of their own nightmares.
language.aghanimDescription: Reduces Fiend's Grip cooldown by %bonus_AbilityCooldown%. Fiend's Grip now creates two uncontrollable illusions that are also channeling Fiend's Grip on the target. Illusions take  incoming damage and immediately die if they are interrupted. Damage does not stack.

description: Puts the target enemy or friendly Hero to sleep. Sleeping units are awakened when damaged. If the target was directly attacked, the Nightmare passes to the attacking unit. Bane can attack and damage Nightmared targets freely.
language.lore: A stolen prowess from the goddess Nyctasha is to put his prey into forever sleep.
notes: In the first second of Nightmare, the unit is invulnerable.
Bane can wake himself from Nightmare.
On cast, replaced with Nightmare End: Ends all ongoing Nightmares on any affected units.

description: Drives Bloodseeker or an allied hero into a bloodthirsty rage which causes them to attack faster and deal more spell damage at the cost of a percentage of their health per second. Provides half attack speed to allied heroes.
language.lore: Strygwyr shares his animalistic thirst for bloodshed.
notes: Damage dealt to Bloodseeker or allies is non-lethal and can never kill a hero.
language.aghanimDescription: Bloodseeker's Bloodrage attacks now deal 0 of the target's max health as <font color=\"#d8ae53\">Pure</font> damage.

description: Bloodseeker baptizes an area in sacred blood. After 2.9 seconds the ritual completes, causing any enemies caught in the area to take damage and become silenced.
language.lore: The Flayed Twins are ever willing to aid those who spill blood upon the field of battle.
notes: Total time is a 2.6 second delay plus a 0.3 second cast time.

description: Bloodseeker is invigorated by the wounds of his enemies, gaining bonus movement speed when an enemy hero's health falls below 100%, with the bonuses increasing as their health falls further. If an enemy hero's health falls below 25%, he will also gain vision and True Sight of that hero. Bonuses stack per hero. Unlocks max movement speed for Bloodseeker.
language.lore: Strygwyr becomes frenzied when blood is spilled.
notes: Not triggered by Illusions.
Max movement speed bonus occurs when an enemy's health is at or below 25%.
Effects linger for 4.0 seconds if a target dies.

description: Causes an enemy unit's skin to rupture, dealing initial damage based on its current health. If the unit moves, it takes damage based on the distance moved.
language.lore: When the Bloodseeker hunts you, injuries become fatalities.

description: Adds a freezing effect to Drow's attacks, slowing enemy movement and dealing bonus damage. Slow lasts 1.5 seconds.
language.lore: Ice-encased arrows pierce the silence, chilling their victims to the core.
notes: The slow duration is refreshed on successive casts.
language.aghanimDescription: Frost Arrows now apply a Hypothermia stack to enemies, increasing damage from Frost Arrows and reducing their regeneration per stack. If an enemy dies with Hypothermia stacks, they burst and deal damage per stack and slow in an area around it.

description: Grants Drow bonus agility based on Drow's current agility and level. Nearby ranged heroes received %trueshot_agi_bonus_allies_pct%%% of the bonus agility.
language.lore: Traxex' time spent alone in the forests of her Drow home has allowed her to teach other archers how to improve their bow skills.

description: Drow's experiences in battle grant her a chance to launch arrows with incredible accuracy and effectiveness. Pierces through the enemy's defenses, ignoring their base armor. This ability is disabled if there is an enemy hero within 400 range.
language.lore: The Drow Ranger is the epitome of archery prowess.
notes: Marksmanship procs have true strike.

description: Slams the ground with a mighty totem, creating an impassable ridge of stone while stunning and damaging enemy units along its line.
language.lore: The Nishian totem splits the world to its core with tectonic force.
notes: Creeps will wait for Fissure to disappear. They will not attempt to walk around it.
Fissure is not blocked by Linken's Sphere.
language.shardDescription: Reduces Fissure cooldown and allows Earthshaker to walk on it. When he casts any ability, an Aftershock is released along its path that stuns for a shortened duration.

description: Empowers Earthshaker's totem, causing it to deal extra damage and have 100 bonus attack range on the next attack.
language.lore: Raigor's gorilla strength can destroy mountains.
notes: Bonus damage is based on base damage and that given by primary attribute.
language.aghanimDescription: Enchant Totem becomes a ground target ability, causing Earthshaker to jump in the air and land at the target spot, casting Enchant Totem there.  Self-casting the ability will behave in the original form, without jumping. Grants Enchant Totem a cleaving attack.

description: Causes the earth to shake underfoot, adding additional damage and stuns to nearby enemy units when Earthshaker casts his abilities.
language.lore: The earth trembles beneath the mighty footsteps of Raigor.
notes: Using items does not trigger Aftershock.

description: Shockwaves travel through the ground, damaging enemy units.  Each enemy hit causes an echo to damage nearby units. Real heroes cause two echoes.
language.lore: Tectonic plates crack, mountains fold, and foes are crushed by the Echo Slam.

description: Gives Juggernaut a chance to deal critical damage on each attack.
language.lore: The last remnant of his heritage's commitment to bladework, Yurnero ensures that the style is remembered.

description: Causes a bladestorm of destructive force around Juggernaut, rendering him debuff immune, increasing his magic resistance by 80%, and dealing damage every 0.2s to nearby enemy units. Applies a strong dispel at the end of the spin.
language.lore: Yurnero's renowned katana techniques are feared by warriors and sorcerors alike.
notes: You can use items during Blade Fury.
Juggernaut can still perform attacks while in Blade Fury. However, only units that are not affected by Blade Fury, such as wards or structures, will take damage from these attacks.
language.shardDescription: Increases Blade Fury radius, and slows enemies by %bonus_movement_slow%.

description: Summons a Healing Ward which heals all nearby allied units, based on their max health. The Healing Ward moves at 325 movement speed after being summoned. Lasts 25.0 seconds.
language.lore: Of the rituals learned at the Isle of Masks, tending wounds with a bit of voodoo magic has proven to be quite useful.
notes: The Healing Ward can be controlled.
Multiple Healing Wards do not stack.

description: Juggernaut leaps towards the target enemy units, and then slashes the target and other nearby enemy units at an increased attack rate. Juggernaut is invulnerable for the duration.
DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
language.lore: 'The fruits of discipline; with practice comes strength.'
notes: You can use items during Omnislash.

description: Summons a rising torrent that, after a short delay, hurls enemy units into the sky, stunning, dealing damage and slowing movement speed.
language.lore: An ancestral rush of water explodes from the center of the world, called upon by the Admiral.
notes: The initial bubble effect is only visible to allies and provides vision in fog of war.
Units tossed in the air will be stunned and still able to be attacked.

description: Kunkka's legendary sword grants increased damage and cleaves a large area of effect in front of him for a single strike.
language.lore: A lost Claddish soul inhabits Kunkka's trusty Tidebringer, empowering it to destroy demons of the Cataract.

description: Targets a friendly or enemy Hero, marks their position with an X, and returns them to it after several seconds.  Kunkka can trigger the return at any time during the duration. Lasts twice as long on allied heroes.
language.lore: The Admiral's set of arcane abilities includes some that can be used for battle as well as entertainment.
notes: Interrupts channeling spells.

description: Returns the marked hero to the X.

Summons a ghostly ship that sails through the battle before smashing apart, damaging and stunning all enemies caught near the wreckage. Allied heroes touched by the Ghostship are given a strong swig of The Admiral's Rum, receiving bonus movement speed and a delayed reaction to incoming damage.
language.lore: The final ship of the Claddish Navy is nothing but a phantom, but it is all too real to the enemies of the Admiral.
notes: Damage dealt after Rum wears off is non-lethal and can never kill a hero.
Actual area of effect of ship's collision is larger than the boat itself.
The boat has a movement speed of 650.
language.aghanimDescription: Ghostship creates a fleet of  ships at the target point on a  second interval. Each ship now also fires 3 waves of cannonballs from the port and starboard side that deal  of Ghostship's damage as they pass through enemies.

description: Lina channels the breath of a dragon, sending out a wave of fire that scorches every enemy in its path.
language.lore: In the scorched barren of Misrule, Lina learned to manipulate the fiery breath of the Desert Wyrm as a form of entertainment.
notes: Dragon Slave can hit units up to 1225 units away.
Does not trigger spell block or spell reflect.

description: Summons a column of flames that damages and stuns enemies.
language.lore: Lina's essence allows her to focus the sun's energies, causing air to combust at will.
notes: Light Strike Array will destroy trees in its area of effect.

description: Grants bonus attack and movement speed each time Lina hits an enemy with a spell. Stacks with itself. Lasts 18 seconds.
language.lore: Dancing flames embody Lina's playful nature, bringing out her true blazing self.
notes: Duration refreshes each time an opponent is hit with a spell.
Using items does not trigger Fiery Soul.

description: Fires off a bolt of lightning at a single enemy unit, dealing massive damage.
language.lore: The air around Lina becomes so intensely torrid that it scorches a foe that comes too close with white-hot lightning.
notes: Laguna Blade has a 0.25 delay before the damage is applied after the spell is cast, allowing certain abilities to avoid the damage.
language.shardDescription: 0 of the damage dealt is converted to an all damage barrier for Lina. Barrier lasts for 0s.

description: Rock spikes burst from the earth along a straight path. Enemy units are hurled into the air, then are stunned and take damage when they fall.
language.lore: The Demon Witch exercises his demonic covenant, opening a fissure from hell.
notes: The spikes move at 2800 units per second.
Does not trigger spell block or spell reflect.

description: Transforms an enemy unit into a harmless beast, with all special abilities disabled.
language.lore: Lion is compelled to share his transfiguration, twisting the essence of those who oppose him.
notes: Instantly destroys illusions.
The target will have a base movement speed of 120, but buffs granting maximum movement speed won't be disabled.

description:
CHANNELED - Channels magical energy, taking mana and slowing enemies over time. If the enemy has no mana remaining, the slow is increased by 15%.

Can target allies to give them mana and movement speed at a 50% rate.
language.lore: Lesser magi are nothing more than a source of magical restoration for the Demon Witch.
notes: Prevents heroes from going invisible.
language.shardDescription: Causes Mana Drain to affect up to  additional enemies and increases break distance. Lion becomes Debuff Immune with  magic resistance while channeling.

description: Rips at an enemy unit, trying to turn it inside-out. Deals massive damage and grows stronger with each life it consumes.
language.lore: Lion's disfigured hand is also the source of his greatest power, capable of flooding victims with malefic force.
notes: Finger of Death has a 0.25 delay before the damage is applied after the spell is cast, allowing certain abilities to avoid the damage.
Finger of Death only gains damage if the enemy hero dies within 3 seconds of being affected by Finger of Death.
language.aghanimDescription: Increases damage. Decreases cooldown. Finger of Death hits all units in a small area.

description: Fires a long-range arrow with deadly precision, which stuns and damages the first enemy unit it strikes. The stun duration ranges from 0.01 to 2.6 / 3.4 / 4.2 / 5.0 seconds, with bonus damage up to 150 / 160 / 170 / 180 added, based on the distance the arrow travels to its target. Instantly kills the first non-ancient creep it hits.
language.lore: Lunar energies make the Princess of the Moon's arrows more deadly than most.
notes: For every 150 distance the arrow travels, the stun duration upon impact increases by 0.5 seconds, and the bonus damage added increases by 14.
Sacred Arrow can hit invisible units.
Starstruck does not apply to the second Starstorm from Aghanim's Scepter.
language.aghanimDescription: Causes Sacred Arrow to release a Starstorm on enemies along the travel path of the primary arrow, releasing a second Starstorm that deals less damage to the impacted unit.

description: Turns Mirana and all allied heroes invisible and grants bonus movement speed. Mirana gains bonus outgoing damage during the duration. If a hero is revealed, invisibility will restore after the fade delay as long as Moonlight Shadow's duration has not expired.
language.lore: Her tenure with Selemene allows Mirana to eclipse the ground, wrapping her allies in a cloak of shadows.
notes: Units affected will not auto attack enemies.

description: Mirana leaps forward into battle, empowering herself with a ferocious roar that grants bonus attack and movement speed. Speed bonus lasts 5 seconds.
language.lore: None can fail to recognize Mirana's iconic white beast in the heat of battle.
language.shardDescription: Grants +0 Leap charge. Attacks during the Leap buff critically strike for 0% damage.

description: Calls down a wave of meteors to damage nearby enemy units. The closest enemy unit to Mirana in a 675 radius will be struck a second time.
language.lore: The Goddess breaks the strata to empower her Princess in the time of need.
notes: Starstorm is not blocked by Linken's Sphere.
Starstorm cannot hit invisible units.
Starstorm will choose a new target for the second meteor if the first died before impact.

description: Morphling dissolves into liquid and surges forward, damaging enemy units in his path. Morphling is invulnerable during Waveform.
language.lore: A torrential flood takes enemies by force.

description: Launches a surge of water toward an enemy unit, dealing base damage plus additional damage based on Morphling's agility times a multiplier.  If Morphling's agility is 50% higher than strength, the maximum agility multiplier is used.
The target is also knocked back based on Morphling's strength. If his strength is 50% higher than his agility, the maximum knockback distance is used.
language.lore: The Morphling calls upon his elements to crush his opponents with waves.
notes: Projectile moves at 1150 speed.

description: Morphling shifts its form, pulling points from Strength and pouring them into Agility. The process is reversible.  Additional points in Attribute Shift increase the rate of stat change.
language.lore: Shifting water makes it difficult to discern the nature of Morphling.
notes: Attribute Shift can't convert stats from items.
Leveling up Agility Gain will also level up Strength Gain.
language.shardDescription: Morphling can shift attributes while stunned. Reduces mana cost.

description: Morphling shifts its form, pulling points from Agility and pouring them into Strength. The process is reversible.  Additional points in Attribute Shift increase the rate of stat change.
language.lore: Shifting water makes it difficult to discern the nature of Morphling.
notes: Attribute Shift can't convert stats from items.
Leveling up Strength Gain will also level up Agility Gain.
language.shardDescription: Morphling can shift attributes while stunned. Reduces mana cost.

description: Morphling changes his form to match the targeted enemy, gaining their basic abilities. Can be toggled for the duration of the ability.
language.lore: Staring into Morphling produces a reflection that mimics the beholder.
notes: You can't target yourself with Morph.
Morph won't copy Shard/Scepter abilities unless Morphling owns the respective item.
Does not trigger spell reflect.
language.aghanimDescription: Adds an alt-cast to Morph. When enabled, a strong illusion is created of the target hero that can cast all of the hero's basic abilities. If the illusion is alive when Morphling toggles the ability, he will take the place of the illusion, destroying it.

description: Toggles Morphling's form between his own and the replicated enemy.

Shadow Fiend razes the ground directly in front of him, dealing damage to enemy units in the area. Adds a stacking damage amplifier on the target that causes the enemy to take bonus Shadowraze damage per stack.
language.lore: Nevermore's trademark for harvesting souls.
notes: Stack duration refreshes on stack gain.
language.shardDescription: Cooldown reduced by 0s per enemy hero.

description: Shadow Fiend razes the ground a short distance away from him, dealing damage to enemy units in the area. Adds a stacking damage amplifier on the target that causes the enemy to take bonus Shadowraze damage per stack.
language.lore: Nevermore's trademark for harvesting souls.
notes: Stack duration refreshes on stack gain.
language.shardDescription: Cooldown reduced by 0s per enemy hero.

description: Shadow Fiend razes the ground a longer distance away from him, dealing damage to enemy units in the area. Adds a stacking damage amplifier on the target that causes the enemy to take bonus Shadowraze damage per stack.
language.lore: Nevermore's trademark for harvesting souls.
notes: Stack duration refreshes on stack gain.
language.shardDescription: Cooldown reduced by 0s per enemy hero.

description: Shadow Fiend steals the soul from units he kills, gaining bonus damage. Hero kills grant 3 souls. On death, he releases 30.0% of them from bondage.
language.lore: Harvested souls swirl in and out of the Abysm, empowering the Shadow Fiend to increase the size of his collection.
notes: Denies and neutral creeps also provide bonus damage through Necromastery.
Break disables the gaining of new stacks.
Break does not disable the bonuses from existing stacks.
language.aghanimDescription: Increases max souls.

description: Shadow Fiend's presence reduces the armor of nearby enemies.
language.lore: Even being near Nevermore eats away at one's soul.
notes: Stacks fully with other armor reduction abilities and aura.

description:
Shadow Fiend gathers his captured souls to release them as lines of demonic energy. Units near Shadow Fiend when the souls are released can be damaged by several lines of energy. Any unit damaged by Requiem of Souls will be feared and have its movement speed and magic resistance reduced for 0.6 seconds for each line hit up to a maximum of 2.15. Lines of energy are created for every soul captured through Necromastery.

Requiem of Souls is automatically cast whenever Shadow Fiend dies, regardless of its cooldown.
language.lore: The captured souls of those past slain are released to ravage their former allies.
notes: One line is generated from Shadow Fiend for every 1 soul in his possession.
Fear and movement slow do not apply if the Requiem was released on death.
language.aghanimDescription: Reduces cooldown and causes Requiem of Souls to return back to Shadow Fiend. The wave back to Shadow Fiend deals less damage, but heals Shadow Fiend for all the damage it dealt.

description: Sends a magical spirit lance to a target enemy unit that damages and slows, while summoning an illusory phantom to attack the unit.
language.lore: Azwraith's proficiency at spearing his family's meal of fish is proving quite useful in the battlefield.
notes: Illusions within 675 range of Phantom Lancer will mimic the cast animation.
language.aghanimDescription: Spirit Lance bounces once on enemies, prioritizing Heroes. Increases Spirit Lance illusion damage.

description: Phantom Lancer briefly vanishes from the battlefield. After 1 second, Phantom Lancer and any of his nearby illusions reappear at a random position within the targeted location, along with two additional doppelgangers. Extends duration of all illusions. The two added doppelgangers have different properties: one takes normal damage and deals none, while the other takes 500% bonus damage and deals -80 less damage.
DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
language.lore: Dread Magus Vorn's death imbued the Phantom Lancer with the ability to bend and fracture all spectrums of light.
notes: This ability can be used to dodge projectiles, and dispel debuffs.
Trees near a reappearing unit will be destroyed.
Phantom Lancer and his allies can see which illusion is the 100% damage illusion.

description: Phantom Lancer has a chance to fracture his presence on an attack, creating an illusion of himself. Illusions also have a chance to fracture further. Illusions created from Phantom Lancer last for 8 seconds, while illusions created from other illusions last 4 seconds.
language.lore: Each of Azwraith's lance attacks feels like two from a normal warrior; or three; or four...
language.shardDescription: Adds an active ability to Juxtapose. Renders Phantom Lancer invisible for up to  seconds while generating a duplicate image to confuse enemies. His movement speed is increased by  during this invisibility.

description: When targeting an enemy for an attack, Phantom Lancer quickly charges into range, gaining a temporary agility boost. Phantom Lancer's illusions also have this ability.
language.lore: Azwraith knows that on the field of battle, speed can mean everything.
notes: If the attack order is cancelled, the movement speed bonus is lost.
Rush movement speed is %bonus_speed%.
language.aghanimDescription: Increases Range. Whenever Phantom Lancer Rushes through enemies, he creates Juxtapose illusions that attack them.

description: Puck launches a magic orb that floats in a straight path, damaging enemy units along the way. At any point, Puck may teleport to the orb's location using Ethereal Jaunt.
language.lore: The playful Faerie Dragon delights in confusing others, vanishing and reappearing where unexpected.
notes: The Illusory Orb grants unobstructed vision around its location while it travels.
Jaunting to the Orb will disjoint projectiles.

description: Teleports Puck to a flying Illusory Orb.
language.lore: The Orb is an egg of potential, traveling along its own timeline.

description: Puck teleports to the target location and releases a burst of faerie dust that deals damage and silences enemy units nearby.
language.lore: With a mischievous grin, Puck spreads its enchanted powder which disrupts magical flow.

description: CHANNELED - Puck briefly shifts into another dimension where it is immune from harm.
language.lore: With a quip and flash, Puck returns to the alien dimension from whence it came.
notes: Puck retains collision size while under the effects of Phase Shift.
Issuing any action will cancel Phase Shift.
Puck is invulnerable during Phase Shift.
language.shardDescription: Puck's attacks deal bonus magic damage. Puck attacks all enemies within its attack range every time it phase shifts.

description: Creates a coil of volatile magic that latches onto enemy Heroes, damaging and leashing them.  If the enemy hero stretches the coil by moving too far away, it snaps, stunning and dealing additional damage.
language.lore: The Faerie Dragon sows confusion by forcing its enemies to vividly dream about their own mortality.
language.aghanimDescription: All enemies affected by Dream Coil are attacked at a rate equal to 0% of Puck's attack rate. The attacks continue while the target is stunned if they break the Dream Coil.

description: Pudge covers himself with a layer of flesh that blocks damage of any type taken from any source.
language.lore: The Butcher gives new meaning to the words 'meat shield.'

description: Launches a bloody hook toward a unit or location. The hook will snag the first unit it encounters, dragging the unit back to Pudge, killing it if it's a non-ancient creep and dealing damage if it is an enemy otherwise.
language.lore: The Butcher's hook is a symbolic nightmare, its curved blade a frightening reminder of his slaughterous intent.
notes: Interrupts channeling spells of the primary target if it's an enemy.
Meat Hook hits invisible units.
Meat Hook can go through trees, cliffs, buildings, ancient units and Roshan.
Meat Hook can drag friendly units, but they won't be damaged.
Meat Hook can hit and drag runes to Pudge, refunding the Hook's mana cost.
language.shardDescription:
When Meat Hook hits an enemy, it deals bonus damage based on the distance pulled.

When Meat Hook hits an ally, Meat Hook's cooldown is reduced by .

description: A toxic cloud that deals intense damage and slows movement--harming not only enemy units but Pudge himself.
language.lore: A foul odor precedes a toxic, choking gas, emanating from the Butcher's putrid, ever-swelling mass.
notes: Using Rot doesn't interrupt channeling.
Rot hits invisible units.
If Pudge is silenced, he can't deactivate Rot if it's activated.
Rot self-damage is non-lethal.
language.aghanimDescription: Increases Rot radius and damage, and causes it to reduce enemy Health Restoration.

description: CHANNELED - Pudge chows down on an enemy unit, disabling it and dealing damage over time. Damage is increased by Pudge's Strength and heals him for the total amount. Pudge pulls the unit at a rate of 75 units, up to a minimum of 125 range.
language.lore: 'When I'm through with these vermin, they'll be fit for a pie!'
notes: If a unit becomes invisible while Dismembered, it will still be under the effects of Dismember.

description: Creates a cone of ethereal energy that strikes multiple enemy units.
language.lore: Originally used to open shows with the travelling con-man, Rhasta's lightning display shocks adversaries in more ways than one.
notes: Can hit secondary targets up to 1000 distance away.

description: Transforms an enemy unit into a harmless creature, disabling their attacks and abilities.
language.lore: Rhasta often ended performances by turning himself into a chicken - now, the humiliation is shared.
notes: Instantly destroys illusions.
The target will have a base movement speed of 100, but buffs granting maximum movement speed won't be disabled.

description: CHANNELED - Magically binds an enemy unit so that it cannot move or attack, absorbing their life energy over time.
language.lore: A self-defense incantation, Rhasta developed shackles after his master was slain in the Bleeding Hills.
language.aghanimDescription: Increase cast range. Every  seconds, shackled units emit a radial Ether Shock hitting all other units within  of the target for  of Ether Shock's normal damage. Shackles can now also be cast on allies and Mass Serpent Wards that stay within  units of Shadow Shaman. Allied units are not disabled by Shackle.

description: Summons 10 Serpent Wards to attack enemy units and structures. The Wards are immune to magic. Creeps deal half damage to the Serpent Ward.
language.lore: Snake charming was a big part of the Shadow Shaman's act; now Rhasta can empower the snakes to do his bidding.

description: Releases a wave of energetic plasma that grows in power as it expands, but also zaps on contraction, slowing and dealing damage to enemy units caught in its path. Damage and slow increases with distance from Razor. The Plasma Field hits each unit twice, once each direction.
language.lore: The Lightning Revenant rules the Underscape with plasmatic power.

description: Creates a charged link between Razor and an enemy Hero, stealing damage from the target and giving it to Razor. Allows Razor to attack while moving with the link active.
language.lore: Razor's polarity channels electricity into his being, draining the power of his opposition.
notes: The link is broken when either unit dies or the distance between them becomes 250 units greater than Static Link's cast range.
language.shardDescription: Increases Cast Range. Slows Razor's target by 0x the amount of damage stolen while the link is active.

description: Passively increases Razor's movement speed by 1% per hero level.
A powerful lightning storm strikes out at the enemy unit with the lowest health, dealing damage and reducing armor.
language.lore: Ride the lightning.
notes: Each blast targets the lowest health enemy unit within range.
Eye of the Storm will prioritize striking static linked heroes.
Successive casts of Eye of the Storm will stack.
language.aghanimDescription: Causes Eye of the Storm to strike two different units instead of one and can damage structures. When striking buildings, it will only target towers, barracks, and the Ancient.

description: Wraith King sears an enemy unit with spectral fire, dealing damage and stunning, then dealing damage over time and slowing the target.
language.lore: Ostarion calls on his damned lineage, laying waste to his opponents.

description: Gains a Charge for every 2 creeps killed and 2 charges per hero killed. Activate to spend all charges, summoning skeletons that respawn once when killed. Skeletons benefit from Vampiric Spirit's lifesteal.
language.lore: Wraith King's blade drains his enemy's essence to feed his aura.
notes: Break disables the gaining of new stacks.
Casting Wraithfire Blast on an enemy causes the skeletons to attack that enemy.

description: Wraith King passively deals bonus damage on an attack with a cooldown.
language.lore: One blow to crush a foe.
language.shardDescription: Mortal Strike deals 0 bonus damage when in Wraith form.

description: Wraith King's form regroups after death, allowing him to resurrect when killed in battle. Upon death, enemy units in a 900 radius are slowed. Can be self-cast to kill Wraith King instantly.
language.lore: Conspirators against the Wraith King wonder why he never stays dead.
notes: Wraith King won't revive if he doesn't have enough mana.
If Wraith King has an Aegis and Reincarnation off cooldown, Reincarnation will trigger first.
Revives with full HP and Mana.
language.aghanimDescription: Reduces cooldown.
language.shardDescription: Causes Reincarnation to have no mana cost.

description: Sends a swarm of winged beasts to savage enemy units in front of Death Prophet.
language.lore: Krobelus' many trips to the grave gather a flock of the damned.
notes: Can hit units up to 1110 range away.
Does not trigger spell block or spell reflect.

description: Fires a projectile that prevents enemy units in a target area from casting spells.
language.lore: Peering into the veil of her opponent's demise, Krobelus sees a silent future.
notes: Doesn't prevent usage of items.

description: Death Prophet's occult knowledge deepens with experience, gaining 0.5% movement speed per level, and 0.75% spell cooldown reduction per level.

Unleashes evil spirits to drain the life of nearby enemy units and structures. Spirits need to return back to Death Prophet in order to attack again. At the end of the spell's duration, Death Prophet is healed in proportion to the damage dealt. Deals 50% damage to buildings. Lasts 40 seconds.
Increases Death Prophet's movement speed while active.
language.lore: Over time, the banshee remnants of her previous lives return to haunt the present.
notes: Radius represents the area in which the spirits will acquire targets around Death Prophet.
Spirit damage isn't reduced by damage block abilities.
language.aghanimDescription: Whenever an enemy is affected by Death Prophet's spells or when she attacks an enemy, a ghost will fly out, slow and hit the enemy for an increased bonus of its usual damage then return to her with life.

description: Sven unleashes his magical gauntlet that deals damage and stuns enemy units in a small area around the target.
language.lore: The Rogue Knight's iron gauntlet, taken from the school of his father, strikes his foes to their core.
language.aghanimDescription: Increases cast range and applies a basic dispel on the target. Can be cast on invulnerable targets. If alt-cast, it deals an additional 180 damage and Sven travels with the Storm Hammer.

description: Sven strikes with great force, cleaving all nearby enemy units with his attack.
language.lore: The Vigil Knights still seek to reclaim the stolen Outcast Blade from Sven, a weapon capable of cutting wide swaths through lesser warriors.

description: Sven's Warcry heartens his allied heroes for battle, increasing their armor and movement speed. Lasts 8 seconds.
language.lore: Calling a few lines from the Vigil Codex fortifies Sven's obedience to his rogue code. So poetic!
language.shardDescription: Warcry is now undispellable and passively grants  armor to all allies near Sven. Increases active movement speed bonus.

description: Sven channels his rogue strength, granting bonus damage and slow resistance for 35.0 seconds.
language.lore: With the strength that shattered the Sacred Helm, the Rogue Knight stands unopposed in melee combat.
notes: The bonus damage is based on base damage and the primary attribute of Sven.

description: Creates an explosively charged image of Storm Spirit that lasts 12.0 seconds and will detonate and deal damage if an enemy unit comes near it.
language.lore: Raijin Thunderkeg's duality allows him to admire himself in shocking fashion.
notes: Remnants take 0.75 second to materialize after the spell is cast.
Remnants grant unobstructed vision for their duration.
The explosion actually hits units in a 300 radius, but will only be triggered in 235.
Can be self-cast to cast in place.

description: A vortex that pulls an enemy unit to Storm Spirit's location.
language.lore: Raijin's thunderous, boisterous energy often draws others into an electrifying situation.
language.aghanimDescription: Electric Vortex affects all enemies within a radius around Storm Spirit.

description: Casting a spell creates an electrical charge, which is released in a burst on Storm's next attack, dealing damage and slowing nearby enemies.
language.lore: Pow!  Zip!  Zap!
notes: Using items doesn't trigger Overload.
Overload charges do not stack.
language.shardDescription: Can be activated to grant Storm Spirit and nearby allied heroes  Overload charges. Provides bonus Attack Speed. Lasts up to  seconds or until the charges are depleted.

description: Storm Spirit becomes volatile electricity, charging across the battlefield until he depletes his mana or reaches his target. The activation mana cost is 25+ 7.5% of his total mana pool, and the cost per 100 units traveled is 10+ 0.65 of his total mana pool. Damage is expressed in damage per 100 units traveled.
language.lore: The Storm is coming in.
notes: Abilities and items can be used while traveling.
This ability will destroy trees.
Storm Spirit is invulnerable during Ball Lightning.

description:
Sand King burrows into the ground and tunnels forward, damaging and stunning enemy units above him as he resurfaces. Adds Caustic Finale poison to heroes hit

Can be put on alt-cast to immediately cast in the desired direction, without walking towards the targeted location.
language.lore: Crixalis often lies in wait, burrowing under the surface to ambush his adversaries.
notes: Does not trigger spell block or spell reflect.

description: Sand King creates a fearsome sandstorm that damages enemy units and grants Sand King Invisibility while he is in it. The effect ends when Sand King leaves the area.
language.lore: Some say Crixalis is a mirage; his carapace appearing then vanishing between the whirling sands of the Scintillant Waste.
notes: Sand Storm can be used to dodge projectiles.
Sand King briefly becomes visible upon attacking or using spells while in Sand Storm. Sand King will become invisible again in 0.7 seconds.

description: Sand King's attacks inject a venom that causes enemy units to violently explode when they die.
language.lore: An injection from Crixalis makes one brittle and as dry as the arid wastes, subject to implosive demise.

description: After a cast point of 2.0 seconds, Sand King sends a disturbance into the earth, causing it to shudder violently. All enemies caught within range will take damage and become slowed. Each subsequent pulse increases the radius of damage dealt.
language.lore: Many an explorer was lost to the quicksands of the Scintillant Waste.
notes: The pulses are centered on Sand King, not where he first cast the spell.
language.aghanimDescription: When the pulses start,  Stinger attack areas are created every s at random locations, each measuring  of the Epicenter's current radius, that apply  of Stinger damage to enemies hit. Shard pulses cause  attack(s).
language.shardDescription: Increases Epicenter damage per pulse. Every s causes a small single Epicenter Pulse around Sand King.

description: Bombards an area with rocks, continously doing small intervals of damage and stun to enemy units.
language.lore: Inanimate rock becomes animate when called by the Stone Giant.

description: Grabs the nearest unit in a 300 radius around Tiny, ally or enemy, and launches it at the target unit or rune to deal damage where they land.
language.lore: Tiny's gargantuan stature allows him to catapult even the sturdiest of warriors.
notes: You can toss allies, but they don't take damage.
Toss deals 33% of its damage to buildings.
Debuff Immune units can be targeted but cannot be tossed.

description: Grabs a tree to whack enemies on the head for a limited number of attacks. Grants bonus attack range. Attacks deal more damage and fully splash on units along the way. The tree can be thrown, to deal your attack to a unit at a distance.
language.lore: Sticks and stones break all the bones, with structures sure to follow.
notes: The cooldown begins when the tree is thrown.
language.shardDescription: Causes Tree Grab to have no charge limit.

description: Tiny gains craggy mass, increasing his attack damage, movement speed and armor, and toss power while slowing his attack speed.
language.lore: Watching a hill become a mountain is awe-inspiring - especially if the mountain begins laying waste to adversaries.

description: Hurls a bolt of lightning that leaps through nearby enemy units that deal damage.
language.lore: Arc Lightning is Zeus' favorite spell to use against puny mortals.

description: Calls down a bolt of lightning to strike an enemy unit, causing damage and a mini-stun. When cast, Lightning Bolt briefly provides unobstructed vision and True Sight around the target in a 500 radius. Can be cast on the ground, affecting the closest enemy hero in 325 range.
language.lore: A shocking punishment for rebellious heathen.
notes: You can interrupt channeling spells and items with this ability.

description: Zeus shocks any enemy that he attacks or is hit by his abilities, causing damage equal to a percentage of their current health.
language.lore: The air crackles with static when the Thundergod walks the world.

description:
Strikes all enemy heroes with a bolt of lightning, dealing damage, no matter where they may be.

Thundergod's Wrath also provides True Sight around each hero struck. If an enemy hero is invisible, it takes no damage, but the True Sight is still created at that hero's location.
language.lore: The Lord of Heaven smites all who oppose him, near or far.

description: Slardar slithers ahead, moving significantly faster and passing through units.
language.lore: As Slardar has made the transition from the Deeps, it has been necessary to use his powerful tail for sprinting instead of swimming.
notes: Activating this skill doesn't interrupt channeling abilities.

description: Slams the ground, leaving a puddle of water, and stunning and damaging nearby enemy units.  After the stun, the affected units are slowed.
language.lore: A swift crush of might and water breaks even the toughest of defenses.
language.aghanimDescription: Increases Slithereen Crush puddle radius and duration.
language.shardDescription: Slithereen Crush now applies Corrosive Haze for a short time to units affected.

description: After 3 attacks, your next attack will bash the target.
language.lore: Thieves of the wealth of the Deep Ones meet the brutality of the Slithereen Guard in melee combat.
notes: Does not stack with Skull Basher.

description: Reduces enemy armor to amplify physical damage and provides True Sight and vision of the targeted unit, revealing invisibility. The enemy unit leaves a trail of water behind it.
language.lore: Even the strongest armor counts for little when left to the brine of the sea.

description: Summons a gush of water to damage an enemy unit, reducing their movement speed and armor.
language.lore: During his championship of the Sunken Isles, Leviathan gained mastery over the open sea.
language.aghanimDescription: Gush becomes a ground targeted wave ability that affects enemy units in a line.  Decreases cooldown.

description: Thickens Tidehunter's hide to passively block a portion of any incoming physical attack damage. Reduced block amount versus creeps.
Can be activated to double the block amount at the cost of 40% movement speed. Lasts 4.0s.
language.lore: Claddish navymen tell tales of a mighty sea-faring beast that suffered spear and sword but continued to lay waste to the fleet.
notes: Break disables the gaining of new Kraken Swell stacks.
Break does not disable the bonuses from existing Kraken Swell stacks.
Does not stack with items that provide Damage Block.

description: Tidehunter swings his mighty anchor to attack and deal bonus damage to nearby enemies and reduce their attack damage.
language.lore: Stolen from one of Admiral Kunkka's flagships, Leviathan's heavy anchor proves useful as a melee weapon.
notes: Anchor Smash works on all Ancient creeps except for Roshan.

description: Slams the ground, causing tentacles to erupt in all directions, damaging and stunning all nearby enemy units.
language.lore: Calling to the abyssal god Maelrawn has resulted in entire armadas being lost at sea.
notes: Ravage will hit invisible units.
Ravage waves move outwards at a speed of 725.

description: Fires a magic missile at an enemy unit, stunning and dealing damage.
language.lore: A simple Skywrath technique, the magic missile is Shendel's primary tool for vengeance.
language.shardDescription: Bounces once on an enemy, prioritizing heroes, within 75% of Magic Missile's current cast range from the first target.

description: Vengeful Spirit's presence increases the damage of nearby friendly heroes.
language.lore: Although they may not share her undying passion for revenge, allies do draw on her fanaticism in combat.
notes: Break disables the damage aura.
language.aghanimDescription: Upon death, creates a strong illusion of Vengeful Spirit that deals and takes full damage and can cast all of her spells. If the illusion is alive when Vengeful Spirit respawn, she will take its place. XP earned by her illusion is given to her. Strong Illusions are not instantly killed by spells.

description: Vengeful Spirit lets loose a wicked cry, weakening the total attack damage and armor of enemies, and giving vision of the path ahead.
language.lore: Shendel's haunting voice hints at her approaching vindication.

description: Instantaneously swaps positions with a target Hero, friend or enemy. Nether Swap interrupts channeling abilities on the target. Enemy Swapped units take damage. Vengeful Spirit and allied swapped units gain a barrier equal to the damage dealt.
language.lore: Martyrdom is a small price to pay for vengeance.
notes: Works on Spell Immune units.
Trees near Vengeful Spirit and the target will be destroyed when the spell is cast.
Channeling spells are interrupted by Nether Swap.

description: A burst of damaging frost slows enemy movement in the targeted area.
language.lore: The air temperature around Rylai drops rapidly, chilling all around her to the core.
notes: Crystal Nova provides vision in the targeted area for the duration.

description: Encases an enemy unit in ice, prohibiting movement and attack, while dealing damage over time. Deals 4x damage to non-ancient creeps.
language.lore: Rylai channels winds from the Blueheart Glacier, imprisoning attackers in thick blocks of ice.
notes: Frostbite is considered a root.

description: Gives additional mana regeneration to all friendly units on the map. Allies within a 1200 radius of Crystal Maiden receive 3x the mana regeneration.
language.lore: Cold temperatures promote the essence of magic, causing Rylai's presence to allow spell usage in abundance.
notes: With Arcane Overflow and Aghanim's Scepter, cannot be activated while channeling Freezing Field.

description: CHANNELED - Surrounds Crystal Maiden with 100 random icy explosions that slow enemies and deal massive damage. Lasts %abilitychanneltime% seconds.
language.lore: Once the place of her exile, Icewrack has become an anchor for Rylai's frigid onslaught.
notes: The slow is applied on all enemies in the radius, even if they aren't hit by an explosion (lasts 1.0 second).
Explosions occur every 0.1 seconds.
Break disables the passive effects of Frozen Expanse.
language.aghanimDescription: Allows you to move, cast and attack during Freezing Field. Can still be interrupted by enemies. You move  slower during this. Increases total number of explosions by . Applies Frostbite to any unit that has been standing in the Freezing Field for over -1s.
language.shardDescription:
Allows you to move, cast and attack during Freezing Field. Can still be interrupted by enemies. You move  slower during this.

Increases total number of explosions by .

description: Shackles the target to an enemy unit or tree in a line directly behind it. If no unit or tree is present, the stun duration is reduced to 0.6.
language.lore: Windranger's variety of bow skills includes an arrow with thick ropes attached to encumber any escaping target.
notes: This spell can shackle two enemies together, stunning them both.
Can shackle the target to an enemy unit or tree at most 575 behind the target.
Shackleshot can be disjointed.

description: CHANNELED - Windranger charges her bow for up to 1.0 second for a single powerful shot, which deals more damage the longer it is charged. The arrow damages and slows enemies' movement speed along its path. For each enemy that Powershot hits, its damage and slow is reduced.
language.lore: During her early years of training, Lyralei learned to fire powerful arrows that cleaved even trees to reach their targets.
notes: Powershot will destroy trees in its area of effect.

description: Increases movement speed and adds evasion from all physical attacks.
language.lore: Lyralei enchants gusts of winds to fight incoming attacks.
notes: Activating Windrun will evade incoming projectiles.
language.aghanimDescription: Windrun reduces physical damage taken by , and grants invisibility that is not broken by attacking or casting spells.

description: Windranger channels the wind to gain 350 / 425 / 500 additional attack speed against a single enemy unit or structure, though with a reduction to her attack damage. Extra damage from secondary item effects is not reduced.
language.lore: Lyralei's ability to bombard opponents with a flurry of arrows is unparalleled - even at the expense of accuracy.
notes: Issuing a Hold Position command will pause Windranger's attacks.
Windranger can move while attacking.

description: Blasts the target enemy unit with damaging frost, dealing area damage and slowing movement and attack rates for 4.0 seconds. The primary target receives both base and area damage.
language.lore: Frost-mage Ethreain has not forgotten even the simplest of ice manipulation.

description: Applies a magical frost shield around the target, reducing damage from attacks against it. While the shield is active, ice magic will affect nearby enemy units every 1.0 seconds, dealing minor damage and slowing them.
language.lore: First conceived of to protect him in his mortal years, the frost magic that Ethreain weaves around himself has only grown colder with time.
notes: Spell-immune enemies are not affected by the damage or slow.
Frost Shield can be cast on buildings.

description: Releases an orb of frost that bounces between nearby enemy units up to 10 / 10 / 10 times, slowing and damaging each time it hits. Each bounce increases the damage for the subsequent bounces. Chain Frost lingers on its last target if it fails to bounce and can bounce again if new targets become available.
language.lore: Almost universally considered the ultimate in frost magic, Ethreain's orb of frozen death strikes fear into those who dare stand against him.
notes: Chain Frost cannot be disjointed.
Chain Frost has a movement speed of 850.
Chain Frost doesn't bounce to Zombies.

description: Launches a cask of paralyzing powder that ricochets between enemy units, stunning and damaging those it hits. Damage increases each bounce.
language.lore: The Witch Doctor recycles the bones of fallen friends and foes, using the powder as part of his arsenal of charms and alchemy.
notes: Targets can be hit multiple times, as long as another unit is struck in between the bounces.

description: Witch Doctor focuses his magic to heal nearby allied units, costing Witch Doctor mana every second Voodoo Restoration is active.
language.lore: Zharvakko's hocus pocus is not limited only to hexxing his opponents and is quite adept at curing ailments.
notes: Healing is done in 0.33 / 0.33 / 0.33 / 0.33 second intervals.
Can heal Spell Immune units.

description: Curses all enemy Heroes in a small area, causing them to take a set amount of damage each second, as well as bursts of damage every 4 seconds based on how much health they have lost since the curse began.
language.lore: Certain voodoo magics can make an enemy regret engaging the Witch Doctor.
notes: If an affected hero's health has increased above the amount they had when Maledict was cast, the burst damage will be 0.

description: CHANNELED - Summons a deadly ward to attack enemy heroes within its attack range. Lasts a maximum of 8.0 seconds. Death Ward has 50% bonus accuracy.
language.lore: Witch Doctor performs a ritualistic dance, one that haunts the dreams of those who live to recount it.
notes: The Death Ward is invulnerable, and is only destroyed if Witch Doctor is interrupted or its duration expires.
The Death Ward can be controlled, and made to attack a specific target.
Death Ward attacks once every 0.22 seconds.
language.aghanimDescription: Death Ward attacks bounce between nearby enemies.

description: Throws down a smoke bomb, silencing enemies and causing them to miss attacks.
language.lore: Since his escape during the night of his betrayal, Riki has valued the use of a simple smoke screen to confuse his opponents.
notes: Can be cast during Tricks of the Trade.
Doesn't prevent the use of active items.
language.shardDescription: Enemies caught in the smoke screen have their armor reduced by 0 and cannot be targeted by their allies.

description: Teleports behind the target unit, momentarily slowing them and striking for bonus damage if it is an enemy.
language.lore: The Stealth Assassin's agile movement makes him impossible to escape.
notes: Riki's first attack after Blink Strike will be a backstab.
Blink Strike's damage is dealt before the next attack.
You can Blink Strike to allies, but no damage is dealt.

description: Riki fades into the shadows, becoming invisible. When Riki attacks, he becomes visible.
language.lore: Riki comes for you.

description: CHANNELED - Riki phases out of the world while striking random enemy units from behind in an area around him. While phased out his attack damage is reduced, but his Agility greatly increases.
language.lore: The Stealth Assassin is not afraid to fight dirty, and specializes in attacking his opponents from behind.
language.aghanimDescription: Increases cast range, number of attacks and allows you to target an allied hero, hiding inside them for the duration.  Each attack hits an additional target.

description: Focuses Enigma's power on a target, causing it to take damage and become repeatedly stunned for multiple instances. An instance strikes every 2.0 / 2.0 / 2.0 / 2.0 seconds.
language.lore: Strange gravities pull at the core of those who would oppose you, holding them in place.
language.shardDescription: Increases Malefice stun duration by 0.30s and creates an Eidolon next to the target every instance of Malefice stun. These Eidolons will not multiply further.

description: Summons three fragments of Enigma himself at the cost of health. The eidolons health is increased by 3% of Enigma's current health. These eidolons are all under Enigma's control, and repeated successful attacks cause them to multiply. When this happens, the eidolons have their health restored.
language.lore: Enigma is capable of drawing aspects of himself from other dimensions - the result is a trio of dark eidolons that hunt the corporeal plane.

description: Steeps an area in dark resonance, dealing 5 / 10 / 15 / 20 + a percentage of the enemies current HP as damage.
language.lore: A section of the world slowly descends into the void.
notes: This ability destroys trees in its area.
Multiple instances of Midnight Pulse do not stack.

description: CHANNELED - Summons a vortex that sucks in nearby enemy units.  Enemies affected by Black Hole cannot move, attack, or cast spells.
language.lore: The ground trembles as Enigma channels his ultimate vortex of destruction, a singularity with the power to end worlds.
language.aghanimDescription: Black Hole deals additional damage equivalent to  of the unit's Max Health per second and does a non-interrupting pull towards it in a  AoE. Pulls at a rate of .

description: Fires an intense energy beam, damaging and blinding the target. Blinded targets miss all physical attacks.
language.lore: Boush perfected this rock cutting laser in his subterranean laboratory, never considering its combat utility.
language.aghanimDescription: Upgrades Tinker's Laser into a Shrink Ray, reducing the main target's size, current health, and maximum health by  (stacking). The laser bounces once on the farthest target up to  range from the primary one, prioritizing heroes.

description: Enlists an army of robotic minions to destroy enemy units in an area around Tinker.
language.lore: Even though the laboratory has since been sealed off, the ability to radio in robotic drones is still in working order.
notes: Robots spawn at a rate of 24 per second.

description: CHANNELED - Resets the cooldown on Tinker's abilities.
language.lore: A new battery here, another set of rockets there, Boush continually improves on existing technology.

description: Consumes a charge to launch a ball of shrapnel that showers the target area in explosive pellets. Enemies are subject to damage and slowed movement. Reveals the targeted area. Shrapnel charges restore every %abilitychargerestoretime% seconds.
language.lore: Kardel's modular rifle also fires incendiary rounds, useful for assaulting entrenched locations.
notes: Damage is dealt 11 times, immediately at spell effect then every second.
Does not damage buildings.
Provides vision in the targeted area.

description: Sniper increases his accuracy, giving him a chance to deal extra damage and knock back his enemies. Knockback distance increases based on how close the enemy is to Sniper. Headshots briefly slow enemy movement and attack speed by -100%.
language.lore: Taking potshots at steepstalkers in his childhood has been thoroughly refined into perfect leads on enemy combatants.

description: Increases vision range, Headshot chance, and attack range. Slows you by 65% for the duration and restricts your vision to a frontal cone.
language.lore: Kardel always takes it upon himself to stay as far from harm as he can while still performing his role - taking perfect aim.

description: Sniper locks onto a target enemy unit and, after a short aiming duration, fires a devastating shot that deals Sniper's attack damage plus bonus damage at long range and mini-stuns the target. Whenever Sniper kills an enemy hero, Assassinate is refreshed.
language.lore: In order to fulfill the prophecy and return to his home town, Kardel must make another shot as perfect as the one on the day of his ancient test.
notes: Crosshair effect is only visible to allies.
Invisibility doesn't disjoint the projectile.
language.aghanimDescription: Causes Assassinate to fire quicker and stun the enemy target.

description: Necrophos releases a wave of death around him, dealing damage to enemy units and healing allied units.
language.lore: Poor souls who succumb to Rotund'jere's plagues are recycled for future use.
notes: Death Pulse can't be disjointed.

description: Necrophos stills the hearts of his opponents, causing nearby enemy units to lose a percentage of their max health over time.
language.lore: Those who come within a short distance of Necrophos can feel pestilence and plague in the air.
notes: Damage won't disable items like Blink Dagger.
Does not affect ancient creeps.
language.aghanimDescription: Heartstopper Aura's Health Decay is increased by 0 of Necrophos's current health regeneration.

description: Necrophos gains stacking regen for 8 seconds for each unit he kills. Hero kills multiply the effect.
notes: Break disables the gaining of new stacks.
Break does not disable the bonuses from existing stacks.

description: Stuns the target enemy hero, then deals damage based on how much life it is missing. If Necrophos kills an enemy this way, he'll permanently gain Health and Mana Regen. Any kill under this effect is credited to Necrophos.
language.lore: The amount of death and suffering in the air increases the power of Necrophos's plague magic.
notes: Damage is dealt at the end of the stun.

description: Binds several enemy units together, causing a percentage of the damage dealt to one of them to be felt by the others.
language.lore: An ancient incantation that links the vital energies of multiple lifeforms into one collective body.
notes: The shared damage type is the same as the type of damage inflicted.

description: Warlock whispers an incantation, casting a spell on a unit that makes it deal damage to nearby enemy units and heal nearby ally units. Target Unit will also heal or be damaged depending on whether they are ally or enemy.
language.lore: Demnok's arcane arts have a myriad of uses, allowing them to be powerful friendly enchantments or damaging curses.
language.aghanimDescription: Increases Effect Radius. Shadow Word now applies to %additional_targets% additional units in a %cast_aoe% radius, prioritizing heroes. The healing and damage on the additional targets is reduced by %secondary_reduction%.

description: CHANNELED - A powerful slowing and damaging current that grows stronger as it's channeled. Lasts up to 10 / 12 / 14 / 16 seconds. Enemies are slowed for 1.0 second after leaving the area or the spell ends.
language.lore: Demnok manipulates space-time, impairing entire armies.
notes: The slow increase is based on length of the channel, not the duration an enemy was standing in the area.
language.shardDescription: While channeling, Warlock spawns a minor imp every 2 seconds that lasts for 15 seconds and explodes dealing damage to all enemies around them upon death.

description: Summons a Golem from the depths, stunning enemies for 0.8 seconds. The Golem lives 60 / 60 / 60 seconds, takes reduced damage from spells, has increased Slow Resistance, has Permanent Immolation and Flaming Fists on attack.
language.lore: Demnok unleashes the captive spirit in his Dreadwood staff, causing destruction in enemy ranks.
notes: This ability destroys trees in its area of effect.
language.aghanimDescription: Calls  Golems.

description: Deals extra damage to nearby units when attacking.
Burns the Golem's nearby enemy units, dealing damage per second.

Beastmaster sends his axes flying and calls them home again, slicing through enemy units and trees along their path.  Each axe can hit an enemy once, and amplifies subsequent damage from Beastmaster and his units.
language.lore: While learning to maneuver in nature alone, the Beastmaster also mastered the use of a pair of tomahawks, adept at cutting down trees as well as adversaries.
notes: This ability destroys trees.

description: Inflicts a poison that slows attack and movement speeds.
Untaps the inner fury of Beastmaster and units he controls, passively increasing their attack speed.
language.lore: Beastmaster's ability to incite the innate strength of animals was seen in the mauling of the king of Slom.
notes: Break disables the passive attack speed bonus.

description: Hurls a poisoned dagger which deals large initial damage, and then deals damage over time. The poisoned unit has its movement speed slowed for 16 seconds. An instance of damage is dealt every 3.0 seconds.
language.lore: Akasha's envenomed dagger allows her to delight in the drawn out suffering of her victims.
notes: The affected unit slowly regains its original movement speed every second during the duration.
Units afflicted by Shadow Strike can be denied by their allies when their HP drops below 25% of their maximum health.
language.aghanimDescription: Causes Shadow Strike to become a 0 AoE Spell. When Shadow Strike ends or is re-applied to an enemy Hero, the target emits a Scream of Pain, hitting any nearby enemies.

description: Short distance teleportation that allows Queen of Pain to move in and out of combat.
language.lore: The Secret Queen lives up to her title, making her pain impossible to escape.
notes: You can use Blink to dodge incoming projectiles.
language.shardDescription: Releases a sonic boom when Queen of Pain blinks, at both her starting and ending locations. Deals  damage in a  AoE and silences the target for  seconds.

description: The Queen of Pain lets loose a piercing scream around her, damaging nearby enemies.
language.lore: The sultry voice of Akasha beckons her opponents while stealing their souls.
notes: Scream Of Pain will hit invisible units.
Scream Of Pain cannot be disjointed.

description: Creates a gigantic wave of sound in front of Queen of Pain, dealing heavy damage to all enemy units in its wake and pushing them back.
language.lore: Her most exquisite of all of torments, Akasha's Sonic Wave puts her poor foes out of their misery.
notes: Sonic Wave can hit units up to 1150 units away.

description: Beastmaster lets loose a deafening roar that stuns, and shoves open a path to its target. All units in the path of the roar are damaged, while units shoved aside by the roar have their movement and attack speed slowed. Additionally, Beastmaster and his units gain 40% movement speed for 3 seconds.
language.lore: The Beastmaster has learned to channel his primal instincts into an animalistic roar, causing devastation in the ranks of enemies.

description: Launches a ball of venom in a line, poisoning enemy units so that they take both initial damage and damage over time, as well as suffering slowed movement.  Venomous Gale deals damage every 3 seconds over its duration.
language.lore: A concoction of various stings, poisons, and toxins gathered from the jungles of Jidi Isle, victims surviving it are rare.
notes: Venomous Gale can be lethal.
Duration damage is dealt every 3.0 / 3.0 / 3.0 / 3.0 seconds.
Slow starts at -35 / -40 / -45 / -50%, and decreases as time passes.
language.shardDescription: If Venomous Gale is dispelled in any way, the target will receive  damage and be stunned for  seconds.

description: Adds poison damage to Venomancer's normal attacks and slowing movement speed.
language.lore: The paralytic sting of the creature which caused his transformation now belongs to the Venomancer.
notes: Poison Sting damage can be lethal.
Damage from Poison Sting does not interrupt healing from items, nor does it activate the cooldown on Blink Dagger.

description: Summons a plague ward to attack enemy units and structures. The ward is immune to magic. Wards gain the Poison Sting level from Venomancer, dealing 50% of the full damage.
language.lore: A mixture of his old herbalist talents and newfound toxic mastery creates a living embodiment of plague.

description: Rushes to a target location while backtracking any damage taken the last 2.0 seconds.
language.lore: Darkterror tears a hole in time, passing through Claszureme, and appearing back in an instant.
notes: Faceless Void is invulnerable while using Time Walk.
language.aghanimDescription: Applies a Time Lock to all units at the landing destination.
language.shardDescription: Increases range

description: Adds the chance for an attack to lock an enemy unit in time while attacking it a second time.
language.lore: The strike of the Faceless Void lands with dimension shifting force.
notes: Does not stack with Skull Basher.

description: Creates a blister in spacetime, trapping all units caught in its sphere of influence and causes you to move very quickly inside it. Only Faceless Void and any units he controls are unaffected. Invisible enemies in the sphere will be revealed.
language.lore: When a rift opens to Claszureme, all poor souls caught within will likely never return.
notes: Pauses all units and buildings, friendly or enemy, except those owned by Faceless Void.
Faceless Void is never affected by Chronospheres with any owner.

description: An exploding pulse deals damage to enemies and structures in the area. Deals 65% damage to structures.
language.lore: The Arts of Oblivion include a deafening blast of emerald flames from the Nether Reaches.
notes: Damage is delayed by 0.8 seconds.

description: A powerful banishing spell that slows a unit and renders it unable to attack or be attacked. Healing on affected allies is increased, while afflicted enemies take extra magic damage instead.
language.lore: A now-mastered relic from his childhood, Pugna delights in banishing others into the Nether Realm, whether for good, evil, or simple enjoyment.
notes: Only magical and pure damage can affect a unit under the effects of Decrepify.
Doesn't slow allied units.
Can be used on your Nether Ward.

description: Pugna places a Nether Ward at the target location. The ward will fire at any enemy hero who casts a spell dealing base damage plus the damage multiplier of the mana spent by the enemy hero.
language.lore: While at the lamasery for the Arts of Oblivion, Pugna learned to dominate his classmates with a simple ward charged with Nether magic.
notes: Nether Ward deals damage before the actual spell is cast, so if the caster dies the spell will have no effect.
Nether Ward can be decrepified.
Illusions and creeps deal 25% damage to Nether Ward.
language.shardDescription: Increases cast range to 150.

description: CHANNELED - When cast on an enemy, Pugna drains health from the target enemy unit to heal himself and granting vision over the target.
When cast on an ally, Pugna will drain his own health into his ally.
language.lore: Pugna has truly become more powerful than even the grandmaster of Oblivion.
language.aghanimDescription: Reduces cooldown by %abilitycooldown%s. When targeting an enemy hero, Pugna reduces their outgoing spell damage by  per second up to a maximum of  and increases his own, up to a maximum of . When draining through a Nether Ward using Shard, the rate of increase/decrease is  instead. Debuff lasts  seconds.
language.shardDescription: Life Drain can target your Nether Ward, causing life drain to refract to all enemy heroes within %abilitycastrange% units of the ward for  of its normal value. The effect is interrupted if the ward is destroyed.

description: Throws a dagger slowing the enemy unit's movement speed, dealing 65 / 70 / 75 / 80+ 30 / 45 / 60 / 75% of Phantom Assassin's attack damage as physical damage and applying attack effects from items and abilities.
language.lore: The first skill learned by the Sisters of the Veil often signals an incoming hit.
notes: If an attack effect is chance-based, the chance of its application will be the same as its chance to occur.
Spell-immune enemies are not affected by Stifling Dagger's slow.
Stifling Dagger grants vision around its location while it travels and upon impact.
