description: Teleports to a unit, friendly or enemy, and grants bonus attack speed while attacking if it's an enemy unit.
language.lore: Mortred's silken veil is the last thing her unfortunate target sees.

description: Phantom Assassin blurs her body, disjointing incoming projectiles, increasing her movement speed, causing her to be impossible to see until she comes near enemy heroes or towers.
language.lore: Meditation allows a Veiled Sister to carefully anticipate her opponents in combat.
notes: Attacking Roshan with a regular attack will dispel Blur.
language.shardDescription: Decreases Cooldown. Any time Phantom Assassin gets a hero kill, her ability cooldowns advance  of their max cooldown values.

description: Phantom Assassin refines her combat abilities, acquiring a chance of gaining Deadly Focus with each attack. When attacking with Deadly Focus, Phantom Assassin will consume the buff and guarantee a critical hit. Stifling Dagger has a bonus chance to cause Deadly Focus.
language.lore: A divine strike, Mortred honors her opponent by choosing them for death.

description: Templar Assassin becomes highly elusive, gaining a small barrier and bonus to her damage.  The damage and avoidance effects are separate, and have a limited number of instances. If a barrier is consumed, a new one is created as long as there are charges left. If an instance of damage would deal more damage than the remaining barrier, all of the damage is absorbed.
language.lore: Manipulating her psionic veil, Lanaya bends nature's law to her will.
notes: Damage as HP Removal bypasses Refraction (it won't reduce the charges).

description: Templar Assassin conceals herself, becoming invisible as long as she remains still. If Meld's invisibility is broken by attacking an enemy, Lanaya's attack will deal bonus damage to the enemy and reduce their armor for 6 seconds.
language.lore: Lanaya is as elusive as her covenant with the Hidden Temple.
notes: Meld is broken by any action other than staying in position or channeling Psionic Projection.
Meld's armor reduction does not work against towers.

description: Templar Assassin's psi blades slice through the attacked unit, splitting and damaging enemy units directly behind it, while gaining bonus attack range. For each unit it damages, the split damage is reduced by a percentage.
language.lore: Her blades pierce the skin as much as the mind, furthering her understanding of the mystery that is reality.
notes: Split damage hits invisible units.
Attack effects like Bash will only be applied to the main target.

description: Templar Assassin places mystical traps that invisibly monitor enemy movement. When sprung at her command, they deal a small amount of damage and exert a slowing influence of 20% in the area. Traps charge up to slow 50% after 3.5 seconds. Deals bonus damage when fully charged.
language.lore: Calling upon the reach of the Hidden Temple, none escape the eye of the Templar.
notes: Traps last indefinitely.
They have invisibility that fades in over 2.0 / 2.0 / 2.0 seconds and spell immunity. They take 2 hits to kill by ranged heroes, 1 by melee heroes, and 4 by creeps.
Traps have 400/400 vision range and don't prevent neutral camps from spawning.
language.shardDescription: Increases max trap count and trap vision range.  When activated, traps now silence affected enemies.

description:
Springs the trap nearest to Templar Assassin, slowing nearby enemies.

If the ability is in alt-cast state, springs the trap that is closest to the mouse cursor.
Springs the trap, slowing nearby enemies.
Deals damage to the unit that kills the Necronomicon Warrior.
Reveals invisible units.
Mana burned per hit, a portion of which is dealt as damage.
Launches an arrow that burns away the targeted unit's mana, dealing damage equal to the amount of mana burned.
Increases movement of nearby units.
Returns the courier to base
Transfer items to hero
Return items to stash
Retrieve items from stash
Summons a protective shield around the courier
The courier gains a burst of speed for 6 seconds
Roshan will block one targeted spell every 15 seconds. Also reduces status effects by 25%.
Roshan has a chance to stun on attack.
Roshan slams the ground, damaging and slowing all nearby enemies. Slam's damage will increase every minute.

Roshan possesses numerous protective abilities, including 55%% magic damage resistance, the ability to reduce damage from attacking illusions, and a scaling armor bonus that increases as time goes on.
Intensifies Viper's venom, adding an effect to his normal attack that applies a stacking movement speed slow and magic resistance deduction while dealing damage over time. Stacks up to 6 times.
language.lore: The Netherdrake's inborn toxic breath quickly drains the vitality of its afflicted.
language.shardDescription: Increases max stacks, and causes Poison Attack to lower armor per stack and to affect buildings for reduced damage.

description: Viper releases a Nethertoxin at the targeted area. Units in that area take an increasing damage over time based on how long they remain in it. Units in it have their attack speed slowed.
language.lore: Poison from the Nether Reaches turns wounds into fatalities, and fatigue into death.
notes: Multiple Nethertoxins do not stack.

description: Viper exudes an infectious toxin that damages and slows the attack speed of any enemy that damages it in a 1200 radius. The acid exudate also increases Viper's resistance to magic.
language.lore: It is not unusual for sword and shield alike to corrode in the very hands of those who attack the Netherdrake.
notes: Stacks multiplicatively with other magic damage resistance sources.
Break prevents the application of Corrosive Skin. Does not disable Corrosive Skin application from Nosedive.
language.aghanimDescription: Corrosive Skin applies x the attack speed slow to enemies that are within  distance of Viper.

description: Viper slows the targeted enemy unit's movement and attack speed while also disabling their passives and dealing poison damage over time. The slowing effect reduces over the duration of the poison.
language.lore: Once used to slay his sadistic summoner, the most powerful of Netherdrake infections spreads through the veins of those foolish enough to cross Viper.

description: Calls a beam of lunar energy down upon an enemy, damaging and briefly stunning them.
language.lore: Selemene smites those who encroach upon the Nightsilver Woods.

description: Empowers Luna's glaives, causing her attacks to bounce between enemy units. Deals less damage with each bounce.
language.lore: Carefully sharpened, Luna's boomerang-like weapon cuts a wide swath through enemy numbers.
notes: Moon Glaives do not proc any attack modifier except Critical Strikes.

description: Grants 1 attack damage per level to Luna and nearby allied heroes, with Luna receiving double the attack damage bonuses. At night, Lunar Blessing is global, and Luna is blessed with 250 bonus night vision + 25 per level.
language.lore: The Goddess of the Moon smiles upon her kin.

description: Showers random nearby enemies with strikes from Luna's current level of Lucent Beam. These beams do not stun their targets, and there is a maximum number of times that a single target can be struck. Also turns day into night for a short time.
language.lore: In times of great need, Selemene herself descends into the world, blocking out the light and hope of the opposed.
notes: Eclipse doesn't work if Luna doesn't have any points in Lucent Beam.
Beams will stop if Luna is killed.
Will not hit invisible units.
There is a 0.6 / 0.6 / 0.6 seconds gap between beams, 0.3 seconds with scepter.
language.aghanimDescription: Allows Luna to cast Eclipse on an allied unit or herself and have its effects follow them, or cast it on an area. Increases total beams, reduces duration, removes the limit on beams per unit, and makes the beams appear twice as fast.

description: Unleashes a breath of fire in front of Dragon Knight that burns enemies and reduces the damage their attacks deal.
language.lore: Knight Davion's breath has become that of the mighty Eldwurm Slyrak, remembered for burning numerous other knights to a crisp.
notes: Hits units up to 900 away.
Does not trigger spell block or spell reflect.

description: Dragon Knight smites an enemy unit in melee range with his shield, stunning it and dealing damage. When in Elder Dragon Form, the cast range increases to 450.
language.lore: Davion's combination of dragon talents and knightly skills makes him a vicious opponent in melee combat.

description: The life blood of the Dragon improves Dragon Knight's attacks. When in Dragon form, these effects are stronger.
language.lore: Slyrak's blood still courses through Davion's veins, giving him twice the vitality of an ordinary knight.

description: Dragon Knight takes the form of one of three powerful elder dragons. Increases movement speed, attack damage, and Wyrm's Wrath effects. Attacks apply Wyrm's Wrath on-hit effects and a percentage of the attack damage to all enemies near the target. Increases Dragon Tail range. Increases health regeneration and armor bonuses from Dragon Blood.
language.lore: The dormant dragon power springs forth from within Davion, combining the powers of a legendary knight with a legendary Eldwurm.
notes: Cooldowns of items that are different for ranged and melee units will be based on which form Dragon Knight was in when the item was used.
language.aghanimDescription: Increases the level of Dragon Form by adding a Level 4 Black Dragon, that provides free pathing, increases damage, and increases effectiveness of the Wyrm's Wrath attacks.

description: Releases a cone of poison that strikes multiple enemy units. Deals damage over time and slows the targets. Anytime the targets get attacked by Dazzle, the debuff duration is refreshed and slow is increased.
language.lore: One of the few Dezun rites used for offensive purposes, the paralytic enchantment often proves useful.
notes: The damage is not reduced by damage block abilities.
language.shardDescription: Causes Poison Touch to hex affected targets for %hex_duration% seconds.

description: An ally blessed with Shallow Grave, no matter how close to death, cannot die while under its protection. Healing on that ally is also amplified for the duration based on the hero's HP.
language.lore: Only a seasoned acolyte of the Shadow can properly perform the rite of preventing death.
notes: HP cannot go below 1 while under the effects of Shallow Grave, but Axe's Culling Blade will still kill the hero.

description: Sends out a bolt of power that arcs between allies, healing them while damaging any enemy units standing nearby.  Dazzle is always healed by Shadow Wave.
language.lore: While it is a simplistic and routine rite among Shadow Priests, the Shadow Wave is also the most critical for success.
notes: Prioritizes allied heroes over creeps.
If enemies are near multiple allied units affected by Shadow Wave, they will take multiple instances of damage.
language.aghanimDescription: Shadow Wave can now target and bounce between enemies in addition to allies. When bouncing to an enemy, they will take damage and heal nearby allies equal to 100 of the normal healing and damage values. Dazzle will also perform an attack against any enemy that Shadow Wave bounces to.

description: Discharges high-powered shrapnel at random nearby enemy units, dealing minor magical damage and ministun.
language.lore: Some of Rattletrap's contraptions don't quite work correctly, so detonating them proves useful as an offensive maneuver.
notes: Remains active if Clockwerk is disabled.

description:
Forms a ring of energized cogs around Clockwerk, trapping any units that are near. Enemies outside the trap that touch a cog are knocked back, losing health and mana. Once a cog has delivered a shock, it will power down. Damage is increased by 50% of the mana burned.

Cogs can be destroyed by enemy attacks, but Clockwerk can push them up to 1000 distance away with one hit.
language.lore: One of Clockwerk's inventions of which he is most proud is the power cog - though it is sometimes despised by his allies.
notes: Cogs can shock invisible units.

description: Fires a global range flare that explodes over a given area. Upon impact, enemies in the area take damage and are briefly slowed. Rocket flare provides vision over the impact area for 6.0 seconds.
language.lore: What started as a festive display has become a useful scouting and bombardment tool.

description: Fires a grappling device rapidly at the target location. If the hook hits a unit, Clockwerk launches himself into the target, stunning and dealing damage to everyone in a 175 radius around the hit target. Any enemies Clockwerk collides with along the way are damaged and stunned.
language.lore: A somewhat unwieldy device, the Hookshot sends the otherwise clunky Clockwerk armor flying through the air.
notes: Hookshot will latch and take Clockwerk to allies, but not damage or disable them.

description: Splits the earth under enemies. Deals damage and stuns for a short duration.
language.lore: Twisting nature to his vile will, the shifting earth consumes those unlucky enough to cross Leshrac's path.
notes: Split Earth will destroy trees in its area of effect.
There is a 0.35 second delay before the effect is applied.
language.shardDescription: Causes Split Earth to repeat in the same location  additional times, with a  second delay between each one. Each time the radius increases by . Split Earth echo location is visible to both teams.

description: Saturates the area around Leshrac with magical explosions that deal pure damage to enemy units and buildings.  The fewer units available to attack, the more damage those units will take.
language.lore: Chronoptic energy bursts from one plane to the other, evaporating anything it touches.
notes: The explosions will continue even if Leshrac is killed.

description: Summons a lightning storm that blasts the target enemy unit, then strikes any nearby enemy units. Struck enemies have their move speed slowed.
language.lore: The Tormented Soul's mastery of the elements is evident in the massive storms that strike down armies before him.

description: Creates waves of damaging energy around Leshrac, one per second, to damage nearby enemy units. Drains Leshrac's mana with each pulse.
language.lore: If necessary, the Tormented Soul can manipulate space time itself, ravaging lesser beings.

description: Sprouts a ring of trees around a unit, damaging and trapping it in place and providing vision in a 250 radius.
language.lore: Verdant overgrowth is a common ailment reported by Nature's Prophet's attackers.
notes: Sprout can be cast on any unit, or the ground.
Trees created by Sprout have the same interactions with abilities as regular trees.

description: Teleports to any point on the map. Gains a barrier after arriving to its destination.
language.lore: The Prophet keeps his sentinel over the forest, protecting it when in need.
notes: Mana and cooldown take effect when the cast is completed.  Nature's Prophet will not use any mana or waste the cooldown if the spell is interrupted while casting.
When the cast begins, an effect is created at the target location, which is visible to allies and enemies.

description: Converts an area of trees into Treants under the command of Nature's Prophet.
language.lore: Verodicia bestowed the Prophet with the ability to summon the Treant Guard, a mythical sentient army of the wild.
notes: Nature's Call can only create as many treants as there are trees in the target area.

description: Damaging energy bounces around the map, striking enemies that are in vision starting with those closest to the cast point. Each enemy hit beyond the first adds damage, up to the maximum after 16 are hit.
language.lore: Nature's Prophet calls Verodicia's fury to strike down those who might ravage the wilderness.
notes: Wrath of Nature will not hit units out of vision.
Can be cast through the minimap; the nearest valid target will be selected.
language.aghanimDescription: Entangles all enemies it hits. Duration scales from s up to s seconds at max bounce.

description: Launch into a maddened rage, becoming Debuff Immune and increasing magic resistance.
DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
language.lore: The madness and brutality of N'aix makes him a vicious and unrelenting foe in combat.

description: Lifestealer's attacks deal damage and provide heal for a percentage of his target's max health. Allows Lifestealer to attack allied creeps at 75% health. Lifestealer gains permanent max HP whenever he kills a creep or hero.
language.lore: After escaping from his cell in Devarque, N'aix subsisted on flesh and bones of those unfortunate to cross his path.
notes: Works on allies and enemies. Does not affect Roshan.
The heal is independent of the damage.
Amount healed is amplified by Lifesteal Amplification.
Break disables the gaining of new stacks.
Break does not disable the bonuses from existing stacks.

description: Lifestealer rends an enemy unit, slowing the victim's movement speed and allowing all allies to regain health for a percentage of the damage they deal to that unit. The victim recovers movement speed over the duration.
language.lore: Fresh wounds and the scent of blood often draw out the scavengers to finish the job.
notes: Open Wounds slows over 8 different steps: 50% / 50% / 40% / 30% / 20% / 10% / 10% / 10%, with the slow decreasing one step per second.
The amount healed is amplified by Lifestealer's Lifesteal Amplification.

description: Lifestealer infests the body of a target unit, becoming undetectable, and healing for a portion of his max hitpoints every second while inside. He can then explode from the host body, dealing damage to nearby enemies. If the infested unit is an enemy creep or a neutral creep, he can take control of the unit's ability to move and attack, and the creep loses a portion of their max hitpoints over time. Does not work on enemy heroes.
DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
language.lore: With this infestation, N'aix consumes the life blood of the host, restoring him back to full unholy power.
notes: Lifestealer gains experience while under the effects of Infest.
Creeps that are controlled while Infested gain Infest's movement speed bonus.
Does not trigger spell reflect.
Infesting an enemy hero with Aghanim's Scepter will deal Gorestorm damage based on all damage that Lifestealer dealt to the host during the Infest duration.
language.aghanimDescription: Increases cast range and reduces cooldown to %bonus_AbilityCooldown%s.  Infest may target enemy heroes for a short duration, attacking them from the inside while increasing Lifestealer's regeneration rate.
language.shardDescription: Infest explosion applies a %bonus_open_wounds_duration_pct% duration Open Wounds to enemies in the damage radius.

description: Lifestealer eats the host body from the inside out, exploding from within.
Dark Seer creates a vacuum over the target area that sucks in enemy units, disrupting them and dealing damage.
language.lore: Ish'Kafel modifies the center of gravity to a place of his choosing.
notes: This ability interrupts channeling.
Pulls units over 0.3 / 0.4 / 0.5 / 0.6 seconds before dealing damage.
Trees near the center of the vacuum will be destroyed.

description: Surrounds the target unit with a bristling shield that damages enemy units in an area around it.
language.lore: The Dark Seer slices holes into the 'Land Behind the Wall,' causing prismatic energy to seep forth.
notes: Deals small amounts of damage in 0.2 second intervals.
Doesn't damage the target it is cast on.
If cast on a unit that already has Ion Shell, the new Shell replaces the old one.

description: Charges a target friendly unit with power, giving it a brief burst of phased movement speed. Allows the unit to reach maximum movement speed and cannot be slowed.
language.lore: Ish'Kafel once used his speed of mind to navigate the maze between the walls.
notes: Units with Surge cannot be slowed unless the Surge effect is removed.
language.shardDescription: Surged units leave behind a 0 radius trail that lasts s, slows enemies around it by  and deals  damage per second in s intervals. Can be put on alt-cast to disable the trail.

description: Raises a wall of warping light that slows, damages, and creates replicas of any enemy hero who crosses it. Enemy replicas serve at the Dark Seer's will. Replicas last until they are destroyed, or until the wall's duration ends.
language.lore: The Dark Seer, while unable to return to his natural realm, can channel part of the prismatic wall with powerful strength of mind, sowing confusion amongst enemy ranks.
notes: Doesn't create illusions from other illusions.
There cannot be more than one illusion per player per wall.
Wall of Replica will not slow spell-immune enemies.

description: CHANNELED - Clinkz channels and shoots multiple piercing arrows in the target direction that hit all enemy units dealing a percentage of Clinkz' attack damage and applying attack modifiers, and dousing enemies with Tar Bomb slow.
language.lore: It's hard to say whether the blur around the Bone Fletcher is from his flaming heart or his speed with the quiver.
notes: Bonus Attack Range increases the length of Burning Barrage.

description: Imbues Clinkz's arrows with fire for extra damage.
language.lore: Clinkz simply lights his arrows from his flaming essence for quite the destructive effect.
notes: Searing Arrows deal damage to structures.
The damage is directly added to Clinkz' attack damage, as physical damage.

description: Clinkz moves invisibly through units until the moment he attacks or uses items. Leaving Skeleton Walk creates Skeleton Archers.
language.lore: With a burst of fire and puff of smoke, the Bone Fletcher was nowhere to be seen.
notes: Has a fadetime of 0.6 / 0.6 / 0.6 seconds.

description:
Clinkz consumes the target enemy creep or friendly Skeleton Archer and creates a Skeleton Archer in their place, healing and gaining max health. Does not take Clinkz out of Skeleton Walk.

Only one archer can be summoned from Death Pact at a time.
language.lore: Sutherex' bond of life and death has become a part of Clinkz, and his old bones are refreshed with repetition of the pact on lesser beings.
notes: If the target is an enemy, Clinkz will gain the correct experience and gold.
Increases Clinkz' current and max HP.
When the duration ends, max HP returns to normal, but current HP stays the same.

description: Instantly heals a friendly unit and damages all nearby enemy units.
language.lore: Priests of the Omniscience are adept at removing impurities from fellow warriors.
language.shardDescription: After a 0s delay, the target is Purified again with 0 effectiveness.

description: Degenerates the movement capabilities of enemy units that stray too near.
language.lore: The holy embodiment of Purist Thunderwrath is enough to weaken those of lesser faith.
notes: Does not affect Debuff Immune units.

description: Omniknight calls upon a Guardian Angel that grants immunity from physical damage to allied units in an area.
language.lore: The All Seeing One casts down his protection over those that Purist calls friend.
language.aghanimDescription: Guardian Angel has global cast range, increased radius, and affects buildings. Amplifies health regeneration and incoming heals for the duration.

description: Enchantress beguiles her enemies, slowing their attacks when she is attacked.
language.lore: After attacking Aiushtha, most opponents are overwhelmed with guilt having attacked such a natural beauty.
notes: All units who directly attack Enchantress will get slowed.
The slow is applied on the attacking unit when the attack starts, not when damage is applied.

description: Enchantress charms an enemy. If the enemy is a hero, they are dispelled and slowed for 3.5 / 4 / 4.5 / 5s.
If the enemy is a creep, she brings it under her control and receives 35% of their experience bounty. Enchantress can control creeps for up to 30 / 60 / 90 / 120s.
DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
language.lore: A true steward of the forest, Aiushtha befriends all within it - from lowly trolls to powerful centaurs.
notes: Illusions can be converted.
language.aghanimDescription: Enchantress can control multiple creeps at a time.

description: A cloud of wisps heals Enchantress and any friendly units nearby.
language.lore: Whimsical spirits of the woods possess a healing power that is quite subtle, but gains strength in numbers.
notes: Units with full HP will not be selected for the heal.
Break disables Overprotective Wisps.

description: Places an enchantment on each attack while activated, causing it to deal additional damage based on how far away the target is.  The farther the target, the greater the damage dealt. Deals double damage to illusions.
language.lore: While Aiushtha favors peaceful means, she is capable of a magical onslaught from a distance, her spears gaining energy from the natural life around her.
notes: The damage is capped at 1750 distance.
Distance to target is measured when the projectile hits.

description: Huskar sets his spears aflame, dealing damage over time with his regular attack.  Multiple attacks will stack additional damage.  Each attack drains some of Huskar's health.
language.lore: The Sacred Warrior ignites his weaponry after marking it with his own blood - causing far greater pain than he himself feels.
notes: Burning Spear stacks additively when used multiple times on one target.  There is no cap.
Huskar cannot kill himself with this skill.
Incendiary does not deal extra Max Health Burn Damage to Roshan.
language.aghanimDescription: Burning Spears launches an additional %multishot_targets% spears onto random enemies within Huskar's attack range.

description: Huskar's injuries feed his power, giving increased attack speed, magic resistance and health regen based on missing health. Health regen is a percentage of your strength.
language.lore: After losing his birthright, Huskar gained a lethality in physical combat that is only heightened as his own blood is spilled.
notes: Bonuses are provided linearly, no bonus at Full HP and full bonus at strictly less than 12% HP.

description: Huskar draws upon his health to break an enemy's life, leaping at a target to shatter a percentage of that hero's current health and slow both their movement and attack speed.  While leaping, Huskar is Debuff Immune and has 60%% increased magic resistance.
DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
language.lore: No matter the danger, Huskar thrusts himself into melees that only he can survive.
notes: If Huskar is disabled during the charge or the target moves more than 1400 units in 0.015 seconds, the charge stops.
Slow works on Spell Immune units.
Life Break cannot be disjointed.
language.aghanimDescription: Forces the enemy target to attack Huskar and increases cast range.

description: Creates a damaging void that slows an enemy unit and deals damage. At night, Void also mini-stuns, interrupting channeling abilities, and its effects lasts longer.
language.lore: Balanar creates a vortex of infinite night, tearing opponents violently into the eternal darkness that once was.
notes: Void does not ministun enemies during the day.

description: Night Stalker horrifies all nearby enemies, causing them to become silenced and take damage over time while near him.  The effect lasts longer at night.
language.lore: A vision of the twisted maw of Balanar etches itself into the minds of the poor souls unlucky enough to cross his path.
language.aghanimDescription: Reduces cooldown of Crippling Fear and it becomes a toggled ability that takes a percentage of max mana per second to maintain after the initial duration time.

description: Night Stalker is in his element at night, attacking and moving with great swiftness.
language.lore: The hunting prowess of Balanar improves as the night beckons.
language.shardDescription: Hunter in the Night may be cast on a creep, instantly killing it and restoring some of Night Stalker's maximum health and mana. Cannot target ancients during the daytime.

description: Night Stalker smothers the sun and summons instant darkness, so that he might use his powers at their fullest. Night Stalker gains flight and bonus damage during this time. Has unobstructed vision.
language.lore: It is a humbling sight to see when the mightiest of warriors become afraid of the dark.

description: Broodmother injects her young into an enemy unit, dealing damage and slowing them for 4 seconds. The spiderlings will hatch if the target is killed while under this influence.
language.lore: Black Arachnia continues to raise her young, even amidst the field of combat.  The brood quickly learns how to support their mother.
notes: If the target is killed within 20 seconds of being hit with this skill, the Spiderlings will spawn.
Units killed by Spiderlings will then give birth to additional Spiderlings.

description:
Spins a large web that grants Broodmother a passive movement speed increase and increases her Turn Rate, while in its vicinity, as well as giving free movement.

Spin Web can be cast from anywhere as long as the new web touches an existing web. Webs never expire, and can be manually destroyed. When the maximum limit of webs is exceeded, the oldest web disappears.
language.lore: Weaving a bed of silken fibers, Arachnia's web both protects her and her offspring, as well as giving advancing opponents a sense of foreboding.
notes: Also affects Spiderlings.

description: Broodmother's venom cripples enemy units, causing her attacks to slow and giving the affected unit a chance to miss its attacks and extra damage from attacks.
language.lore: Paralytic toxins come from Black Arachnia's fangs, causing a slow and painful death to those who intrude on her webs.
notes: The miss chance stacks with evasion and terrain dodge chance.

description: A violent lust for vital fluids increases Broodmother's attack damage and gives her a vampiric attack.
language.lore: While most of her prey is wrapped in silken cocoons and saved for her young, the Broodmother herself has a taste for wandering heroes.
language.shardDescription: Increases duration. While Hunger is active, the bonus damage is increased by 0 every s.

description: Applies debuff on attack. If debuffed unit dies, a spiderling will spawn.
Slows enemies with each attack.

Hurls a deadly shuriken at an enemy unit, dealing damage and slowing the target's Movement Speed by %slow%%% for %slow_duration%s.  The shuriken will bounce to any Tracked units who are within a %bounce_aoe% radius of each other.
language.lore: While the shuriken may be small, Gondar's precise aim can cause critical damage.
language.aghanimDescription: Increases cast range and applies Jinada on hit.

description: Bounty Hunter plans his next hit, dealing bonus damage and stealing some unreliable gold.
language.lore: Gondar's vast experience ensures he never walks away from a transaction empty-handed.

description: Bounty Hunter becomes invisible and gains the ability to move through other units until he attacks or uses an ability.  If he breaks the invisibility with an attack, that attack will stun the target for a short duration.
language.lore: The court jesters present during King Goff's assassination can recount no other image than a dancing shadow.
notes: Will not break most channeling of spells upon activation.

description: Tracks an enemy hero, granting True Sight of the target, increasing the damage they take and providing information on how much gold it is carrying. Bounty Hunter moves fast when near the tracked unit. If the target dies, Bounty Hunter and nearby heroes collect a bonus bounty of gold. Casting Track does not take you out of invisibility.
language.lore: Using his elevated senses of sight and smell, Gondar's hits have quite a good chance of success.
notes: Bounty Hunter will get the bonus gold if the target dies while Track is active, regardless of how it died.
Track's effect is only visible to allies.
You can see the amount of gold the target is carrying by mousing over the debuff icon above the target's ability bar.
Bonus gold is reliable gold.

description: Weaver launches a swarm of 12 / 12 / 12 / 12 young Weavers that latch on any enemy unit in their path, attacking and reducing armor until it is killed.
language.lore: Skitskurr opens a gap in the space time fabric, allowing young Weavers to slip through and aid him in combat.
notes: When a beetle latches on a target, it will remain there until it is killed or the duration expires.
Beetles are Spell Immune, but can be killed in 6 / 7 / 8 / 9 attacks from a unit. Heroes deal double damage to beetles.
Beetles provide vision.

description: Weaver shifts out of visibility, gaining max movement speed --doing harm to any enemies it passes through.
language.lore: As the Weavers worked in the fabric of creation, small wormholes allowed them to slip through time to better work their craft.
notes: Can only damage the same unit once per cast.
language.shardDescription: Shukuchi puts a mark on enemies it damages that last 0 seconds. 0s after Weaver exits Shukuchi, enemies with a mark within 0 range will also be attacked with a secondary Geminate attack

description: Allows Weaver to dispatch two attacks at once.
language.lore: Skitskurr's relationship with time is somewhat variable, causing his actions to be witnessed - and felt - more than once.
notes: Additional attacks leave Weaver 0.25 seconds after the previous one, and have no range limit.
Bonus damage only applies to the geminated attack and not the original attack.
language.shardDescription: Geminate Attack will also hit units within  range of the original target that have The Swarm beetles attached to them.

description: Weaver warps backward to whatever position it was in five seconds earlier--regaining the HP and mana from that time. No effect on cooldown, gold or experience.
DISPEL TYPE: Strong Dispel
language.lore: If Skitskurr does not deem the current reality of the world to fit his desires, he simply crawls back in time to right what was wronged.
notes: Removes most negative buffs from Weaver.
Time Lapse disjoints projectiles.
language.aghanimDescription: Time Lapse may target allied Heroes with %abilitycastrange% cast range.

description: The Kobold Foreman's cruel efficiency increases his movement speed and the movement speed of all nearby allies.
The fearsome Hellbear attacks more quickly and bullies nearby allies into following suit.
The Centaur Conqueror's powerful hooves stomp the ground, stunning and damaging nearby enemies. Heroes recover more quickly.

The Vhoul Assassin has soaked his weapons in his own blend of painful predator venoms that causes his enemies' natural regeneration to work against themselves. Heroes recover from the poison more quickly.
An icy blast followed by a wave of fire launches out in a path in front of Jakiro. The ice slows enemies, while the fire delivers damage over time.
language.lore: Pyrexae dragons have tremendously dangerous breath for each branch of the species; combining them is unimaginable.
notes: Can hit units up to 1025 range away.
Has a 0.2 second interval between each breath.
Does not trigger spell block or spell reflect.

description: Creates a path of ice that stuns and damages enemies that touch it.
language.lore: Jakiro's cunning right head calls upon its frozen heritage, glazing the earth with blistering cold.
notes: It takes 0.2 seconds for the path to reach its full extent.
The stun is removed once Ice Path is destroyed.

description: Jakiro burns his enemies in an area of effect with fire added to his attack, while slowing their attacks. Shares a cooldown with Liquid Frost.
language.lore: The left maw of Jakiro opens, laying waste to any in its path.
notes: Works on both units and buildings.
language.shardDescription: Jakiro's Liquid Fire no longer shares a cooldown with Liquid Frost.

description: Jakiro exhales a wide line of lasting flames, which deals damage per second to any enemy units caught in the fire.
language.lore: Ice and fire combine to rip the battlefield to shreds with extreme temperatures.
notes: Units hit by Macropyre will continue to be affected after they leave the area for 1 additional seconds.
language.aghanimDescription: Increases Macropyre duration and causes it to deal Pure damage. Jakiro emits two walls of ice along the edges of the Macropyre that slow any enemies trying to cross them by 0.

description: The Ghost launches an eerie attack that chills her enemies to their bones.
The Hellbear Smasher claps his massive hands together, creating a deafening blast. The blast damages nearby enemies and throws them off their footing.
This creature does not feel the effects of most magical spells.
The Ogre Frostmage summons an invisible layer of icy air that surrounds the target friendly unit, increasing its armor and temporarily slowing any enemies that dare attack it.
The Dark Troll Summoner tosses netting around an enemy's feet, briefly immobilizing the unit, though the unit can still attack and use abilities.
The Dark Troll Summoner stirs the ground underfoot, raising the remains of trolls long dead, bringing to life three skeleton Warriors who will fight at his side.
The Giant Wolf's ferocious attacks occasionally tear a vital tendon, inflicting critical damage.
The cruel Alpha Wolf attacks his enemy's unprotected vitals at every opportunity, inflicting critical damage.
The Alpha Wolf's ruthless attacks do extra damage. His commanding presence inspires nearby allies to attack ruthlessly as well.
The Tornado's overpowering winds slow all nearby enemies, flinging debris at them and inflicting damage every second. Enemies closer to the center of the Tornado take more damage.
CHANNELED - The Wildwing calls on the spirit of the wind, creating a sentient Tornado that he can control. The Tornado slows nearby enemies and does damage. It is invulnerable and can move anywhere.
The Wildwing Ripper's fury numbs it to attacks and inspires nearby allies to withstand more blows.
The Satyr Banisher knows every trick in the book, allowing him to dispel debuffs from allies or buffs from enemies. His trickery also slows the enemy's movement.
DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
notes: Can be cast on invulnerable units.

description: The Satyr Mindstealer removes a fragment of his enemy's soul, burning away mana equal to 20 / 25 / 30 / 35 + 2 / 2.5 / 3 / 4x the target's intelligence, and dealing damage equal to the amount of mana burned.
The Satyr Tormenter tears open an unstable rift to the underworld, creating a shockwave that travels in a line along the ground, dealing damage to enemies it hits.
The Satyr Tormenter's demonic communion allows him to emanate regenerative power, increasing the health regeneration of himself and all nearby allies.
The Hill Troll Priest lays his holy blessing upon the target ally, replenishing some health.
The Harpy Stormcrafter releases a high-voltage bolt of electricity at the target enemy, dealing damage. The bolt jumps to other nearby enemies, losing power with each jump.

Drenches an area in sticky oil, amplifying damage from Batrider's attacks and abilities and slowing the movement speed and turn rate of enemies. Additional casts of Sticky Napalm continue to increase damage, up to 20 stacks. Applies a small amount of damage with each cast.
language.lore: It's not uncommon to hear the Rider cackle while he increases the flammability of his opponents.
notes: All damage from Batrider gets amplified, except for Radiance, Orb of Venom, Urn of Shadows, and Spirit Vessel.
Sticky Napalm does not require turning to cast.
Sticky Napalm deals 20% damage to creeps.
language.shardDescription:
Sticky Napalm no longer has a stack limit.

Sticky Napalm deals damage to structures.

description: Hurls an explosive cocktail that explodes when it reaches the target location, knocking back, slowing and dealing damage over time to enemies in the area.
language.lore: A molotov cocktail is the weapon of choice for Batrider.

description: Batrider takes to the skies, laying down a trail of flames from the air.  The fire damages any enemies it touches, and destroys trees below Batrider.
language.lore: When an enemy escapes into the Yama Raskav Jungle, most would cut through the brush to find the fugitive.  Batrider just chooses to destroy the jungle along with his foes.
notes: During this the Batrider can fly above units, trees and impassable terrain.
If duration ends when above impassable terrain, the Batrider can get stuck.
The trail persists through Batrider's death.

description: Lassoes an enemy and drags them in Batrider's wake. Dragged units cannot move, attack, or use abilities.  Teleporting or blinking will break the lasso.
language.lore: Few dare to ask to ride on the bat, as Batrider gives them free of charge.
notes: Killing the target or the Batrider will break the lasso before its expiration.
If Batrider moves more than 425 units in 0.05 seconds the lasso breaks.
Batrider cannot attack while using Flaming Lasso.
language.aghanimDescription: Flaming Lasso grabs both its target, as well as the target's nearest allied hero within  units. The secondary target is tethered to the first.

description: The Black Dragon's explosive attacks are felt by all nearby enemies.
Forces an enemy unit to move slower and for allies to attack it more quickly. Chen can attack the Penitence target with bonus attack range.
language.lore: Although Chen's brand of animal enthrallment isn't quite strong enough to control the minds of enemy heroes, it still tests their resolve in combat.

description: Chen takes control of an enemy or neutral creep and receives a percentage of its bounty. Its maximum health is set to 400 + 50 per Chen Level. Converted creeps will have increased movement speed and bonus damage.
language.lore: Although they may not be knights, Chen incorporates beasts into the Fold in the same way he himself was converted.
notes: Persuading a new creep above max unit count causes the oldest persuaded creep to die.
Can target Ancient creeps when Chen has Aghanim's Shard.
The health of creeps already under Chen's control does not update to the new level upon leveling Holy Persuasion further.
Fully restores the creep's mana upon converting.
language.shardDescription: Allows Holy Persuasion to target Ancient creeps. Can control up to 1/2/3 Ancient creeps based on Hand of God's level. Additionally levels up some abilities of creeps by 1 level.

description: Heals all allied heroes on the map as well as all units under Chen's control. A large heal is applied at first and a slow heal over time is applied for 10 seconds afterwards.
language.lore: Using the mental link with his thralls, Chen calls down restoration and well-being to those who share his fanaticism.
notes: Can heal invulnerable and hidden/banished allies.
language.aghanimDescription: Decreases the cooldown of Hand of God to 150 130 110s and it becomes a chanelled spell that lasts for up to  seconds. The initial heal happens at the start of the channel, and while channeling other nearby allied units become debuff immune with  magic resistance and the power of the heal over time is increased by .

description: The Ancient Thunderhide slams his mammoth body against the ground. The shock damages nearby enemies and throws them off their footing. Heroes regain their balance more quickly.
The Ancient Thunderhide works an ally into a frenzy, causing his ally to have increased attack speed.

Spectre flings a dagger to draw a Shadow Path, dealing damage and slowing the movement speed of any enemies along the trail. Units hit by the dagger also trail a Shadow Path. While treading the path, Spectre moves faster and phases through otherwise impassable terrain.
language.lore: Mercurial's dagger eclipses the physical plane in shadow, a state in which mortals cower, but spectres thrive.
notes: There is a 1.0 second grace period after leaving the path where no collision is preserved.
Does not trigger spell block or spell reflect.

description: Deals bonus damage whenever Spectre attacks an enemy that does not have any allied units within a 350 radius around them.
language.lore: Often times, warriors find themselves alone with a vision of Mercurial - the fated question is if it is the true Spectre.
notes: Damage is dealt before Spectre's attack.
Spectre's illusions also have Desolate.

description: Damage done to Spectre is reflected on her enemies, leaving her unharmed. The effect lessens with distance.
language.lore: A daunting task lies before enemies of Mercurial - killing a shadow with blade and magic.
notes: The reflected damage is not dealt to Spectre.
Illusions don't get this ability.
Damage is reflected before reductions, and is returned as the same damage type.
language.shardDescription: Dispersion can be activated to increase the amount absorbed and reflected by Dispersion by 0% of its base values for 0s. Cooldown 0. Manacost 0.

description: Creates a spectral nemesis to attack each enemy hero. Illusions spawned from this ability follow the same rules as Shadow Step illusions and can also be swapped to by using Reality.
language.lore: At the height of combat, Mercurial's physical manifestation shatters, and the shadowy pieces haunt those who still cling to life.

description: Spectre exchanges places with a chosen Haunt.
language.lore: The scattered shadows unite into the one true Spectre.

description: Consumes an enemy or neutral creep, acquiring any special abilities that it possessed. If alt-cast is deactivated, Doom will not acquire the creep's abilities. Duration is equal to the cooldown.
language.lore: Lucifer's appetite and greed are never sated.
notes: Gives Doom the original bounty of the creep, along with the bonus gold.
If you devour a creep without abilities, you'll keep the abilities you had previously.

description: Carpets the nearby earth in flames which damage enemies, while also granting him increased movement speed.
language.lore: The Fallen One spreads destruction in his wake, sparing none from the flame which sustains him.
notes: Scorched Earth follows Doom, centered on his location.
language.shardDescription: Heals Doom and his controlled units for 0 of the damage value.

description: Doom swings his burning sword, igniting the enemy. Stuns for 0.6 seconds and applies a 4 second burn that deals a base damage plus a percentage of the target's Max HP as damage per second.
language.lore: Lucifer shares the fire branding bestowed upon him at the time of his exile.
notes: Interrupts channeling abilities.

description: Inflicts a curse that dispels an enemy and prevents them from casting spells or healing in any way, while taking damage over time.
DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
language.lore: When a name is tolled from the bell of Vashundol, doom is sure to follow.
language.aghanimDescription: Allies in a 0 radius around the doomed target also suffer the effects of Doom. Allows Doom to be self-cast to affect enemies around himself with Doom.

description: This slot will be replaced with abilities acquired using Devour.
This slot will be replaced with abilities acquired using Devour.

Places Death Rime Stacks on an enemy that can be dispelled by moving away from the initial cast point.  If the enemy unit doesn't move outside of the given range, it will be stunned and frozen in place after 4 seconds.
language.lore: Kaldr's presence draws those around him into a frozen void, threatening to lock them in an icy prison for eternity.
notes: Deals damage every half second.

description: Creates a vortex of icy energy that applies Death Rime Stacks and increases magic damage done to enemies in its range.
language.lore: Frozen, caustic winds are at the whim of Kaldr, chilling the field of battle.
notes: Provides vision in a small area where it is placed.

description: Enhances Ancient Apparition's attack with increased range and heavy magic damage. Applies a Death Rime Stack that lasts for 3 seconds. Additionally applies a 100% slow for 0.7 / 0.8 / 0.9 / 1 seconds.
language.lore: The Ancient Apparition's eternal knowledge brings a frigid enchantment to his attacks.
language.aghanimDescription: Removes cooldown and reduces manacost by %bonus_AbilityManaCost%.

description: Launches a tracer toward any location on the battlefield, which must be triggered again to mark the area to be blasted by a damaging explosion of hail. The further the tracer travels, the larger the explosion will be. Enemies caught in the explosion, or who touch the icy ball of hail as it travels, are Frostbitten, gaining Death Rime Stacks and prevented from regenerating or healing. If a Frostbitten unit's health drops below a certain percentage, they will instantly shatter.
language.lore: Ice storms from ages past flow through Kaldr's frosty limbs, crashing into the world and turning its inhabitants into monuments to his eternal power.
notes: Upon cast, this ability is replaced by Release, used to stop the tracer on the target area.
The area of effect is 275 + 50.0*TimeTraveled, capped at 1000.
Kill will be granted to the source of the damage that triggers the shatter.
The shatter effect doesn't work on illusions.
The HP Freeze prevents most kinds of healing, including the fountain, except Sunder, Time Lapse and Supernova.
language.shardDescription: Freezes enemies hit with the current level of Cold Feet for 0% of the duration.

description: Releases the ice blast to explode at the tracer's current location. Can be cast while silenced.
Structure takes reduced damage, and quickly regenerates any damage taken while no enemy creeps are nearby.
Structure takes reduced damage, and quickly regenerates any damage taken while no enemy creeps are nearby.
Inflicts a poison that slows attack and movement speeds.

Spirit Breaker fixes his sight on an enemy unit and starts charging through all objects, starting at 25% of the bonus speed and reaching his max speed after 1.5s.

All enemy units passed through and the targeted unit will be hit by a Greater Bash. If the targeted unit dies, Spirit Breaker will change his target to the nearest enemy unit to that location.
language.lore: Barathrum erupts from the darkness with unwieldy force.
notes: Spirit Breaker passes through trees, cliffs, and units.
The charge indicator is visible only to allies.
Spirit Breaker gains shared vision of the target.
language.shardDescription: Increases Charge of Darkness Bonus Speed by %bonus_movement_speed%.

description: Gives a chance to stun and knockback an enemy unit on an attack. Deals a percentage of movement speed as damage.
language.lore: The signature strike of Barathrum's ghostly ball and chain.
notes: Does not stack with Skull Basher.
Break disables the passive percent Chance to Bash. Does not disable Greater Bash application from Charge of Darkness or Nether Strike.

description: Spirit Breaker slips into the nether realm, reappearing next to his hapless victim. Upon reappearing, a Greater Bash of the current level occurs and deals bonus damage. Knocks back for double the normal distance.
language.lore: Barathrum temporarily returns to the realm from where he came, bringing with him the retribution of both worlds.
notes: Spirit Breaker appears behind the target to deliver the bash.

description: Ursa leaps forward 250 units and slams the earth, causing a powerful shock to damage and slow all enemy units in a nearby area for 4.0 seconds.
language.lore: The very steps of a male ursine shake the ground as well as the resolve of opposing warriors.
language.shardDescription: Earthshock applies a  second Enrage on Ursa when cast.

description: Using his skill in combat, Ursa gains increased attack speed and slow resistance for a number of subsequent attacks.
language.lore: For a behemoth of his size, Ursa is deceptively nimble.
notes: Missing an attack still consumes a charge of Overpower.

description: Ursa's claws dig deeper wounds in the enemy, causing consecutive attacks to the same enemy to deal more damage. If the same target is not attacked after 8 / 12 / 16 / 20 seconds, the bonus damage is lost.
language.lore: In nature, the wounded rarely survive the attacks of hungry predators.
notes: Break disables the application of new stacks.
Break does not disable the effects of existing stacks.

description: Ursa goes into a frenzy, providing damage reduction and status resistance. Removes any existing debuffs.
DISPEL TYPE: Strong Dispel
language.lore: Ulfsaar succumbs to his ancient spirit, becoming the most ferocious creature on the battlefield.
language.aghanimDescription: Reduces cooldown and allows Ursa to use Enrage while disabled.

description: Launches a salvo of rockets at nearby enemy units in a radius around the Gyrocopter. Lasts 3 seconds.
language.lore: Aurel's new craft has an increased payload for rockets, enhancing their rapid-fire capabilities.
notes: Rocket Barrage can't hit units Gyrocopter has no vision over.
Rocket Barrage fired from Homing Missiles do not trigger Afterburner.

description: Fires a homing missile to seek the targeted enemy unit. The missile gains speed over time, dealing damage and stunning when it impacts the target. Enemy units can destroy the missile before it reaches its target.
language.lore: The biggest missile Aurel could possibly attach to his craft, The Bomb has carefully calculated aerodynamics and explosives for maximum impact.
notes: Towers do half damage to the missile.
The crosshair effect is visible to allies only.
The missile will follow and hit invisible units.
language.shardDescription: Homing Missiles now constantly fires the current level of Rocket Barrage in a  area of effect after  second of being cast. This Rocket Barrage prioritizes the Homing Missile target.

description: Gyrocopter's attacks hit all enemy units in an area around it for a limited number of attacks. Only the main target of attacks will receive attack bonuses such as Critical Strike. Lasts 12 seconds or until the attacks are used.
language.lore: This newly revamped Gyrocopter has attached enough armaments to assault in a 360 degree radius.
notes: Attack range for the primary attack is unchanged.
Break disables Side Gunner.
language.aghanimDescription: Adds a Side Gunner that at random attacks enemy units near Gyrocopter. When Flak Cannon is active, side gunner attacks 2 units instead. Prioritizes furthest unit away within its range.

description: Call down 3 aerial missile strikes that slow and damage enemy units in a target area. Each strike is 500 distance from the previous one.
language.lore: 'Bombs Away!'
notes: The visual indicator is visible to allies only.

description: Sprays high-pressure acid across a target area. Enemy units who step across the contaminated terrain take damage per second and have their armor reduced.
language.lore: Using traditional Alchemy from the Darkbrew family, Razzil concocts an acid that dissolves even the toughest metals.

description: Alchemist brews up an unstable concoction that he can throw at an enemy hero, to stun and deal damage in an area around the explosion. The longer the concoction brews, the more damage it deals and the longer the stun. Alchemist is faster while charging the concoction. After 5.0 seconds, the brew reaches its maximum damage and stun time. However, after 5.5 seconds, the concoction will explode on Alchemist himself if not thrown.
language.lore: A silver lining to the failure of turning a mountain into gold, this volatile solution has destructive potential.
notes: While brewing, this ability is replaced by Unstable Concoction Throw.  Alchemist can move and act normally while brewing.
A timer above Alchemist's head will indicate the remaining brew time. This timer is visible to enemies.
You can deny yourself with this skill.
Unstable Concoction cannot be disjointed and once thrown Unstable Concoction stops brewing.
Unstable Concoction explosion damages heroes and creeps.

description: Throw it before it blows up!

Alchemist synthesizes additional gold from his enemies and bounty runes. With each kill, Alchemist earns base bonus gold and extra bonus gold. If Alchemist kills another unit which yields gold within the next %duration% seconds, an additional instance of Extra Bonus Gold is added to the total. Additionally, causes bounty runes to yield more gold.
language.lore: While it is not a mountain, Razzil has mastered the conversion of smaller compounds to line his pockets.
language.aghanimDescription: Alchemist melts down Aghanim's Scepter to grant an allied hero all Aghanim's Scepter upgrades. Alchemist will gain bonus damage for each gifted Scepter.

description: Alchemist causes his Ogre to enter a chemically induced rage, reducing base attack cooldown and increasing movement speed and health regeneration.
DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
language.lore: The brew Razzil gave to the Ogre during their prison bust has become a useful potion in the midst of combat.
notes: Has a 0.35 second transformation time, which can be used to dodge projectiles and stuns.

description: Allows manipulation of ice elements. Active <font color='#7998b5'>Quas</font> instances imbue Invoker with bonus hp regeneration. Passively grants bonus strength per level of <font color='#7998b5'>Quas</font>.
language.lore: A quelling cold.
notes: Invoker can only have 3 of any instance.
Will not break invisibility and can be cast while channeling.
language.aghanimDescription: Grants 1 current and max level.

description: Allows manipulation of storm elements. Active <font color='#d671a9'>Wex</font> instances imbue Invoker with bonus movement and attack speed. Passively grants bonus agility per level of <font color='#d671a9'>Wex</font>.
language.lore: A withering wind.
notes: Invoker can only have 3 of any instance.
Will not break invisibility and can be cast while channeling.
language.aghanimDescription: Grants 1 current and max level.

description: Allows manipulation of fire elements. Active <font color='#cabe68'>Exort</font> instances imbue Invoker with bonus attack damage. Passively grants bonus intelligence per level of <font color='#cabe68'>Exort</font>.
language.lore: An exacting flame.
notes: Invoker can only have 3 of any instance.
Will not break invisibility and can be cast while channeling.
language.aghanimDescription: Grants 1 current and max level.

description: Casting Invoke will replace this slot with one of ten unique spells based on Invoker's currently active <font color='#7998b5'>Quas</font>, <font color='#d671a9'>Wex</font>, and <font color='#cabe68'>Exort</font> buffs.

Casting Invoke will replace this slot with one of ten unique spells based on Invoker's currently active <font color='#7998b5'>Quas</font>, <font color='#d671a9'>Wex</font>, and <font color='#cabe68'>Exort</font> buffs.

Combines the properties of the elements currently being manipulated to create a new spell for Invoker to use. Invoke cooldown is reduced by 0.3 seconds for each orb level.

Click the help button to see the list of possible spells.
language.lore: So begins a new age of knowledge.
notes: The arrangement of instances does not matter.
Invoke will not cost mana or go on cooldown if the only effect is to swap the positions of existing spells.
Invoke will not break invisibility and can be cast while channeling.

description: Invoker draws the heat from an enemy, chilling them to their very core for a duration based on the level of <font color='#7998b5'>Quas</font>. The enemy will take damage and be briefly frozen. Further damage taken in this state will freeze the enemy again, dealing bonus damage. The enemy can only be frozen so often, but the freeze cooldown decreases based on the level of <font color='#7998b5'>Quas</font>.
language.lore: Sadron's Protracted Frisson.
notes: The freeze stun only triggers on damage greater than 10.0 after reductions.

description: Curses the target area, dealing damage and causing enemy heroes to take damage over time and slowing their movement speed. Silenced enemies take 1.5x slow and damage. Anytime affected enemies cast a spell, the duration is increased. The duration is paused as long as the target is silenced.
language.lore: Nortrom's lack of incantations is less of a problem for him than it is for his adversaries.
notes: Affects creeps.

description: Silencer enchants his glaives with his wisdom, stealing his target's Intelligence with each hit and dealing additional damage based on his Intelligence.
language.lore: Although lacking in traditional incantations, Nortrom's pedigree of the Aeol Drias gives him uncanny wisdom, which he applies to physical combat.

description: Enchants a target, providing vision of them and causing them to be damaged and silenced if they cast a spell or if the enchantment timer expires. Deals extra damage based on the difference in intelligence between Silencer and the target.
language.lore: Nortrom ensures that spells uttered by his opponents will be their last.
notes: Channeling abilities will trigger this effect once the caster finishes its channel.

description: Silencer stops all sound, preventing enemy heroes and units on the map from casting spells.
language.lore: With a shock to the ground, all magic and sound pauses, and Nortrom fulfills his prophecy.
notes: This skill works on invisible and Debuff Immune units, but gaining debuff immunity will remove its effect.
Multiple Arcane Curses from Aghanim's Scepter Global Silence do not stack.
language.aghanimDescription: Global Silence applies Arcane Curse to heroes for the duration of Global Silence.

description: Invoker manipulates the ice and electrical energies around him, rendering his body invisible and gaining health and mana regen. The elemental imbalance created as a consequence slows nearby enemies based on the level of <font color='#7998b5'>Quas</font>, and slows Invoker as well based on the level of <font color='#d671a9'>Wex</font>.
language.lore: Myrault's Hinder-Gast.
notes: The slow effect does not work on Spell Immune enemies.

description: Unleashes a fast moving tornado that picks up enemy units in its path, suspending them helplessly in the air shortly before allowing them to plummet to their doom. Travels further based on the level of <font color='#d671a9'>Wex</font>. Holds enemies in the air for a duration based on the level of <font color='#7998b5'>Quas</font>. Deals base damage plus added damage based on levels in <font color='#d671a9'>Wex</font>.
DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
language.lore: Claws of Tornarus.
notes: Units are invulnerable while affected by Tornado, and the damage is dealt when landing.

description: Invoker builds up a charge of electromagnetic energy at a targeted location which automatically detonates after 2.9 seconds. The detonation covers an area, draining mana based on the level of <font color='#d671a9'>Wex</font>. Deals damage for each point of mana drained. If EMP drains mana from an enemy hero, Invoker gains 25% of the mana drained.
language.lore: Endoleon's Malevolent Perturbation.
notes: Will not affect cycloned units (Tornado or Eul's Scepter of Divinity).

description: Invoker infuses an ally with an immense surge of energy, increasing their attack speed based on the level of <font color='#d671a9'>Wex</font> and their damage based on the level of <font color='#cabe68'>Exort</font>.
language.lore: Gaster's Mandate of Impetuous Strife.

description: Invoker pulls a flaming meteor from space onto the targeted location. Upon landing, the meteor rolls forward, constantly dealing damage based on the level of <font color='#cabe68'>Exort</font>, and rolling further based on the level of <font color='#d671a9'>Wex</font>. Units hit by the meteor will also be set on fire for a short time, receiving additional damage based on the level of <font color='#cabe68'>Exort</font>.
language.lore: Tarak's Descent of Fire.
notes: Deals main damage to enemy units under meteor every 0.5 seconds and burns enemies for smaller damage over 3.0 seconds.
The meteor moves at a speed of 300.

description: Sends a catastrophic ray of fierce energy from the sun at any targeted location, incinerating all enemies standing beneath it once it reaches the earth. Deals damage based on the level of <font color='#cabe68'>Exort</font>, however this damage is spread evenly over all enemies hit.
language.lore: Harlek's Incantation of Incineration.
notes: Gives vision of the target area before the strike.
Invoker gains experience with kills made from Sun Strike, even if made from outside of experience range.

description: Invoker forges a spirit embodying the strength of fire and fortitude of ice. Damage and armor are based on the level of <font color='#cabe68'>Exort</font> while attack range, health, and duration are based on the level of <font color='#7998b5'>Quas</font>. The elemental's scorching attack is capable of melting the armor of enemy heroes. The number of spirits spawned is determined by the lower level of <font color='#7998b5'>Quas</font> and <font color='#cabe68'>Exort</font>.
language.lore: Culween's Most Cunning Fabrications.
notes: Casting this ability will replace currently summoned Forged Spirits.

description: Melts away the armor of heroes hit by the spirit's attack. Each successive hit increases the amount of armor melted.

Generates a wall of solid ice directly in front of Invoker for a duration based on the level of <font color='#7998b5'>Quas</font>. The bitter cold emanating from it greatly slows nearby enemies based on the level of <font color='#7998b5'>Quas</font> and deals damage each second based on the level of <font color='#cabe68'>Exort</font>.
language.lore: Killing Wall of Koryx.

description: Invoker unleashes a mighty sonic wave in front of him, dealing damage to any enemy unit it collides with based on the level of <font color='#cabe68'>Exort</font>. The sheer impact from the blast is enough to knock those enemy units back for a duration based on the level of <font color='#7998b5'>Quas</font>, then disarm their attacks for a duration based on the level of <font color='#d671a9'>Wex</font>.
language.lore: Buluphont's Aureal Incapacitator.

description: Adds extra pure damage to Outworld Destroyer's attacks, based on his remaining mana pool.
language.lore: Harbinger's outworldly knowledge allows it to tap into the ebb and flow of all spiritual energy, infusing it into his being.
notes: The damage is calculated after the mana cost is spent.

description: Places a target unit into an astral prison. The hidden unit is invulnerable and disabled. When the astral prison implodes, it deals damage to the target and steals a percentage of their max mana.
language.lore: Locked away in the pocket between this world and the Outworld, victims realize their infantile knowledge and mortality.
notes: Imprisoned units can still be hit by Sanity's Eclipse.
Max mana steal does not increase Outworld Destroyer's current mana values or directly reduce the victim's mana values.
language.shardDescription: Astral Imprisonment now deals damage in an area. Also allows allies to move at 0 movement speed during Astral Imprisonment (they are visible, but untargettable and can't perform any other actions).

description: Unleashes a psychic blast that deals damage to enemies based on the difference between your mana and the target's mana. Sanity's Eclipse can hit units trapped by Astral Imprisonment. Deals bonus damage to illusions.
language.lore: When an Outworld crystal ruptures, cataclysmic energies are released, and the reverberations of this power are felt interdimensionally.

description: Summons 2 wolves to aid Lycan in battle. At level 3, wolves gain Permanent Invisibility, and at level 4 wolves gain Cripple that gives 20% chance to cripple the target, causing 8 damage per second and lose 60 attack speed for 4 seconds.
language.lore: The very enchantment that twisted his being also summons canine familiars.
notes: Using this spell will replace currently active summoned Wolves.
language.shardDescription: Causes one of your creep waves to include one uncontrollable wolf that moves with the wave. Additionally, wolves spawned this way may Cripple towers.

description: Strikes fear into enemies, reducing armor and attack damage of all enemies within 2000 range of Lycan and his wolves. At night, Howl's armor and attack damage reductions are global.
language.lore: Blood-curdling wolf cries signal to opponents that Banehallow is among them.

description: Increases the HP regeneration and damage of Lycan and all units under his control.
language.lore: His animalistic symbiosis with canine kind gives Banehallow enhanced reflexes and hunting capabilities.

description: Lycan assumes his lupine form, granting him critical strikes and added vision at night. During Shapeshift, Lycan moves at increased speed and cannot be slowed.
language.lore: Forever a slave to his lycanthropy, Banehallow has come to accept his curse, and embrace his own savagery.
notes: Hex doesn't remove Lycan's movement speed.

description: Gives 20% to cripple the target, causing 8 damage per second and lose 60 Attack Speed for 4.0 seconds.
Slams the ground, dealing damage and slowing the movement speed and attack rate of nearby enemy units.
language.lore: A slam of Mangix' mighty keg starts the festivities.

description: Brewmaster can switch stances based on the elements he controls, gaining passive bonuses that improve against enemies when Brewed Up.
<font color=\"#9acd32\">Earth Brawler</font> - Grants 2 / 4 / 6 / 8 armor and 5 / 10 / 15 / 20 Magic Resistance. Bonuses are 2.5x when Brewed Up.
<font color=\"#87ceeb\">Storm Brawler</font> - Grants 15 / 20 / 25 / 30 evasion and 4 / 6 / 8 / 10% Bonus Move Speed. Bonuses are 2.5x when Brewed Up.

<font color=\"#FF0000\">Fire Brawler</font> - Grants 20 chance to critical strike for 120 / 140 / 160 / 180 of your attack damage and 10 / 15 / 20 / 25 Attack Speed. Crit Chance and Attack Speed is 2.5x when Brewed Up.

<font color=\"#662375\">Void Brawler</font> - Grants 5 / 10 / 15 / 20% bonus Status Resistance to Brewmaster and applies a 10 / 15 / 20 / 25 Slow for 2s on attack. Slow and Status Resistance are 2.5x when affected by Cinder Brew.
language.lore: When Mangix won his title as the Brewmaster of the Order of Oyo, he also claimed his place in the mastery of inebriation.
notes: Stacks diminishingly with other sources of Evasion.

description: Splits Brewmaster into elements, forming 4 specialized warriors, adept at survival, each with their own abilities. If any of them survive until the end of their summoned timer, the Brewmaster is reborn.
language.lore: It isn't clear whether Mangix is consciously aware of his potent bond with nature, as it often occurs in the midst of a drunken stupor.
notes: The Earth Element will carry all auras that the Brewmaster has, as well as True Sight.
The Fire Element has phased movement.
When the spell ends, Brewmaster will take the place of an element in this order, assuming they are alive: Earth, Storm, Fire.
language.shardDescription: Increases Primal Split duration and allows it to be cancelled early.

description: Throws a boulder at a unit, doing damage and stunning it.
Immune to debuffs. Magic resistance increased by 80%.
Deals bonus damage to buildings.

Tidehunter attaches a heavy anchor to an enemy hero. The hero is leashed while attached to the anchor. Attempting to move more than 350 units away from the anchor forces the hero to 100 move speed, dragging the anchor behind them. The anchor can be destroyed with 4 hero attacks.
language.lore: Anchors Aweigh!

description: Damages summoned units in an area and dispels most buffs or debuffs.
DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
notes: Can be cast on invulnerable units.

description: Encloses a unit in a tornado, removing it from the battlefield and deals 75 damage when after they land.
Provides temporary invisibility.  Bonus movement speed and attack damage when invisible.
Burns nearby enemy units.

Summons a powerful Spirit Bear companion that can equip items.

If the bear moves %bear_attack_leash_range% distance away from the Lone Druid, it cannot attack. Lone Druid suffers %backlash_damage%%% of his max health as backlash damage if the Spirit Bear dies.
Spirit Bear has the Return, Demolish and Entangling Claws abilities.
language.lore: Sylla's lifelong companion is symbiotic with his spirit and heart, coming to aid him in any time of need.
notes: Most spells interact with the Spirit Bear in the same way as they do with heroes.
Spirit Bear has 0 base attributes and does not gain them with level. Attributes from buffs or items fully affect the bear as they would for Universal heroes.
Spirit Bear cannot gain experience. Spirit Bear health and damage increase by 90 and 5 respectively with Lone Druid's level.
Spirit Bear has its own Aghanim's Scepter and Shard upgrades.

description: Lone Druid and the Spirit Bear roar fiercely causing nearby enemies to flee towards their base in terror. Their movement speed is increased by 20%.
language.lore: Sylla studies and masters the arts of the lost Bear Clan, enhancing his attunement with the wild.
notes: An entangled hero will not be able to move.
Cooldown is shared with Spirit Bear.
language.shardDescription:
Applies a basic dispel and grants allies in an area around the caster bonus movement and attack speed. Replicates between Lone Druid and Spirit Bear regardless of castability on the other.

DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel

description: Lone Druid starts a transformation into a raging bear that has enhanced attack and defensive capabilities.
language.lore: The mighty bear is the king of the forest, possessing the throne through raw power.
notes: Cooldowns of items that are different for ranged and melee units will be based on which form Lone Druid was in when the item was used.

description: Channels for %channel_tooltip% seconds and then teleports the Spirit Bear back to the Lone Druid.
language.aghanimDescription: Allows Spirit Bear to attack at any range from Lone Druid, and to survive if Lone Druid dies.

description: Attacks have a chance to cause roots to burst from the ground, immobilizing the attacked enemy unit, and dealing damage per second.
notes: Entangled units can't use Blink abilities, and are revealed if they are invisible.

description: Increases the power of the Spirit Bear, causing it to deal more damage to buildings and have additional magic resistance.
Banishes the targeted unit from the battlefield for a short duration.  Upon returning, two illusions of the banished unit with bonus base damage are created under Shadow Demon's control.
language.lore: The pain of deception comes not while it happens, but when it is revealed.

description: Deals damage in a line, and afflicts enemy units with a poison effect. The poison deals 1/2/4/8/16 times the stack damage based on the number of stacks on the target, up to 5 stacks. Additional stacks cause 50 damage each. This deferred damage is dealt when Shadow Poison's duration is expired, or the Release sub-ability is used.
language.lore: The ever growing influence of the Shadow Demon can pollute the most valiant and pure of heroes.
notes: Shadow Poison can affect units under Disruption.

description: Releases the poison to do damage on all affected enemies. Units under the effect of Disruption can still be affected by Shadow Poison.

Purges the target enemy unit, removing positive buffs, and slowing the target for the duration.  The unit slowly regains its speed until the end of the duration, upon which damage is dealt.  Units under the effect of Disruption can still be affected by Demonic Purge.
DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
language.lore: Once Shadow Demon no longer has any need for his collected cultist, he releases it from its subservience - and its life.
notes: The slow starts at 100% and decreases over time to 20%.
Positive buffs are continously removed from the target for the duration of the Purge.
Can be cast on invulnerable units.
language.aghanimDescription: Cooldown is removed, replaced with  charges that replenish every  seconds. Also causes Demonic Purge to break its target's passive abilities while active.

description: Throws a mysterious bolt of energy at the target unit. It stuns for a random duration and deals random damage.
language.lore: Even Chaos Knight cannot predict this manifest of unholy energy.
notes: The stun duration and damage values dealt are inversely related.
Nearby illusions will mimic the cast animation.
language.shardDescription: Causes Chaos Bolt to create a Phantasm illusion to attack the target. This illusion deals 0 less damage.

description: Teleports Chaos Knight, any illusions he has, and the target unit to a point along the line between him and the target. Reduces armor of the enemy unit for 6 seconds.
language.lore: Armageddon rides between the planes, bringing Chaos Knight to his victim wherever he may hide.
notes: Chaos Knight and the target unit are made to face each other, and Chaos Knight and his phantasms are issued an attack order against the target.
language.shardDescription: Allows Reality Rift to be cast on any enemy hero that is within 1200 range of you or one of your illusions. Gathers all of your illusions and your hero and teleports them to the target enemy.

description: Chaos Knight and his illusions' attacks have a chance to deal a critical strike of varying strength with bonus lifesteal. Lifesteal from creeps is reduced.
language.lore: Chaos Knight's unwieldy power bludgeons those who stand before him, crushing the thickest of armors.

description: Summons several phantasmal copies of the Chaos Knight from alternate dimensions. The phantasms are illusions that deal 100% damage, but take 350% damage.
DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
language.lore: Drawing on his battles fought across many worlds and many times, phantasms of the Chaos Knight rise up to quell all who oppose him.
notes: Removes most negative buffs from Chaos Knight.
Chaos Knight is invulnerable for 0.5 seconds when casting, allowing him to dodge stuns and damage.
language.aghanimDescription: Creates an illusion of allied heroes globally. Creates an additional illusion for Chaos Knight as well.

description: Tosses a net at the target point, rooting down all enemy units in an area around it.
language.lore: Catching dinner in the Riftshadow Ruins can be quite the task.
notes: Affects invisible units, revealing them.
Does not work on Debuff Immune units or Roshan.

description:
Drawing mystical energies from the earth, a Meepo can teleport to another Meepo or itself after channeling for 1.5 seconds, damaging the enemy in both the departure and arrival locations.

If the ability is in alt-cast state, all Meepos will also cast Poof to the target. When cast on the ground, all Meepos except the selected one will Poof to the closest location.
language.lore: Sometimes breaking one of the Riftshadow Crystals can be just the trick for getting yourself out of a bind.  Or your other self.
notes: Can be cast through the minimap.
Can teleport to Meepo illusions.

description: Meepo summons an imperfect, semi-autonomous duplicate of himself, which can gain gold and experience as he does and shares his experience, attributes and abilities. However, the clones cannot wield any items but the boots that Meepo himself wears.  If any of the clones die, they all die. Divided We Stand grants all Meepos bonus Magic Resistance.
language.lore: Do I know you?
notes: Of boot abilities, clones can only use the active ability from Phase Boots.
