language.shardDescription: Divided We Stand can be cast as long as there's a Meepo within %fling_radius% radius of yourself. Causes that Meepo to fling you towards a target within a %AbilityCastRange% range, dealing damage and slowing their movement speed. Mana Cost: %AbilityManaCost%

description: Provides Treant with Tree Walking whenever he hasn't taken damage for 2.75 seconds. While nearby trees or affected by Nature's Grasp, Treant gains bonus movement speed.
language.lore: The Protectors don't often come into vision; their natural state being nestled within their leafy brethren.
notes: While affected by Nature's Guise, Treant can move unobstructed through other trees.
With Aghanim's Shard, invisibility is broken upon attacking. Using abilities and items will not break invisibility.
language.shardDescription: Causes Treant to become invisible with Nature's Guise and root enemies upon attacking. Deals damage over time and roots for longer if the attack was near a tree. Total damage equals  + % of Treant's Base Attack Damage.

description: Treant plants a life-sapping seed in an enemy unit, draining its health, while simultaneously slowing it. The seed heals friendly units around it. Healing to creeps is reduced by 50%.
language.lore: Rooftrellen nurtures the beings under his stewardship, sustained by the lifeforce of trespassers into his sacred ground.

description: Infuses the target hero or structure with a protective coating which heals the target and provides bonus armor.
language.lore: The roots and tendrils of the Treant Protectors are far-reaching, stimulating the growth and rejuvenation of all of nature.

description: Summons an overgrowth of vines and branches around Treant that deal damage to afflicted enemies and prevent them from moving, blinking, going invisible, or attacking.
language.lore: Rooftrellen calls the ancestral spirit of nature, releasing its power through all of his kin.
notes: Works on Debuff Immune units, but if units gain debuff immunity after the effect starts, they'll break free.

description: Blasts an enemy unit with a wave of fire, dealing damage and stunning the target.
language.lore: The Ogre Magi is easily amused, entertained for hours by playing with fire.
notes: When Multicast, Fireblast hits the same target each time with a 0.6 seconds interval.

description: Drenches the target and another random unit in volatile chemicals, causing it to burst into flames. The target is in immense pain, taking damage and moving more slowly.
language.lore: Batter up!
notes: Multicast makes this spell have a chance to cast multiple times at random enemy units in a 1400 area of effect.
Ignite hitting an already affected unit adds to the burn duration.

description: Incites a frenzy in a friendly unit, increasing its movement speed and attack speed. Gives bonus attacks speed if cast on Ogre himself. Can be cast on towers.
language.lore: 'Running's not as fun as hitting... Not one bit fun.'
notes: When multicast, nearby allies will be selected randomly in an 700 area of effect to receive Bloodlust.

description: Enables Ogre Magi to cast his abilities and items multiple times with each use.
language.lore: Despite being largely incapacitated by his IQ, the Ogre Magi's success in battle is attributed to pure skill.
notes: Only targeted abilities and items have a chance to be multicast.
Targeted abilities and items apply to additional enemies and neutrals in an AoE around Ogre. Fireblast and Unrefined Fireblast hit the same target multiple times.

description: Undying steals strength from all enemy heroes in an area, dealing base damage as he claims the enemy's strength for himself. Deals 2.0x damage to creeps.
language.lore: The strength of the living is simply borrowed from the strength of the dead.
notes: The strength stolen stacks, but can't cause a hero to have strength below 1.
The strength steal takes effect before the damage is dealt.
Affects invisible units.
language.aghanimDescription: Increases strength steal.

description: Undying rips health away from all nearby units and uses it to heal an ally, or damage an enemy. Soul Rip can also be used to heal Tombstone.
language.lore: Even allies feel despair in Undying's presence.
notes: Can heal Tombstone, but can't heal or damage other buildings.
Does not rip from invisible units, invulnerable units, units in the fog of war, or spell immune enemies.
Does rip from spell immune allies, including zombies.

description: Summons a tombstone at the target point.  Zombies will frequently spawn next to every enemy unit in the area around the Tombstone, and attack them.  Zombies have the Deathlust ability, which causes their attacks to slow the target, and if the target reaches below a certain amount of health, increases the attack and movement speed of the zombie.
language.lore: Dirge calls on his fallen brothers to fight for the Dead God.
notes: Tombstone is Spell Immune, but can be healed by Soul Rip.
Zombies and Tombstone are Spell Immune.
If their initial target dies or goes out of vision, the Zombie will die.
language.shardDescription: Tombstone can be cast on an allied hero to bunker inside of the tombstone. Heroes that enter the Tombstone cannot leave for 2 seconds nor can they re-enter after leaving. If the tombstone is destroyed with a hero inside, that hero gets stunned for 2 seconds.

description: Slows enemy units on attack.  If the attacked unit's health goes below the threshold, the zombie receives enhanced movement and attack speed.
Undying transforms into a horrifying flesh golem. Gains a percentage increase to strength and imbues attacks with a slow and damage amplification.
language.lore: The flesh of the recently dead add to the power of Dirge's plague.

description: Rubick uses his telekinetic powers to lift the enemy into the air briefly and then hurls them back at the ground. The unit lands on the ground with such force that it stuns nearby enemies.
language.lore: Even the Grandest Magus may use his powers for enjoyment.
notes: While the target is in the air, Rubick may use a secondary ability to throw the enemy in a targeted direction.
When the unit lands, it isn't affected by the area of effect stun.
language.shardDescription: Allows you to target yourself or allies with Telekinesis. Throw range is  longer and throw delay is reduced to  seconds.

description: Chooses the location the target will land when Telekinesis finishes.
Rubick creates a powerful stream of arcane energy that travels between enemy units, dealing damage and reducing their attack damage. Each jump deals less damage.
language.lore: Rubick's favorite spell for dispatching would-be assassins is a rather simple conjuration.

description: Rubick studies the trace magical essence of one enemy hero, learning the secrets of the last spell the hero cast. Rubick can use this spell as his own for several minutes or until he dies, and stolen spells last longer on enemies.
language.lore: ...but even their lesser magics can be a source of much utility.
notes: Cannot steal item abilities.
Rubick will steal the Aghanim's Shard version of the ability, if he himself has an Aghanim's Shard.
Does not trigger spell reflect.
language.aghanimDescription: Increases the number of spells that can be stolen to 2. Increases cast range, and upgrades spells to their Scepter version.

description: Spells acquired with Spell Steal will replace this slot.
Spells acquired with Spell Steal will replace this slot.

Repeatedly strikes the targeted unit with lightning. Each strike damages nearby enemy units in a small radius and slows enemy movement and attack speed by 100% for 0.3 seconds. Provides vision of its target.
language.lore: Disruptor's charged coils occasionally overload, and a singed armor plate or tuft of fur is the enemy's result.
language.shardDescription: Increases the cast range and strike count of Thunder Strike. It can now also be ground targeted, where it will lie dormant for up to 4 seconds and attach to the first enemy that comes within the radius.

description: Teleports the target hero back to where it was 4.0 / 4.0 / 4.0 / 4.0 seconds ago. Instantly kills illusions. Deals damage equal to a percentage of the distance glimpsed, that cannot go over a damage maximum.
language.lore: Playing with electricity can have unexpected results.
notes: The travel time is a function of the distance the target will travel.

description: After a short formation time, creates a circular barrier of kinetic energy that enemies can't pass.
language.lore: The stryder is immune to the gale-force winds that will consume its adversaries.
notes: Debuff Immune units can travel through the field.

description: Creates a damaging static storm that also silences all enemy units in the area for the duration.  The damage starts off weak, but increases in power over the duration.
language.lore: A summer squall in Druud is a hardship that only an Oglodi can survive.
language.aghanimDescription: Mutes items.

description: Rock spikes burst from the earth along a straight path. Enemy units take damage, then are hurled into the air and stunned.
language.lore: All zealot scarabs possess intimate knowledge of underground pathways, using them to their advantage.
notes: The spikes move at 1600 units per second, over 750 range.
Impale cannot be blocked by Linken's Sphere.

description: When activated while above ground, Spiked Carapace reflects and negates damage dealt to Nyx Assassin (max once from each source), as well as stunning the source of the damage. Activating Spiked Carapace will not break Vendetta invisibility.
While Burrowed, Spiked Carapace instantly stuns nearby enemies when cast.
language.lore: While their carapace is relatively thin, it's guarded by a retractable field of razor-sharp spikes.
notes: The damage is calculated after all reductions.
Spiked Carapace will only trigger on damage from other player controlled units.
The damage reflected will have the same damage type as it had when it was dealt to Nyx Assassin.

description: Allows Nyx Assassin to become invisible and gain a speed bonus. If Nyx Assassin attacks to break the invisibility, massive bonus damage is dealt with the attack. Nyx Assassin has 75 additional attack range and a 70% faster attack animation for this attack.
language.lore: The scarab kills for the glory of his queen.
notes: Has a 0.0 second fadetime.
If a spell is used to break the invisibility, or the invisibility expires, the bonus damage is lost.
With Aghanim's Shard, the Break is applied before the bonus damage.
language.shardDescription: Vendetta applies Break on attack.

description: Blasts an enemy unit with a wave of fire, dealing 150 + 1.5x Ogre's Strength in damage and stunning the target. Its mana cost is 35% of Ogre Magi's current mana.
language.lore: The 'who-casts-spell-first' argument between himself is solved simply by both casting at once.
notes: When Multicast, Unrefined Fireblast hits the same target each time with a 0.6 seconds interval.

description: Creates multiple images of Naga Siren under her control.
DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
language.lore: Slithice, while being strong in her own right, is notoriously hard to track down.
notes: Naga Siren is invulnerable for 0.5 seconds when casting, allowing her to dodge stuns and damage.
Upon casting, most effects are removed from Naga Siren.
Upon casting, existing Mirror Image illusions are destroyed.

description: Interrupts the target and traps them in place, preventing movement or blinking. Can target invulnerable and sleeping units.
language.lore: The only way to escape the onslaught of a Slithereen is to never oppose one in the first place.
language.aghanimDescription: Increases cast range and projectile speed.  Allows Ensnare to target and affect Debuff Immune units. Ensnare applies Break.

description: Naga Siren and her illusions deal bonus damage to enemies and reduce their armor for 4.0 seconds every 6 attacks.
language.lore: A torrent from the Deep Ones crushes the defenses of the Siren's enemies.
notes: Using Rip Tide doesn't interrupt channeling.

description: All enemies in range of the Naga Siren are put into a magical stasis where they cannot act or be attacked. Allies in range recover a percentage of their health per second. Using Song of the Siren again will end the duration early.
language.lore: Slithice's powerful voice enchants leagues of opponents, while calling her Slithereen kin in a time of need.
notes: Units affected by Song of the Siren are invulnerable and cannot take damage from any source.
The area of the song follows Naga, so if she moves far enough away from affected units, they will wake up.
language.shardDescription: Increases Song of the Siren's regen and adds mana regeneration for allies.

description: CHANNELED - Channels light energy, building power the longer it's channeled.  Once released, a wave is sent forth that deals damage and gives vision in its path.  The longer it is channeled, the more damage is dealt.
language.lore: Ezalor's hidden light reveals itself in marvelous fashion.
notes: Gives increasing vision over the channeling time.

description: Restores mana to the target unit and reduces cooldowns of all basic abilities currently on cooldown by a fixed amount. Is 30% more effective when used on himself.
language.lore: In the same vein, Ezalor bestows his harmony among others.
notes: Chakra Magic does not reduce the cooldown of Ultimate abilities

description: Ezalor temporarily turns his body luminescent, gaining bonus movement speed, cast range, and allows Illuminate to be channeled by a separate spirit and heal allies.
language.lore: In a flash of light, Ezalor reveals his true nature.
language.shardDescription: Increases illuminate heal.

description:
After a short delay, teleports the targeted friendly hero to your location. If the targeted friendly hero takes player based damage during this time, the ability is interrupted. When cast, the teleport target's movement speed is increased. Upon teleporting, the increased movement speed buff are applied to both Keeper of the Light and the teleport target, and the latter also receives a Chakra Magic.

If alt-cast, teleports Keeper of the Light to the target Ally instead.

Ability Level increases with levels of Spirit Form.
language.lore: Walk towards the light.
notes: If Keeper of the Light dies, the spell effect is interrupted.
Recall will interrupt channeling spells.
You can disable help to prevent Keeper from casting this spell on you.
Can be cast through the minimap, choosing the nearest friendly hero.
language.shardDescription: Grants 0 ability charges.

description: A blinding light flashes over the targeted area, knocking back and blinding the units in the area, causing them to miss some attacks. Knockback is 400 range over 0.6 seconds.
language.lore: The Primordial light turns the tides of battle in favor of Ezalor and his allies.
notes: Upon landing, units will destroy trees in a 150 radius.

description: Release the channel early.
Release enemy units from your song so they can be targeted again.
Visage drains the movement and attack speed of the targeted unit, gaining it for itself and nearby familiars.
language.lore: The warmth of the sun is never felt in the dark cold of the Narrow Maze.
notes: The two buffs can be removed separately by dispels.
The speed gained is independent of the speed lost on the target.
Familiars within 900 range of Visage will also receive bonuses from Grave Chill.

description: Visage gathers charges of soul essence each time nearby heroes take more than 100 damage. When the essence is released, it deals base damage as well as damage for each gathered soul charge.
language.lore: The collected souls of the dead reach out to bring another into their fold.
notes: Charges are only gained for damage greater than 2.0 and less than 3000.0 that is dealt by a player or Roshan. Self-damage or Soul Assumption damage isn't counted.

description: Visage generates a layered barrier that protects him from damage.  If he receives damage from a player, one layer is removed, and takes time to recover.
language.lore: Visage's tough scales share equal properties of ghost and stone, making it nearly impervious to blade and magical assault.
notes: Each time Visage receives damage greater than the Minimum Damage that was not self-inflicted and was from a player owned source, a layer is removed.
Familiars within 900 range of Visage will receive the current damage reduction from Gravekeeper's Cloak.
Break disables the gaining of new stacks.
Break does not disable the bonuses from existing stacks.
language.shardDescription: Grants Visage the ability to cast Gravekeeper's Cloak. Restores up to  of your health.

description: Conjures 2 blind Familiars to fight for Visage. Familiars possess the Stone Form ability, that allows them to turn into stone, stunning enemies upon landing. While in Stone Form, Familiars are invulnerable, and rapidly regenerate their health. Familiars grant high bounty when killed.
language.lore: Guardians of the Narrow Maze, Necro'lic's Familiars stand watch over his domain.
notes: Casting Summon Familiars will replace any existing Familiars.
Familiars within range of Visage will receive bonuses from Gravekeeper's Cloak and Grave Chill.

description:
After a short delay, the Familiar turns into stone and smashes into the ground, stunning and damaging all targets in the area. The Familiar becomes invulnerable, and will regain its health very rapidly. After 6.0 seconds, the Familiar will automatically leave Stone Form.

Can be alt-cast to order the Familiar to move to the target location and cast Stone Form.

Tethers Io to an allied unit, granting bonus movement speed to both. When Io restores health or mana, the tethered unit gains a portion of that amount. The tether breaks when the allied unit moves too far away, or Io cancels the tether. Tether slows enemies touching it.
language.lore: The benevolent touch of Io brings strength from between the planes.
notes: If you try to tether a unit that is 700 distance or further away from Io, he will latch on and pull himself closer to the tethered unit (to a distance of 300).
The tethered unit will heal faster and will heal even if Io is at full health.
Io's movement speed matches the tethered unit's.
language.shardDescription: Tether damages enemies touching it. Io is healed for 0% of the damage done.

description: Summon five particle spirits that dance in a circle around Io. If a particle collides with an enemy hero, it explodes, damaging all enemy units in an area around it.  Creeps take minor damage from touching a particle spirit, but do not cause them to explode.  When its duration ends, any remaining Spirits explode.
language.lore: Io twists the particles of the universe with its unimaginable capabilities.
notes: After summoning, Io can call the spirits in and out.
language.aghanimDescription: Spirits now passively spawn around Io constantly every second up to the max. Spirits colliding with enemy Heroes slows them briefly. Can be activated to explode spirits.

description: Io gains health regeneration based on max health.  If Io is Tethered to an ally, that unit also gains any bonuses granted by Overcharge.
language.lore: Drawing on the energy of matter from all worlds, Io begins the unravelling of time.

description: Teleports Io and a tethered ally to any location. After the spell expires, Io and the tethered ally will return to their original location. Double-click to teleport to your team's base fountain.
language.lore: Io is the embodiment of the mystery of the universe.
notes: Enemies receive a visual indicator in the world and on the minimap of the target location during the cast delay.
If Io is disabled during the cast delay, Relocate is cancelled.
If an allied hero is Tethered, that hero will teleport along with you. You can break the tether at any time to prevent that hero from teleporting with you.
Only heroes, creep heroes, and illusions can be relocated.

description: Break the link to the tethered unit.
Sends the spirits closer to you. Can be toggled on and off.
Provides bonus mana regeneration to all nearby allies.
Sends the courier to your team's secret shop
Sends the spirits farther away from you. Can be toggled on and off.
After a short delay, Slark sacrifices some of his life blood, purging most negative debuffs and dealing damage to enemy units around him and to himself. Slark only takes 30% of the damage.
DISPEL TYPE: Strong Dispel
language.lore: Slithereen are capable of quickly regrowing appendages, in case of critical injury, to save their own lives.
notes: 1.5% seconds after cast, a series of 10 pulses separated by 0.1 seconds deal the damage.
Each pulse also removes debuffs from Slark.
You can't kill yourself with this skill.
The pulses stop if Slark dies.

description: Slark leaps forward, leashing the first hero he connects.  That unit can only move a limited distance away from Slark's landing position.
language.lore: Time in the Dark Reef made Slark a dangerous assassin; aggressive and fearless.
notes: On cast, Slark leaps forward at a speed of 933.33, stopping when he latches onto an enemy hero or has traveled 700 distance.
Debuff Immune units cannot be leashed.
Trees will be destroyed around Slark's landing location.
language.aghanimDescription: Provides charges and increases range.

description: Slark steals the life essence of enemy heroes with his attacks, draining each of their attributes and converting them to bonus Agility. If Slark kills an affected enemy hero, he permanently steals 1 Agility.
language.lore: With each strike at his adversaries, Slark's knowledge of their weaknesses improves.
notes: Attributes cannot be dropped below 1.
Essence Shifted stats are returned to normal on death. The stat return for Slark and for the affected hero are separate.
To permanently steal Agility, Slark doesn't need to land the killing blow, as long as the enemy hero is killed within Slark's Steal Radius while having the Essence Shift debuff.
Break disables the gaining of temporary stacks. Does not disable the gaining of permanent stacks.
Break does not disable the bonuses of existing stacks.

description: When used, Slark hides himself in a cloud of shadows, becoming immune to detection. Attacking, casting spells, and using items will not reveal Slark.
language.lore: The hidden Thirteenth is a slippery foe.

description: Permanently invisible when not attacking.
Medusa magically splits her shot into several arrows. These arrows deal a lower percent of her normal damage.
The extra targets will not receive other attack effects (such as critical strike).
language.lore: All who encounter the cursed Gorgon will feel her rage.
notes: Secondary targets will be the closest enemy units excluding the primary target.
If illusions of Medusa are created while Split Shot is active, they will also have this ability.
language.aghanimDescription: Allows on-hit effects to apply to the secondary attacks from Split Shot. Increases arrow count.

description: A mystic snake made of energy jumps from target to target dealing damage. Damage and speed increases with each jump. After it reaches its last target, it returns to Medusa to replenish her with mana. The snake returns a percentage of the targets' total mana.
language.lore: The Gorgon's curse is her greatest strength.
notes: Mystic Snake cannot be disjointed.

description: Creates a shield that absorbs 98% of incoming damage in exchange for Medusa's mana that increases with each level of Medusa. Illusions absorb 60% less damage per point of mana.
language.lore: While Medusa was not gifted with eternal life upon birth, her curse bestowed her with impressive defensive powers.
notes: Absorbs damage before any damage reduction takes place, meaning that armor will not reduce the amount of mana needed to absorb damage.

description: Any enemy units looking at Medusa will have their movement and attack speed slowed. If 2.0 seconds of total time is accumulated looking at Medusa while Stone Gaze is active, that unit will turn to stone. Petrified units are stunned, and take bonus physical attack damage.
language.lore: The beauty of Medusa is legendary.
notes: Regardless of when a unit receives the Stone Gaze buff while the ability is active on Medusa, it will still receive the full debuff duration.

description:
While in melee form, Troll Warlord's attacks have a chance to ensnare, preventing the target from moving or using mobility spells and has additional movement speed and armor.

When in ranged form, Troll Warlord's attacks have a chance to Maim the target, dealing bonus damage, and slowing the target's movement and attack speed.
language.lore: Like his anger, Troll Warlord's supply of axes is infinite.
notes: Cooldowns of items that are different for ranged and melee units will be based on which form Troll Warlord was in when the item was used.

description: Troll hurls a fistful of five axes in a cone shape over 950.0 range, slowing and damaging enemy units.
language.lore: Only axes fueled by hate whirl with such a deadly spin.
notes: Does not affect Roshan.
Does not trigger spell block or spell reflect.
language.aghanimDescription:
Causes Whirling Axes (Ranged) to dispel enemies. Reduces cooldown and mana cost.

DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel

description: Troll hurls two axes around him in a close range area of effect, damaging enemy units and causing them to miss some attacks.
language.lore: Keep your enemies close.
notes: Does not affect Roshan.
language.aghanimDescription:
Causes Whirling Axes (Melee) to dispel Troll Warlord. Reduces cooldown and mana cost.

DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel

description: With each continuous blow on the same target, Troll gains increased attack speed.  If Troll changes targets, the stacks drop to zero.
language.lore: If at first you don't succeed, strike, strike again.
notes: Break disables the gaining of new stacks.
Break disables the proc chance granted by Aghanim's Shard.
language.shardDescription: Grants Troll  +  chance per Fervor stack of firing an additional ranged attack to any unit within its ranged attack range plus  when attacking an enemy unit.

description: Troll unleashes a powerful battle trance, that forces you to continuously attack the closest enemy unit within 900 range, prioritizing heroes. Damage does not kill you during this mode. Grants you bonus lifesteal, attack speed and movement speed. Applies a Basic Dispel.
DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
language.lore: An adrenaline rush of pure hatred quickens your blades.
notes: Troll can still use his items and abilities while affected by Battle Trance, but not other commands.
Troll can still be killed with Axe's Culling Blade.
Troll is granted vision over the target.

description: After a brief windup, Centaur Warrunner slams the ground, stunning and damaging nearby enemy units. During the delay, he is disarmed but can move.
language.lore: When the mighty hoof of the Warrunner touches soil, the tremors are felt far and wide.

description: Centaur strikes a mighty blow at melee range, damaging both himself and a small area around the target. Deals extra damage based on your strength. Centaur cannot die from Double Edge.
language.lore: In the spurs of combat, Bradwarden's vicious strikes sometimes cause self-inflicted collateral damage.
notes: Double Edge deals magic type damage to both the targets and himself.
language.shardDescription: Causes Double Edge to slow enemy heroes and increase Centaur's strength per hero hit for a short time. Duration refreshes per stack, up to a max of  stacks.

description: Centaur counters all attacks, dealing damage back to the attacker. Returns a fixed amount plus a percentage of your strength. Deals half damage to towers.
language.lore: Bradwarden has no need to parry his opponent's attacks; his armor-like hide does it for him.
notes: Retaliate triggers when the attack hits.
Retaliate deals damage to towers.

description: Centaur leads all allies into a vicious charge causing them to move through units at max speed and slow any enemy units they trample. Trampled enemies take damage based on Centaur Warrunner's strength. Each enemy can be trampled once.
language.lore: The great belt of Omexe, which labels Bradwarden as the greatest warrior of his kind, incites his fellow gladiators to follow him into barbarous combat.

description: Magnus sends out a wave of force, damaging enemy units in a line, pulling them towards him, and slowing them for a brief period.
language.lore: Mt. Joerlak was a somewhat unstable mass, and Magnus has learned to channel its reverberations.

description: Gives an allied unit bonus damage and cleave on attack. Magnus receives 30% larger bonus.
language.lore: With a deep bellow, Magnus displays his true power.
notes: The bonus damage is based only on base damage and damage from primary attributes.
Cleave damage goes through spell immunity.
Ranged units cannot Cleave.

description: Magnus rushes forward, goring enemy units on his massive tusk. Heroes hit on the way will be dragged to the destination, then damaged and affected by slowed movement and attack speed. The damage is increased based on distance traveled.
language.lore: Magnoceros horns are valuable in direct proportion to their danger to prospective merchants.
language.shardDescription: Increases range and deals additional damage when skewering enemies into trees or cliffs.

description: Magnus changes properties of matter, pulling all nearby enemies in front of him and stunning them with a damaging slam.
language.lore: Magnus fights with the fury of the erupting Mt. Joerlak.

description: Ends all ongoing Nightmares.

Timbersaw whirls extremely sharp edges, damaging enemies and destroying trees around him in an area. If an enemy hero is affected, it loses some of its primary attribute for a short duration. Whirling Death will deal bonus damage per tree destroyed.
language.lore: In the case that Rizzrack gets surrounded by the vines and plants of his nightmares, he has an immediate chainsaw defense.

description: Timbersaw fires a chain that embeds itself in the first tree it hits, pulling him towards it.  Any enemy in the path takes damage.
language.lore: You never know when you might need to escape from malevolent saplings.

description: Each time Timbersaw is attacked, he gains increased health regen and armor. Hero attacks are counted as 3x the amount.
language.lore: The saw-suit is equipped to react to the slightest touch with fortified defenses.
notes: Break disables the gaining of new stacks.
Break does not disable the bonuses from existing stacks.
language.aghanimDescription: Reactive Armor can now be activated to get max stacks and  damage barrier. Grants Timbersaw  +  barrier amount per second for each enemy hero within  radius of Timbersaw up to a maximum of . After  seconds, Timbersaw deals damage to every hero within  radius equal to  + his remaining barrier amount and loses all of his barrier.

description: Fires Timbersaw's main saw blade at the target location where it will spin in place, dealing damage in an area around it. Enemies caught in the saw blade will move more slowly for every 5% of health missing. The blade deals damage and cuts down trees in its path when fired and retracted. While active the ability costs mana, and Timbersaw loses the ability to attack.
language.lore: The ultimate in anti-flora weaponry.
notes: The Chakram will return if Timbersaw runs out of mana or moves over 2000.0 distance away.

description: Returns the Chakram to Timbersaw.
Covers a target in snot, causing it to have reduced armor and movement speed for 6.0 seconds. Multiple casts stack and refresh the duration.
language.lore: Having caught a cold while stuck in the snow, Bristleback turns it to his advantage.

description: Sprays enemy units with quills dealing damage in an area of effect around Bristleback. Deals bonus damage for every time a unit was hit by Quill Spray in the last 14.0 seconds.
language.lore: An enforcer's honor can be a prickly thing.  So can his quills.
notes: Quill Spray damage is not reduced by damage block abilities.

description: Bristleback takes less damage if hit on the sides or rear. If Bristleback takes 275 / 250 / 225 / 200 damage from the rear, he releases a Quill Spray of the current level.
language.lore: Turning his back to a fight might be just the thing.
notes: Bristleback's rear is considered to be within 70 degrees from the back.
Bristleback's side is considered to be within 110 degrees from the back.
language.aghanimDescription: Adds active ability to Bristleback. Bristleback rotates towards the targeted direction and, after 0.5s, forcefully ejects 5 sequential Quill Sprays in a tight conical pattern out of his back every 0.4s. Bristleback's facing is locked during this time, he is disarmed, and his speed is reduced by -40.

description: Bristleback works himself up into a fury every time he casts a spell, increasing his movement speed and damage.
language.lore: 'Temper, temper,' his mum always chided.  But in a fight, a temper can come in handy.
notes: Bristleback's illusions will receive the bonuses.
Items will not trigger Warpath.
Break disables the gaining of new stacks.
Break does not disable the bonuses from existing stacks.

description: Tusk compresses shards of ice into a ball of frozen energy that damages all enemies it comes in contact with. When the ball reaches its target destination the shards are released, creating a barrier that lasts for 4 / 5 / 6 / 7 seconds.
language.lore: In the frozen tundra near the Barrier, after the last sun of autumn has set, ice can form with alarming speed.
notes: Creates an impassable barrier.
language.shardDescription: Increases depth of Ice Shards, and enemies trapped within an ice shard are slowed and take damage per second.

description: Tusk begins rolling into a snowball. Allies within a 350 radius can also be added to the snowball by right-clicking on them, even while the snowball is moving. Once launched, any enemies caught in the snowball's path will be stunned and take damage. Each allied Hero in the snowball will add to its damage and stun duration.
language.lore: Tales are still told of the wild feat that ended the grand brawl at White Fields.
notes: The snowball will break apart a maximum of 3 seconds after launch.
The snowball can be launched early by pressing using the Launch Snowball ability.
Doesn't carry illusions, but will carry Meepo clones and other units that Tusk controls.
Each Meepo clone added to the snowball will add its own bonus damage.
Allies can click on a snowball to add themselves to it.

description: Tusk connects with his mighty Walrus Punch, a critical strike with bonus damage so powerful it launches its victim into the air.
language.lore: It never matters who throws the first punch, only who throws the last.
notes: Walrus PUNCH has true strike.

description: Skywrath Mage launches a slow-moving bolt of arcane magic, dealing damage to an enemy unit based on Skywrath Mage's intelligence.
language.lore: Within the Ghastly Eyrie's endless intrigue, only the clever and calm can hope to survive.
notes: The projectile moves very slowly (500 ms), providing 325 vision around it.  Upon impact, it will reveal the target area for 3.34 seconds.
Arcane Bolt cannot be disjointed.
language.shardDescription: When Skywrath Mage casts Arcane Bolt, 1 bolts are created, one aimed at the original target, and the other at a random enemy within 500 range of the original target. Heroes will take priority.

description: Skywrath Mage sets off a long range shot that hits the closest hero within a long range.  Upon impact, it deals damage and slows in an area of effect.
language.lore: Those who serve the court of the Ghastly Eyrie are ever locked in covert war. One must always know where danger lurks nearest.
notes: If no enemy heroes are in range or they are in fog, Concussive Shot targets the nearest enemy creep.
Damages creeps around the impact area.
Provides 400 vision around the projectile, and reveals the target area for 3.34 seconds upon impact.
language.aghanimDescription: When Skywrath Mage casts Concussive Shot, a different random target within  range of the original target will be hit with the same ability. Heroes will take priority.

description: Skywrath Mage seals the targeted unit with an ancient rune, silencing it and causing it to take additional damage from spells.
language.lore: A holy incantation, whosoever finds themselves touched by Avilliva's sigil must suffer in penitent silence.
notes: The magic damage resistance reduction doesn't affect creeps.
language.aghanimDescription: Anytime Skywrath Mage casts Ancient Seal, a different random target within  range of the original target will be affected by the same ability. Heroes will take priority.

description: Skywrath Mage uses his ultimate magical ability to conjure a precise and violent mystical field that lays waste to his adversaries. Deals massive damage distributed evenly among any Heroes in the area over 2.0 seconds.
language.lore: Only the most practiced of Skywrath sorcerers could hope to shape the skies into such a storm.
notes: Mystic Flare only affects Heroes; it does not damage illusions or creep heroes.
Spell immune enemies do not count toward the damage distribution.
Mystic Flare will damage enemy creeps if no enemy heroes are present.
language.aghanimDescription: When Skywrath Mage casts Mystic Flare, another Mystic Flare will be created on the position of a different random target enemy within  range of the original target. Heroes will take priority.

description: Abaddon releases a coil of deathly mist that can damage an enemy unit or heal a friendly unit at the cost of some of Abaddon's health.
language.lore: A mysterious vapor from the Font of Avernus now infuses the breath of Abaddon, who releases it at will.
notes: Abaddon can not kill himself with this skill.

description: Summons dark energies around an ally unit, dispelling them and creating an all damage barrier that absorbs a set amount of damage before expiring. When the barrier is destroyed it will burst and deal damage equal to the amount it could absorb to an area around it.
DISPEL TYPE: Strong Dispel
language.lore: The powers of the black mist rise to absorb attacks like the black mist absorbs light.
notes: The max damage is always dealt whether the barrier is destroyed by expiring or absorbing damage.
The explosion does not damage units hidden by the fog of war.
language.shardDescription: 0 of absorbed damage is dealt to nearby enemies.

description: Abaddon strikes an enemy, affecting them by a chilling curse, slowing them, causing them to take damage over time, and all attacks against them gain an attack speed boost. Damage over time component to buildings is reduced by 100%.
language.lore: While the baptized draw strength from the Font, the gifts of Avernus are debilitating to the uninitiated.

description: When activated, dispels you and all damage dealt to you will heal instead of harm. If the ability is not on cooldown, it will automatically activate if your health falls below 400.
DISPEL TYPE: Strong Dispel
language.lore: The most unnatural of all the gifts of the Font of Avernus, this power defies mortal understanding.  What should hurt, instead heals; and what should kill gives strength anew.
notes: Borrowed Time can be manually activated while Abaddon is disabled, but not while silenced.  The passive activation can still occur while silenced.
Aphotic Shield does not block any damage to Abaddon when Borrowed Time is active, allowing him to heal.
Break prevents Borrowed Time from automatically activating.
language.aghanimDescription: Increases duration. While Borrowed Time is active, anytime an ally takes more than  damage while within Mist Coil's cast range of Abaddon, an individual Mist Coil will automatically fire towards that ally.

description: CHANNELED - Elder Titan and his Astral Spirit both stomp the ground, damaging and knocking nearby enemy units unconscious around their locations.  The Elder Titan stomp deals physical damage, while the Spirit stomp deals magical damage.
language.lore: The force of creation still echoes in the stomp of the Titan.
notes: If a unit is hit by Astral Spirit and Elder Titan, they will take both instances of damage.
language.shardDescription: Lowers Cooldown. Echo Stomp may be placed on alt-cast to allow Elder Titan to take the place of the Astral Spirit as it completes its stomp.

description: Elder Titan and his Astral Spirit both stomp the ground, damaging and knocking nearby enemy units unconscious around their locations.  The Elder Titan stomp deals physical damage, while the Spirit stomp deals magical damage.  Unconscious enemies will wake if they take damage.
language.lore: The force of creation still echoes in the stomp of the Titan.

description: Elder Titan sends forth his Astral Spirit, damaging any units it passes through.  When the spirit rejoins the Titan, it grants bonus damage, armor, and movement speed for each unit it passed through.
The Astral Spirit possesses the Echo Stomp, Return Spirit, and Natural Order abilities.
language.lore: Like the four fundamentals, Elder Titan exists across all planes at once and can draw other aspects of himself to assist in times of need.
language.aghanimDescription: Causes Elder Titan to become debuff immune and gain 50%% magic resistance for %scepter_magic_immune_per_hero% seconds per affected enemy Hero when the spirit returns.

description: Returns the Astral Spirit to Elder Titan.

Reduces all elements to their basic levels, removing base armor and magic damage resistance from nearby enemy units. The armor reduction is centered around the hero, while the magic armor reduction is centered around Astral Spirit.
language.lore: As it was at the beginning, Elder Titan makes it so again.
notes: When the Astral Spirit isn't present, both the armor and magic armor reduction is centered around Elder Titan.

description: Sends forth a jagged crack in front of Elder Titan. After 3 seconds, the crack implodes, slowing movement while dealing damage to each enemy based on their maximum life. Half of the damage dealt is Magical damage, while the other half is Physical damage.
language.lore: That which he created, the titan tears asunder.

description: Turns the enemies' numbers against them, dealing damage per unit or per hero and granting you bonus attack speed. Deals bonus damage to illusions and summoned units as a percent of their current health. Can be cast during Duel.
language.lore: The archers of Stonehall are ready at Tresdin's command.
language.shardDescription: Gives  bonus radius when cast during Duel.

description: Removes debuffs and disables from the target friendly unit, and grants bonus movement speed and health regen for a short time.
DISPEL TYPE: Strong Dispel
language.lore: The rallying horn of the Bronze Legion is able to inspire any heart.

description: When attacked, Legion Commander has a chance to immediately counterattack with bonus lifesteal.
language.lore: Tresdin knows that an enemy's most vulnerable moment often follows their fiercest stroke.

description: Legion Commander and the target enemy hero are forced to attack each other for a short duration.  Neither hero can use items or abilities, with the exception of Legion Commander being able to cast Overwhelming Odds. If either hero dies during the duration, the hero winning the Duel gains permanent bonus damage.
language.lore: To face a soldier of Stonehall in single combat is a challenge few can resist.
notes: Duels will end if the units are pushed 2000 units apart.
language.aghanimDescription: Increases Duel duration.  Legion Commander is debuff immune for the duration of the Duel.
language.shardDescription: Increases Duel damage by  per win. Applies retroactively.

description: Plant an invisible mine that cannot be detected by True Sight, but is visible if an enemy is within the active 500 AoE of the mine. Mines detonate if an enemy is standing within the active AoE for 1.0 seconds dealing damage and temporarily reducing the enemy's Magic Resistance. The explosion deals full damage if the target is within 150 radius and decreases up to 50 on the edge. Deals 30% damage to buildings.
language.lore: The bane of Toterin!
notes: Cannot be placed within 350 AoE of another Proximity Mine.
Proximity Mines do not block neutral creep camps from spawning.
Mines last until they explode or are destroyed.
Mines are triggered by invisible units.
Grants 30 gold if destroyed by an enemy hero.

description: Plant an invisible trap that roots nearby enemy units instantly when triggered.
language.lore: The scourge of Trapper Town!
notes: Stasis Traps destroy all other Stasis Traps in their area of effect when they detonate.
Stasis Traps are not triggered by invisible units.
Stasis Traps do not block neutral creep camps from spawning.
language.aghanimDescription: Increases cast range.

description: Techies hurtle themselves into the enemy's midst, detonating charges upon impact which deal massive area of effect damage and stun enemies. Upon landing, the assault deals Techies non-lethal damage equal to a percentage of their current health.
language.lore: Where we going?
notes: The self-damage Techies receive from this blast is pure and non-lethal.
This ability destroys trees.
language.shardDescription: Increases Blast Off! cast range by %shard_bonus_cast_range% and applies a %shard_stun_duration% second stun to affected enemies.

description: Plant an invisible explosive that will only detonate after a brief delay when triggered.  Does not damage buildings.
language.lore: The downfall of Dredger's Bight!
notes: Grants 10 gold if destroyed by an enemy hero.
language.aghanimDescription: Increases damage and cast range.

description: Ember Spirit unleashes fiery bolas that wrap around nearby enemies, anchoring them in place and dealing damage each second.
language.lore: Xin's harshest lessons often employed the use of red-hot chains.
notes: Targets are chosen randomly around Xin.
Does not affect Debuff Immune or invisible units.

description: Ember Spirit dashes around with blazing speed, attacking all enemies in the targeted area of effect, then returning to his start location.  Deals bonus damage to heroes.
language.lore: The studied warrior must whip and weave through its enemies, burning each without pause.
notes: Targets are determined when the spell is cast.
A regular attack is done to each target every 0.25 seconds.
Any attack modifier that Xin has (such as Critical Strike, Bash, Cleave, or Orb effects) will be applied normally on these attacks.
Abilities and items can be used while Sleight of Fist is active.

description: Ember Spirit surrounds himself with a ring of fire that consumes incoming magic damage, absorbing a percentage of the damage taken. Flame Guard deals damage per second in an area around Ember Spirit while Flame Guard is active. If the shield is broken, the damage is also lost.
language.lore: An enemy should never be allowed to approach without difficulty.
notes: Magic damage reduction is calculated before any reductions.
The damage lingers for an additional 0.5 seconds after application.

description: Sends a Fire Remnant that runs to the target location at 250% Ember Spirit's speed. Using Activate Fire Remnant, Ember Spirit will dash out to all active Fire Remnants, destroying them and dealing damage in an area and then moving to the nearest Remnant. Ember Spirit will end at the Remnant closest to the targeted location.
language.lore: By the spirit's power are Xin's teachings spread anew.
notes: Starts with 3 charges (maximum).
language.aghanimDescription: Increases cast range, initial remnant speed, and maximum charges.
language.shardDescription: If an enemy hero dies near Ember Spirit, a Fire Remnant charge will be replenished.

description: Select the Fire Remnant to arrive at.
language.lore: With blazing speed does a spirit fly!

description: Earth Spirit smashes the target enemy or ally, sending them in the direction he is facing. If Earth Spirit targets an area, he will smash the nearest unit in a 200 radius, prioritizing Stone Remnants. The travelling unit or Remnant damages all enemy units it hits. If an enemy is hit by a Stone Remnant, they are also slowed. Stone Remnants travel further than other units.
language.lore: It is with the power of a mountain that Earth Spirit strikes his enemies.

description: Earth Spirit gathers himself into a boulder and, after a 0.6s delay, rolls toward the target location, dealing 60 / 70 / 80 / 90 + 100% STR damage and stunning enemy units. He will stop if he collides with an enemy hero or is stunned. If he rolls over a Stone Remnant, he will travel further and faster, and stun enemies for longer.
language.lore: Calling upon his connection to the land, the Earth Spirit draws loose stone to him, which forms a protective ball that he can use to roll short distances.
notes: Rolling over a Stone Remnant will destroy the Remnant.
The boulder has a radius of 160.
Earth Spirit is untargetable and invulnerable while rolling.

description: Earth Spirit pulls the target Stone Remnant. Enemies struck by the gripped target will be silenced and take damage.
language.lore: Like calls to like. Even the minerals found in the blood and bones of living beings are not immune to the call of the Earth Spirit.
notes: Will not work on a unit inside Chronosphere, Duel, or Black Hole.
Geomagnetic Grip can also target allied creeps.
language.shardDescription: Can now grab allies.

description: Call a Stone Remnant to the target location.  Stone Remnants have no vision and are invulnerable, and can be used with Earth Spirit's abilities.  Calling a Stone Remnant consumes a charge, which recharge over time. Gains additional charges every %hero_level_increment% hero levels.
language.lore: Earth Spirit calls forth a remnant of his stone army, long buried with him in the dark embrace of the Earth.

description: Magnetizes units in a small nearby area, causing them to take damage for a short duration. Magnetized heroes cause nearby Stone Remnants to explode, destroying the remnant and refreshing Magnetize's duration on all nearby enemies. This process can repeat multiple times. If an enemy hero is affected by Geomagnetic Grip or Boulder Smash, all magnetized heroes share the effects.
language.lore: At the Earth Spirit's call, the minerals in the blood and bones of his enemies rebel against the bodies they find themselves in.

description: Calls down waves of fire that damage enemy units in the target area, burning for additional damage over time.
language.lore: The flames of conquest blaze forth from the darkest depths of the abyss.
language.shardDescription: Firestorm can be allied targeted. When used that way, the Firestorm follows the hero around.  The wave count is increased, and tick rate / duration time occur more quickly.

description: A deadly pit is conjured at the target location; any unit that enters will be damaged and rooted. Each enemy unit within the pit are affected by the root only every 3.6 seconds.
language.lore: Twisting into the seams of reality itself, Vrogros' manifest hatred paralyzes those who defy his will.
language.aghanimDescription: Increases radius of the Pit of Malice.

description: Nearby enemy units are weakened, losing a portion of their base damage. If an enemy dies while under this effect, Underlord gains temporary bonus damage.
language.lore: To merely stand in the presence of the Underlord is to feel the conviction of battle sapped from one's soul.
notes: Break disables the Attack Damage Reduction aura and prevents Underlord from gaining new stacks.

description: Terrorblade brings forth an invulnerable dark reflection of all enemy heroes in a target area. Affected enemy heroes have movement and attack speeds slowed and attacked by their reflection.
language.lore: In the fractal prison of Foulfell, Terrorblade learned the truth of this old tale: you are your own worst enemy.  Now it is a lesson he teaches others.
notes: Reflections are untargetable, invulnerable illusions, that will be destroyed if the slow debuff is removed.
Reflections can only attack their source.

description: Creates an illusion of Terrorblade that deals damage.
language.lore: There's only one thing more dangerous than facing Terrorblade.  Facing MORE Terrorblades!
notes: Illusions created by Conjure Image are visually different for enemies.

description: Terrorblade transforms into a powerful demon with a ranged attack. Any of Terrorblade's illusions that are within 1200 range will also be transformed by Metamorphosis.
language.lore: Temper, temper. The rage rises up and takes control.  Meet Terrorblade's own worst self.
notes: Cooldowns of items that are different for ranged and melee units will be based on which form Terrorblade was in when the item was used.

description: Severs the life from both Terrorblade and a target hero, exchanging a percentage of both units' current health. Some health points must remain.
language.lore: You didn't need that life, did you?  The demon marauder steals that which you hold most dear.
notes: Debuff Immune enemies don't get their HP modified.

description: Phoenix dives forward in an arc with a fixed distance in the targeted direction, dealing damage over time and slowing the movement speed of any units it comes into contact with, and then orbiting back to its original position. If Phoenix casts Supernova, the dive ends.
language.lore: Though no stranger to travelling the cosmic void, soaring within an atmosphere offers unique pleasures.
notes: Icarus Dive has a 2.0 second travel duration, and can be cancelled by casting the ability again while in flight.

description: Immediately cancels the dive.
language.lore: SCREE!

description: Summons 4 fire spirits that circle around Phoenix. Each spirit can be launched independently at a targeted area of effect. Affected enemy units take damage over time and have their attack speed greatly reduced.
language.lore: The ever-collapsing core of Phoenix often emits short-lived bursts of conscious light.
notes: Fire Spirits reveal the area they strike for 1 second.
language.shardDescription: Causes Fire Spirits to become a passive charge-based ability. Has 7 second replenish time.

description: Phoenix expels a beam of light at the cost of its own health. The beam damages enemies and heals allies for a base amount plus a percentage of their health. The percentage increases as the beam continues to fire.
language.lore: The vent through which such stellar energy flows is mere atoms wide.
notes: Sun Ray has a width of 130 units, and a length of %abilitycastrange% units.
Sun Ray is canceled if Phoenix gets stunned, silenced, cycloned, hexed or slept.
Phoenix can use items and abilities without canceling Sun Ray.
language.shardDescription: Allows Sun Ray to be cast during Supernova, and slows affected enemies by .

description: Immediately stops the Sun Ray.
language.lore: CHIRP!

description: Toggles slow forward movement during Sun Ray firing.
language.lore: SQAWRK!
notes: Sun Ray allows Phoenix to move over cliffs and trees.

description: The Phoenix willingly ends its current life for the chance to be reborn. Transforms into a burning sun that scorches enemies in a huge area. The sun can be destroyed by attacks from enemy Heroes. After 6.0 seconds the sun explodes, stunning all nearby enemies while restoring Phoenix to full health and mana with refreshed abilities.
DISPEL TYPE: Strong Dispel
language.lore: The solar crucible of a Supernova may be fatal, yet from its flames arise new beacons to wander infinity.
language.aghanimDescription: Increases number of attacks to destroy Supernova and allows Phoenix to cast Supernova on an allied hero, bringing both into the sun to be reborn together.

description: Each fire spirit can be launched independently at a targeted area of effect. Affected enemy units take damage over time and have their attack speed greatly reduced.
language.lore: PKAWW! BOOM
notes: Fire Spirits reveal the area they strike for 1 second.

description: Releases a wave that silences and knocks back and reveals invisible enemy units. Knockback distance is relative to how close they are to Drow.
language.lore: Traxex is rather fond of the tranquility of physical combat, calling on her Drow heritage to end the incantations of opposing magi.

description: Detonate all remote mines in the target area.
language.lore: Why light one fuse when you can light them all?

description: Detonate all selected remote mines.
language.lore: Kablooey!

description: CHANNELED - Gathers Oracle's power into a bolt of scouring energy that, when released, damages, roots, and dispels enemies of buffs in an area around the target. If target is an ally it will only dispel debuffs. The root duration increases with channeling time.
DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
language.lore: The astral orb crackles with power while raw energy lances out, temporarily disrupting an enemy's connection to their own body.
notes: Can be cast on invulnerable units.

description: Oracle enraptures a target, disarming them if they are an enemy and granting them 100% magic damage resistance if they are an ally.
language.lore: An unbreakable prophecy resounds: a chosen ally shall briefly suffer no magics.  Other kinds of suffering however...

description: Burns away impurities, dealing heavy magic damage to the target before causing them to regenerate health over time. The amount of health regenerated over its duration exceeds the amount of initial damage. Can be cast on enemies and allies.
language.lore: Like a hall of mirrors might amplify the light of a single candle, the shattered walls of the universe can transform the light of prophecy into a burning torch.
notes: The healing from Purifying Flames can be stacked with itself.
The damage from Purifying Flames cannot be lethal to allies.

description: Temporarily alters an ally's destiny, delaying any healing or damage taken until False Promise ends. Any healing that is delayed by False Promise is amplified. Removes most negative status effects and disables on initial cast.
DISPEL TYPE: Strong Dispel
language.lore: Foes and false prophets oft make lies of men's fates.
notes: Delayed damage and healing will take armor and magic resistance reductions into account when received.
The delayed damage and healing takes effect as soon as the target becomes vulnerable.
language.aghanimDescription: Causes False Promise to have a  second fade delay invisibility and grants the ally  bonus Spell Damage and  reduced Base Attack Time.

description: Launch the snowball toward the target.
language.lore: Into the great wide white!
notes: The snowball destroys trees.
Doesn't carry illusions, but will carry Meepo clones and other units that Tusk controls.
Each Meepo clone added to the snowball will add its own bonus damage.

description: Destroys the selected Spin Web.
Plant a warning sign, causing Sticky Bombs and Proximity Mines within its radius to be invulnerable and deal 15% more damage. Only one sign can exist at a time. Lasts 60 seconds.
language.lore: Watch your step!
language.aghanimDescription: Increases radius and duration of Minefield Sign. When an enemy hero walks within 200 units of a minefield sign, the 500 units area around the sign will become a minefield for 10 seconds, dealing damage to enemy units any time they move within its area. Minefield Sign is destroyed after this effect ends.

description:
Earth Spirit temporarily enchants a hero, granting them the properties of a Stone Remnant. After a short duration the remnant shatters, releasing the hero and damaging nearby enemies. < br>
Can be cast on Stone Remnants. Has a 5 second cooldown when used that way.
Has a larger cast range when cast on an ally hero.
language.lore: Kaolin uses the elemental power of the Earth to temporarily petrify living beings, so that they might be conscripted into his stone funerary army.
notes: Earth Spirit himself can be targeted by Boulder Smash if he is enchanted.

description: Treant Protector enchants a tree, which grants him unobstructed vision in that location. If Overgrowth is cast, units within a radius of an enchanted tree will be entangled and damaged. Passively causes all trees to respawn much faster.
language.lore: One can never be too certain who, or what, might need protecting.
notes: Being entangled by Overgrowth through enchanted trees from Eyes in the Forest does damage.
If the enemy has True Sight, they will be able to see which trees are enchanted.

description: Winter Wyvern soars upon an arctic wind, granting her unobstructed movement and allowing her to exhale a blistering chill into each attack. While soaring, her attacks travel further and faster, and slow enemies with a magical freeze that strips them of 4 / 6 / 8 / 10% of their current health each second.
language.lore: The same organ where some dragons stoke their inner flame is, in Auroth, a crucible of unimaginable cold. From deep within her frosty gullet, an exhalation sends enemies into burning agony.
notes: Enemy units can only receive the Arctic Burn debuff once per cast.
This ability does not affect Roshan.
Reduces Winter Wyvern's attack point to 0.1.
The damage and slow from Arctic Burn can be dispelled.
language.aghanimDescription: Causes Arctic Burn to be a toggle ability, draining mana every second when active. Removes limit on number of attacks per target. Increases Winter Wyvern's movement speed.

description: Launches a ball of brittle ice toward a unit. The ice shatters on impact, leaving the primary target completely unaffected, while hurling damaging splinters into nearby enemies in a 500 base radius. Enemies struck by these splinters are slowed by 28 / 32 / 36 / 40%.
language.lore: Produced slowly by specialized vesicles in her frozen gullet, Winter Wyvern blast shards of ice at her enemies.
notes: The primary projectile moves at 1200 movement speed.
The primary projectile cannot be disjointed and cannot be targeted towards Winter Wyvern herself.

description: Encases an ally in an icy cocoon, freezing them solid while healing a base amount as well as a percentage of their maximum health each second. The cocoon blocks all physical damage.
language.lore: From winter's heart comes a cold, healing embrace. The ice slows the blood and allows the spell to better work its curative magic.
language.shardDescription: When Cold Embrace ends, a Splinter Blast goes off at that location, hitting enemies within  range. Reduces cooldown by  seconds.

description: Winter Wyvern dispells then freezes an enemy in place while striking those nearby with a maddening curse which causes them to attack their frozen ally with increased attack speed. The frozen ally and those cursed to attack their ally are immune to all damage from their enemies with the exception of damage from Winter Wyvern or her controlled units.
language.lore: The oldest of the bookwurm's spells, this curse lends truth to the old saw: sometimes the enemy of my enemy is my enemy still.
notes: If the target dies to its allies, Winter Wyvern will receive credit for the kill.
Will only pierce the spell immunity of the primary target, not the target's surrounding allies.

description: Increases the health capacity of nearby units.

Nyx Assassin buries himself beneath the battlefield over a short duration. Once burrowed, Spiked Carapace instantly stuns nearby enemies when cast, the range of Mind Flare and Impale is increased, and Impale's cooldown is decreased. While burrowed, Nyx Assassin is stationary, unable to attack, and invisible. Nyx Assassin gains damage reduction from all damage sources.
language.lore: Some castes of zealot scarab are known to create small burrows to lie in wait, ready to ambush their prey.
notes: Casting Vendetta will cancel burrow.

description: On death, Mud Golems shatter into several Shard Golems.
Hurls a boulder at the target, damaging and stunning them.
language.lore: \"Why do they hesitate? What are they afraid of throwing?\"

description: Kicks the closest enemy unit in the drawn direction, stunning, damaging, and slowing them. Also deals damage to all heroes within 250 radius of its landing area. Cooldown is reduced by 50% if kicking a creep.
language.lore: Tusk may have made his name with his fists, but the wise enemy is wary of any and all limbs.

description: Emerge from the burrow.
language.lore: Some castes of zealot scarab are known to create small burrows to lie in wait, ready to ambush their prey.

description: Infuses a lone enemy unit with swirling, volatile energy, dealing damage over time and slowing the target. The damage is not applied if another enemy unit is near the target.
language.lore: An infinitesimal fraction of the power which imprisoned the Ancients.
language.aghanimDescription: Flux silences when the target is alone, deals more damage, and lasts longer.

description: Arc Warden generates a circular distortion field of magnetic energy. The magnetic field grants bonus attack speed and protects allied units within it by evading attacks coming from outside the field.
language.lore: Time and space are of little consequence to one as old as Zet.

description: Summons a Spark Wraith that slowly materializes and patrols a targeted area until an enemy comes within its range. Once a target has been found the wraith fuses with them, dealing magical damage and slowing the unit.
language.lore: Lesser fragments of Zet's original self.
notes: Spark Wraiths can not be disjointed.
language.shardDescription: When Spark Wraith activates, a secondary Spark Wraith will fuse to the next closest target that deals 0 damage. Increases Spark Wraith search radius.

description: The Ancient Black Dragon's dreaded presence grants nearby allies additional armor. This bonus can stack with itself.
The rhythm of the Thunderhide's heartbeat increases the attack speed and accuracy of nearby allies.

Briefly refocusing its fractured elements into a single form, the Arc Warden is able to create a perfect electrical duplication of itself. The duplicate can use all of Arc Warden's current items and special Tempest Double versions of his spells, except most consumables and items that drop on death. The duplicate has separate item and ability cooldowns.

The Tempest Double loses its sense of self and fractures over time, becoming slower and less accurate.
language.lore: Warped by the power of its peers, Arc Warden becomes what it despises most: disharmony.
notes: Tempest Double and Refresher Orb cannot be used by the duplicate.

description: Passively grants a chance to restore a percentage of your max mana each time you cast an ability.
language.lore: The Outworld is awash in arcane energy, inclined to diffuse through any of Harbinger's rifts.
notes: Break prevents the Aghanim's Scepter effect from triggering.
language.aghanimDescription: Damage that would bring Outworld Destroyer below 20 health triggers a strong dispel. In addition, when the effect is triggered Outworld Destroyer consumes of all his mana to create an all damage barrier equal to 65 of his maximum mana that lasts for 15 seconds. This effect can occur every 80 seconds and cannot be refreshed.

description: Creates a spirit link between Death Prophet and an enemy unit, draining health from the enemy.
language.lore: Krobelus willingly shows others the path she alone cannot follow.
notes: Cannot cast multiple on same target.
language.shardDescription: Increases Spirit Siphon charges by  and causes enemies to be feared for  seconds if they are siphoned for  seconds consecutively.

description: Lone Druid and the Spirit Bear roar fiercely causing nearby enemies to flee towards their base in terror. Their movement speed is increased by 20%.
notes: An entangled hero will not be able to move.
Cooldown is shared with Lone Druid.

description: This creature protects its allies with a Magic resistance aura. Creeps are better protected.
Hurls a fire blast on the ground, igniting the area in a 300 radius for 8.0 / 9 / 10 / 12 seconds. Enemies caught in the fire will take 85 damage per second.
Improves all attributes per point spent

Faceless Void traps all nearby enemies in a time dilation field for 8 / 9 / 10 / 11 seconds, extending their cooldowns and slowing their movement and attack speed by 7 / 8 / 9 / 10% for each cooldown extended. Deals bonus damage per second for each cooldown.
language.lore: For those facing off against Darkterror, each moment seems to stretch into eternity.
notes: Does not affect item cooldowns.

description: Monkey King enlarges his staff and slams it against the ground, stunning enemies in a line and damaging them with bonus damage and a critical hit based on his attack. Has True Strike.
language.lore: The legendary Jingu Bang grows to match its master's will, ensuring no enemy can escape the Monkey King's reach.
notes: Does not affect spell-immune enemies.
language.shardDescription: Boundless Strike applies Primal Spring with 60 of the max channeling duration power to enemies along the staff and at the end of the staff. When Boundless Strike is set to alt-cast, Monkey King leaps to the end of his staff.

description: Changes Monkey King's shape to deceive opponents, using the environment nearby as inspiration for the disguise. Taking damage, attacking, or using any item or ability breaks Monkey King's disguise. Grants damage immunity for 0.1 seconds upon transforming.
language.lore: Watch out for that tree.
language.shardDescription: Mischief has a shorter cooldown, longer invulnerability period, and disjoints projectiles.

description: Monkey King jumps to a tree and perches atop it. While perched, he gains the Primal Spring ability-a channeled leap attack. If Monkey King's tree is destroyed, he falls and is stunned for 4 seconds. Taking damage while on the ground puts Tree Dance on cooldown.
language.lore: Sun Wukong dances nimbly along the treetop canopy, always just out of arm's reach.
notes: Tree Dance cooldown starts upon landing.
Right-clicking the ground will have Monkey King drop from the tree.

description: Reverts Monkey King's shape to his original form.
Monkey King's attacks awaken the Jingu Bang's power. Upon the fourth hit on the same enemy hero, Monkey King earns 4 charged attacks that have bonus damage and lifesteal.
language.lore: Always sensitive to the moods of its master, the Jingu Bang radiates power when Sun Wukong's combat fervor is on full display.
notes: Hitting an enemy with Boundless Strike adds to the hit counter.
Repeatedly hitting an enemy refreshes the Jingu Mastery debuff duration.
Hit charges on enemies cannot be dispelled.
Jingu Mastery buff on self can be dispelled.
Break disables the gaining of new stacks.
Break does not disable the bonuses from existing stacks.

description: CHANNELED - Monkey King springs out from his tree perch, damaging and slowing enemies in the area where he lands. Damage and slow amounts are in proportion to channel duration.
language.lore: Leaping from the safety of cover into the midst of his enemies, Sun Wukong attacks without mercy.

description: Monkey King creates a circular formation of soldiers that spread out from his position. If Monkey King leaves the area his soldiers disperse. The soldiers have Monkey King's attack and only target heroes. Monkey King is granted bonus armor for the spell's duration.
language.lore: Monkey King rips out a tuft of fur to blow at his enemies, charging each strand to transform into a copy of himself.
notes: Soldiers do not receive Jingu Mastery bonuses.
Soldiers do not copy Basher or Abyssal.
language.aghanimDescription: Spawns a monkey soldier near Monkey King at regular intervals. Soldiers do not spawn while invisible or on trees. Soldiers only attack buildings when Monkey King himself is nearby. Soldiers can now gain Jingu Mastery charges independently.

description: Reduces all elements to their basic levels, removing base armor and magic damage resistance from nearby enemy units. The armor reduction is centered around the hero, while the magic armor reduction is centered around Astral Spirit.
language.lore: As it was at the beginning, Elder Titan makes it so again.
notes: When the Astral Spirit isn't present, both the armor and magic armor reduction is centered around Elder Titan.
Break disables the armor reduction aura.

description:
Muerta fires a ghostly trickshot at an enemy unit or tree. When the bullet strikes, it damages and briefly slows, then ricochets in the targeted direction.

The ricochet damages all units that it passes through, stopping when it hits a hero. Heroes hit by the ricochet are feared away from the impact.
language.lore: A steady gunhand and an eternity of practice produce trickshots that defy the mortal mind.
notes: Feared enemies are phased and unslowable.
The ricochet will travel 1.5x Dead Shot's cast range.
Can ricochet off of magic immune targets.
language.aghanimDescription: Dead Shot damage is increased. Dead Shot expands after it ricochets and pierces through enemy heroes as it fears them.

description: Summons a group of 4 revenants that slowly circle the targeted location. Enemies within the area are slowed. Revenants deal damage and silence enemies as they pass through them.
language.lore: Muerta's family are forever beyond the spirit veil, but her deal with Death allows her to briefly call on them in times of want or need.

description: Toggleable. When toggled on, Muerta's attacks have a chance to fire a second shot at another target.
language.lore: Muerta offers all of her victims Mercy. Some are fortunate enough to also earn Grace.
notes: If no other units are in range, she fires both guns at the original target.
Secondary shots can hit units within Muerta's attack range plus 175.
The secondary shot can trigger attack modifiers.
Prioritizes heroes, then non-hero units, then buildings.

description:
Muerta transforms, becoming immune to physical damage. All of her attack damage is dealt as magical damage and Muerta gains bonus attack damage and phased movement.

DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
language.lore: Muerta sheds her corporeal form, crossing the spirit veil and striking her enemies with the fury of the damned.
notes: Muerta will dodge projectiles upon transformation.
Muerta cannot attack buildings while transformed.
language.shardDescription:
Muerta gains  Spell Lifesteal during Pierce the Veil.
While Pierce the Veil is active Muerta permanently gains 2 spell amplification each time she kills an enemy Hero or they die in her vicinity. Bonus applies retroactively.

language.displayName: x1.5x Flesh Heap and Meat Shield bonuses
+1 Armor Corruption to Visage and Familiars
description: This effect can stack among multiple sources and lasts {s:bonus_armor_reduction_duration}s.

language.displayName: 80% Magic Resistance for Chaotic Offering Golems
Magic Missile Damage Becomes Pure And Pierces Debuff Immunity

description: Increases both stun and path duration.

language.displayName: +2.5% Infernal Blade Max HP As Damage

description: Also affects Spirit of the Forest
Releases {s:bonus_radial_count} additional Deafening Blasts around Invoker in a circular pattern.  An enemy can only be hit once per cast.
Gives lifesteal and health regeneration to nearby allies.
Automatically targets additional enemy units with a mana pool within 400 distance around the original target.
The duration of the stun is not affected.
Launches two extra Stifling Daggers towards random visible enemies within the cast range.

language.displayName: +50 Tricks of the Trade Agility Increase
-0.7% Bloodrage Max Health DPS For Allies

notes: Only steals the first ability

language.displayName: Lightning Storm Can Bounce Twice On Units
description: Will bounce to units it affected already only when there are no other units available
The extra arrows are launched in a cone shape, {s:bonus_extra_arrows_angle} degrees to the left and right of the original arrow, and cannot hit the same target.

language.displayName: +{s:bonus_AbilityCharges} Holy Persuasion Max Units and Charges
Hand of God Fully Heals Chen and His Creeps
description: Initial Heal fully heals. Heal over time is still applied.
Stomps the ground, dealing damage to nearby units and reducing their base physical armor by 50%.
Causes the next attack to petrify the enemy, rooting them and dealing 100 damage per second.

language.displayName: +1% Target Max Health Voodoo Restoration Heal

description: Allied heroes within 1200 range of Centaur gain the Return Damage aspect of Retaliate.
Creates a storm cloud anywhere on the map that automatically casts Lightning Bolt on nearby enemies.
language.lore: Where the thunder god's ire grows, storm clouds quickly gather.
notes: Grants 125 gold if destroyed by an enemy hero.
Affects the closest enemy unit with strikes from Zeus's current level of Lightning Bolt.
Towers and creeps do half damage to the Nimbus.

description: Dark Willow creates a 500 AoE maze of 8 brambles that grow in the target area after 0.3 seconds. Enemies that walk into a bramble are rooted and take damage over time. Lasts 12 seconds.
language.lore: The fae realm exists all around you, merely waiting to draw you in...
notes: Does not interrupt channeling spells upon rooting.

description: Dark Willow sends her pet wisp to roam around herself for the duration, rapidly attacking nearby enemies.  Bedlam cannot be used while Terrorize is active.
language.lore: You'll have to excuse my friend Jex. He's really into murder.

description: Dark Willow recedes into the shadows, becoming untargetable. Her next attack has 600 bonus attack range and deals bonus magic damage, and will end Shadow Realm. Damage scales based on how long she remains under the effects of Shadow Realm, the maximum being reached after 3.0 seconds.
language.lore: What you can't see will most definitely hurt you.
notes: Disjoints projectiles upon cast.
Grants phased movement.
Spells which require vision cannot affect Dark Willow in the Shadow Realm.
language.aghanimDescription: Attacking no longer takes Dark Willow out of Shadow Realm. Each attack still has bonus damage based on the duration of the buff.

description: Dark Willow casts an ancient fae curse on the target. After a delay, the target and nearby enemies are stunned.
language.lore: Didn't anyone ever tell you? Never strike a deal with a fairy...
language.shardDescription: Cursed Crown creates  brambles in a  radius around the target after the counter ends. Triggers even upon dispel. Cursed Crown cooldown reduced by 1.5 seconds.

description: Pangolier curls into a debuff immune ball with 60% additional magic resistance and rolls out. When rolling, he moves at an increased speed and can move through trees, but has a decreased ability to turn. Striking enemies knocks them back, inflicting damage proportional to his attack damage and stunning them when they land.
Colliding with walls or cliffs will cause a temporary pause while Pangolier reverses in direction.
During Rolling Thunder, Shield Crash cooldown is reduced.
DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
language.lore: Where his ancestors sought only refuge, the Pangolier saw opportunity...
notes: Enemies can be stunned multiple times per use, but cannot be affected a subsequent time until the previous stun duration ends.
If Pangolier is disabled while rolling, he will continue to stun and knock enemies that come within range.

description: Pangolier dashes along the target line, then slashes all enemies in the drawn direction with several quick swipes.
Lucky Shot has a chance to activate from this damage.
language.lore: The Pangolier's blade is even nimbler than his tongue.
